name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: An opportunity to champion change in America
body:
Ever feel like the heart and soul of America

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk6skd56iukjdgcblqvjch03va35q70l50d8gm1g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32chh6coj6cph2bs)
---
| Dear Patriot,

Ever feel like the heart and soul of America - faith, liberty, community, and life - are disappearing? You're not alone. Many Americans share your concern, and it's why we founded the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI).

Our mission? To safeguard these core principles, reaffirm the spirit of our great nation, and bring us back onto the path our Founding Fathers intended. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp50golk2ec0ajgahq6seljmvrcoi9ip7g36cgdo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32chh6coj6cph2bs) We champion conservative solutions to modern issues with initiatives like our Little Patriots program, a landmark education initiative designed to teach our youngest citizens true American history and the virtue of hard work and faith. We advance awareness about the pro-life movement, aiming to protect life in all its stages. We also work to build bridges, uniting groups with common interests to create a stronger, more unified America.

And right now, it's a critical time to act.

We are currently facing an unprecedented opportunity: An anonymous donor ready to match every dollar raised up to $100,000! That's right, your gift to ACI right now will be automatically doubled, doubling your impact in preserving our guiding values.

Whether you're dedicated to protecting life, preserving true American history, or just want to see unity restored to our beautiful nation, your generosity will help us turn the tide. By deciding to donate, you make a powerful statement about the kind of America you want to see.

This limited-time opportunity allows your contribution to have twice the effect and enables us to make considerable strides toward healing our nation's divisions and securing a stronger future.

Together, we can restore America's enduring principles, but only with your support. Please consider making a year-end gift using this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/cye-2023](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9gmnvvun117kcs3ej1snp3h2q7471f1bgjfgol8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32chh6coj6cph2bs)

Thank you for standing with us. Your support is invaluable in achieving our shared vision.

With gratitude,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

P.S. Don't let this opportunity to double your impact pass by. Every dollar counts. Donate today before the matching gift period ends!

name: The Exodus Effect
subject: Trump’s Prophecy Coming True: Millions Could Die
body:
You and your family do NOT have to be a victim.

Dear reader,
In early 2022, President Trump issued a prophecy...
He said "crooked Joe" would lead us into World War III.
Unfortunately his prophecy is coming true.
And according to an official congressional report...
9 in 10 Americans could die from [this terrifying attack on America.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37694%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p2%2bndnga3K5lbtqSqjF9ng&sysid=1)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join Me in Standing Up for Women’s Sports and American Values
body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wgWbrfzpK4IWhiCMWACqsw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnVtUwP0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLVVDTi0yMDIzMTIwOVcDc3BjQgplc4o3dGVCAnDeUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wgWbrfzpK4IWhiCMWACqsw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnVtUwP0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLVVDTi0yMDIzMTIwOVcDc3BjQgplc4o3dGVCAnDeUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wgWbrfzpK4IWhiCMWACqsw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnVtUwP0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLVVDTi0yMDIzMTIwOVcDc3BjQgplc4o3dGVCAnDeUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wgWbrfzpK4IWhiCMWACqsw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnVtUwP0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLVVDTi0yMDIzMTIwOVcDc3BjQgplc4o3dGVCAnDeUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

US Conservative Network
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The Future of Hearing Aids
body:
This powerful secret weapon against hearing loss is crushing the market

| [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8a1651480abf4b2fa9379be10f5d492a&_e=COMKsYuxI1NY5epaq2sTYjXubOcgZBSOvZpIFR1QrBMsaOqIXXJSQDSIWq6NvMKWaVDcqIgoz10F2DGn8KZCNRs59S7O4Gvq5S9COde1w5-gKWEHa8GKh1jZ3scc9Tvs77-hhiMD2fx30tNjrFL3xdCEDq6CXkFZTtbi65VSt1SVNjES6vv_9c8i-DqfhEcYzUgZTuSB0KweA1DAHKogjvwe97GpCl5O13n-v_YxymQGdeZjSYAfVv83PosqndC3cuayncAEIxqQGOfkio0RsgBCMNNOjTkpPScqaBeGSo80Om6bYkUSSYf1-XcGwpIJMmxj6OUDM7RNGBzXUt3SPcKssrLeikLA4jHEUHqdRm0__VcneCuCJjRiQykhsmMKt4OwYchEYM4ppAspKY2_JHAmRTb034mZYhMJjbhDeiL0W15e2bihLmYJQZnU4xAmlCFMKe8WLr6035EhtdqhkwvugO4pdJ2kWo4dnDcfs9E%3D)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8a1651480abf4b2fa9379be10f5d492a&_e=COMKsYuxI1NY5epaq2sTYjXubOcgZBSOvZpIFR1QrBMsaOqIXXJSQDSIWq6NvMKWaVDcqIgoz10F2DGn8KZCNRs59S7O4Gvq5S9COde1w5-gKWEHa8GKh1jZ3scc9Tvs77-hhiMD2fx30tNjrFL3xdCEDq6CXkFZTtbi65VSt1SVNjES6vv_9c8i-DqfhEcYzUgZTuSB0KweA1DAHKogjvwe97GpCl5O13n-v_YxymQGdeZjSYAfVv83PosqndC3cuayncAEIxqQGOfkio0RsgBCMNNOjTkpPScqaBeGSo80Om6bYkUSSYf1-XcGwpIJMmxj6OUDM7RNGBzXUt3SPeGIRMJ70Wdn8IXAhke7hj2XIEVFwrYIsUJRWhhz17D8hKH87EUv-SML5PwxDP5fvaJAANJ6DJLINJMUq5QTzOZ89S_UCVzrgpz0Y2AKzNpuvZjKQUDXsNwj_hFQM9QPQTdz23neUXg1gppq5xTjNKw%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's called **Horizon by hear.com.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8a1651480abf4b2fa9379be10f5d492a&_e=COMKsYuxI1NY5epaq2sTYjXubOcgZBSOvZpIFR1QrBMsaOqIXXJSQDSIWq6NvMKWaVDcqIgoz10F2DGn8KZCNRs59S7O4Gvq5S9COde1w5-gKWEHa8GKh1jZ3scc9Tvs77-hhiMD2fx30tNjrFL3xdCEDq6CXkFZTtbi65VSt1SVNjES6vv_9c8i-DqfhEcYzUgZTuSB0KweA1DAHKogjvwe97GpCl5O13n-v_YxymQGdeZjSYAfVv83PosqndC3cuayncAEIxqQGOfkio0RsgBCMNNOjTkpPScqaBeGSo80Om6bYkUSSYf1-XcGwpIJMmxj6OUDM7RNGBzXUt3SPYqStmHzBxRKC5fT1etxPLTT_kcBb6th2zFe6L6LxYsH-ODQxCiyugHp94QM_otJXZT2ddbxkT3SfKw-VO_x3ZUbj_sEKQ0LjSLt01NFMXKfaJeBCWVmrL78sC34eiCEEnmkVEYHZYxM3QGd1I_V_uc%3D)
[ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8a1651480abf4b2fa9379be10f5d492a&_e=COMKsYuxI1NY5epaq2sTYjXubOcgZBSOvZpIFR1QrBMsaOqIXXJSQDSIWq6NvMKWaVDcqIgoz10F2DGn8KZCNRs59S7O4Gvq5S9COde1w5-gKWEHa8GKh1jZ3scc9Tvs77-hhiMD2fx30tNjrFL3xdCEDq6CXkFZTtbi65VSt1SVNjES6vv_9c8i-DqfhEcYzUgZTuSB0KweA1DAHKogjvwe97GpCl5O13n-v_YxymQGdeZjSYAfVv83PosqndC3cuayncAEIxqQGOfkio0RsgBCMNNOjTkpPScqaBeGSo80Om6bYkUSSYf1-XcGwpIJMmxj6OUDM7RNGBzXUt3SPT5Ts_WgpIzZjo5kD-vevjTurnd-2n5TxgbgqYVZS13Y1li87DxOxFzKcXmu86vxTDwksLqfG7yOAth5IosVW0Dtq1yw6s1_r7017bzDDD-mV52vyxbezoFqCWC5KllJMCdVvp8fxCk93RvUWkzfmrE%3D)
What makes Horizon so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you'll completely forget you're wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don't wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8a1651480abf4b2fa9379be10f5d492a&_e=COMKsYuxI1NY5epaq2sTYjXubOcgZBSOvZpIFR1QrBMsaOqIXXJSQDSIWq6NvMKWaVDcqIgoz10F2DGn8KZCNRs59S7O4Gvq5S9COde1w5-gKWEHa8GKh1jZ3scc9Tvs77-hhiMD2fx30tNjrFL3xdCEDq6CXkFZTtbi65VSt1SVNjES6vv_9c8i-DqfhEcYzUgZTuSB0KweA1DAHKogjvwe97GpCl5O13n-v_YxymQGdeZjSYAfVv83PosqndC3cuayncAEIxqQGOfkio0RsgBCMNNOjTkpPScqaBeGSo80Om6bYkUSSYf1-XcGwpIJMmxj6OUDM7RNGBzXUt3SPdgwkeetFivQKKQSigazabxzLT_hNZ2jZYpPYR4hASMV5LFntFA4nXE4BWYxbA8QzBGezS5taUb3S3eNQJ4qfmOgTtca4tg6mv1l4vSB43b_uj1yiXyZTlwA0eeosBv08OyulxLuuJx-Zweo81kTeLw%3D)

name: National Gun Owner
subject: This tool is both amazing and terrifying.
body:
This survival tool is only available for adults.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Sign the petition to protect our oceans and lakes from invasive species
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2185272?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Stop ships from bringing INVASIVE SPECIES to our oceans, lakes, and rivers!**[_**Act now!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2185273?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** ** Friend, take a moment to imagine that you fish for a living on the Great Lakes. You rise early each morning to head out onto Lake Michigan, hoping to return home with a haul big enough to support your family. Each year, the pickings grow slimmer. Invasive zebra mussels – brought from Europe by ballast water in ships – have overtaken the Great Lakes, filtering out the algae that fish need to survive. Less fish means less money for you and your community. **Aquatic invasive species cost the U.S. billions of dollars** per year in damages and repair costs. Once these species establish themselves it’s nearly IMPOSSIBLE to get rid of them. That means the only solution is to prevent them from spreading in the first place – **your signature can help STOP invasive species! >>** [_**Friend, sign the petition to tell the EPA to regulate ship ballast water and fight aquatic invasive species before they OVERRUN our waterways!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2185274?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2185275?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Ships traveling over rough waters without heavy cargo need stability and even in calm waters these ships are so large they need to make sure to stay afloat. That’s where ballast water comes in. It helps to balance the ships – but it can also contain aquatic organisms that become _**ALIEN INVADERS**_ when those ships dump the water somewhere else across the world.
Invasive species **outcompete native species** that native fish need to survive and throw the **food web into chaos!** The notorious Zebra mussel corrodes pipelines and ship hulls. Since their introduction, the Zebra mussel population in the Great Lakes has grown to **750 trillion mussels!**
It is the EPA’s responsibility to protect our environment. But right now, ballast water is unregulated and alien species are invading our waterways as a result. [_**Please, Friend, protect native species and coastal economies from invaders! Sign the petition now!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2185276?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2185275?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth **
|

name: The Exodus Effect
subject: Trump’s Prophecy Coming True: Millions Could Die
body:

**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's called **Horizon by hear.com.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.

What makes Horizon so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you'll completely forget you're wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

## Trump Gag Order Mostly Upheld
An appeals court [upheld several important provisions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu6yAUgOGnwRsW58BNzMBwF2_p2tEicLBpcUCA4-btq3bu_A-_9L3flpuNKT7WN7uT6SEv1vX4pAWQa45yUYM3gQhJDmTgKhAkSKmGzfjpPqHW_6xUk8NwBRWm4C4AAJPzXgzRoEAJKDSAEEqM_g5KAoU7CaW1FUwJ8rHnOn7k-OgbhfTKT6qjy_uQzNZ7aUz-ZzgznM_zHEP-etDZfjrDueQUe3SN4fxJL25bIdcb7_XYC1_tynP1VPlRNkqeB_JUbeK2FLKpcZeP2odqfDljSrFdrkyJdbcx_e77nxjfAQAA__9DBmK6) of a gag order in President Trump's election interference case. Trump's team had appealed the order from Judge Tanya Chutkan, which barred him from speaking publically about special counsel Jack Smith. The court refined the scope of the order, barring Trump from saying anything "_with the intent to materially interfere with, or to cause others to materially interfere with the course of the case_." It did, however, [remove Smith from the list](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGy2yAQheGnkbrVsMCVL4WKNO6cNqUGwSLWRkIDyB7n6TNO2tTfKc78v27zzXLiff1pN5payLN1jZ80owQDUs2691MgkqR6mvAiJCpUSvdxCkGPSMIv1hnlDIbvIBaD0o8XE5RSPU9SSIVSGEQhtBj8glohhYWENsaKTgvy3HIZ7pn3Fimkd35SGVze-jTF1o7aqR-dvHbyutOrDm8bc_5wJ6-tnNsBiVab4IOwFKYA9jjIpgoun6XBecScfIV_49WukIunAlzrSR6WN7h4tofdAZazgU0pvypE3qBlcIUbO_5NcLfuAXXjFgHN14hf-I1DbFvqy-SPF6fEdbx0Wqyb5fT3f_tvzT8BAAD__xAAec0) of protected court staff. Trump has vowed to appeal the decision.
## Michigan Teen Gets Life In Prison
Michigan school shooter Ethan Crumbley has been [sentenced to life in prison](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSpCAQgOGnaTMsuqFGCQwuIZtLL7QQWuEWYUrZceftt2bjjf_kq__ffb67lFPZ_rqdp7bW2fmWnjwjCSNIzboL08pMrDqecJCECpXSXZzYuEBj4AFHR2ZARvZe8k0Ny6iMWbo0kSSFJA2ilFr2YUGtkNeFpTbGSdCSQ2r16P_XVFrkNb_qk4_e173LU2ztcYL6A2SB7HVd_XowP94VyJ6tHi8gW_g6gWyu3mUguycf0-YKkK3uI7sSgOzbAWSRgKwcgSy36Irwx-e-ZH6Jk0vj4lnUr7UeQcS0RXH6WGsWZ6y1pbIB2QFHTRpHKQcg2x1TeFwp53TeBtBy213KP_T268jvAAAA__8YWnKi) for his mass shooting in Oxford, MI, in 2021. He was 15 when he walked into Oxford High School and killed four students, and now he's been given a life sentence--[usually reserved for adults](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L9u2zAQgPGnoTYKxz-WrIFDgUKbuxRFR4EiT-IFFM8QGTt--yCZM3_Lh9__23LzlKnsf_yBrm28-NDogYvScpLaLLaLbkPUaDp0agStjDLGdsmZdRyiDdM4RriCilEhhOtlHdXgo52GjpwGbZSGSSkAC31clTUKtxXBTpMHYQEjNT77N6bSEm75xQ88-8BHl11q7V6F-SX0LPTs11DwWfudv7LQ87-_Qs_Yki8ynO_HmvElK5aGJWCU_LHxGeVBIdHui6whMWdZE3Ojsgs918bnS5iZojC_FVzsYEFDd7p4f1LOVIdRWNgPT_l7qP3I8xkAAP__twJmXQ). Crumbley addressed the court before his sentencing and said: "_I am a really bad person. I have done some terrible things. I have lied and I 'm not trustworthy. I hurt many people_." His parents are facing four counts of involuntary manslaughter for buying the gun for their son.

* Intense bloating (leading to a pregnant-looking belly)
* Stinky farts
* Occasional diarrhea
* Excessive urination
* Sore throat
* Occasional heartburn or indigestion
* Mucus overproduction

Many people notice changes to their body odor or excessively oily skin, as well, since their bodies are acting to purge those toxins through their pores. As the toxins gradually accumulate in your system, you may also find impairment to some of your faculties... The most common endocrine disruptors can be found in our everyday hygiene products, detergents, tupperware and so on... Gone unchecked, endocrine disruptors can "turn off" the hormones that control metabolic function. On this day in 1965, A Charlie Brown Christmas made its debut on CBS. The network expected the 30-minute special to fail, but it became an instant holiday classic. ( Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Today's edition is brought to you by . | Trump Gag Order Mostly Upheld An appeals court of a gag order in President Trump's election interference case. Trump's team had appealed the order from Judge Tanya Chutkan, which barred him from speaking publically about special counsel Jack Smith. The court refined the scope of the order, barring Trump from saying anything "with the intent to materially interfere with, or to cause others to materially interfere with the course of the case." It did, however, of protected court staff. Trump has vowed to appeal the decision. Michigan Teen Gets Life In Prison Michigan school shooter Ethan Crumbley has been for his mass shooting in Oxford, MI, in 2021. He was 15 when he walked into Oxford High School and killed four students, and now he's been given a life sentence--. Crumbley addressed the court before his sentencing and said: "I am a really bad person. I have done some terrible things. I have lied and I 'm not trustworthy. I hurt many people." His parents are facing four counts of involuntary manslaughter for buying the gun for their son. What to Watch This Weekend Staying inside this weekend? of the major streaming releases you can enjoy from the warmth of your living room. If you're in the mood for something long and serious, you can now watch Martin Scorsese's 3.5 hour-long , featuring Leo DiCaprio and Robert De Niro. It's available on-demand on Amazon and Apple. Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=da79c80d3baa48778bf92f6ee7f62afe&_e=sGgOa8Ar9gc1YEndiuYj4IyCtZ_7W4Q4DlenPRyKXCWO-cEISGjhL4xbcpKVx6g1GL2nDwrrnyPbTruZZAFVx8ugnhreIDODdInKEilG9GSaBS5-JEW0lKmh98QIvyqPVAthMOWDX2Zbsy7M_eJwbPqWlqCfEqmEJ_rkJRRRoOR7PAtUHK0PuYY5SmWxLeoqf2Ku-o_nzLr9BmWZk-v68DOZ-MHodaJAPjalL77ZuhvDKHoEWnxeezhvRWmsrPwN7EwsUOZBpZ8AeBaoXfp0yM14v1-JO_sThzYkO73uDlvhwsNUI0eIOdkaFvW19rx0). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. name: Nikki Haley
subject: My Journey, My Story, My Vision
body:
I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TRap5SLT3Lbme-U7uCuZ1g~~/AARclAA~~)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TRap5SLT3Lbme-U7uCuZ1g~~/AARclAA~~ "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TRap5SLT3Lbme-U7uCuZ1g~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TRap5SLT3Lbme-U7uCuZ1g~~/AARclAA~~)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TRap5SLT3Lbme-U7uCuZ1g~~/AARclAA~~)
---

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!>>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TRap5SLT3Lbme-U7uCuZ1g~~/AARclAA~~ "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TRap5SLT3Lbme-U7uCuZ1g~~/AARclAA~~ "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?")**

---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT TODAY](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TRap5SLT3Lbme-U7uCuZ1g~~/AARclAA~~)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help- starting right now.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TRap5SLT3Lbme-U7uCuZ1g~~/AARclAA~~ "I need your help – starting right now. ")**

Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TRap5SLT3Lbme-U7uCuZ1g~~/AARclAA~~)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [DONATE](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TRap5SLT3Lbme-U7uCuZ1g~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Cn2mLOpIZCoqo6b5ySDi0g~~/AARclAA~~~ "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Cn2mLOpIZCoqo6b5ySDi0g~~/AARclAA~~~ "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/q1fzLSp4GdsV-65ZEfDH8Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnVvHmP4RtAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_ "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/q1fzLSp4GdsV-65ZEfDH8Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnVvHmP4RtAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_ "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/q1fzLSp4GdsV-65ZEfDH8Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnVvHmP4RtAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_ "DONATE")

I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. ~ **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. ~~ and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . ~~. Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. American Freedom Report PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~ | ~~

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: The Future of Hearing Aids
body:
This powerful secret weapon against hearing loss is crushing the market
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ewti7Dup4EHY1I5RJhYNeA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnVv9CP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ewti7Dup4EHY1I5RJhYNeA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnVv9CP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's called **Horizon by hear.com.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ewti7Dup4EHY1I5RJhYNeA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnVv9CP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~)
[ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ewti7Dup4EHY1I5RJhYNeA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnVv9CP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~)
What makes Horizon so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you'll completely forget you're wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don't wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ewti7Dup4EHY1I5RJhYNeA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnVv9CP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~)

Restore Our Nation

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8de226ea430a433e9a19cca76ac74e10&_e=4nIpCR2MjSm5xev9lSa2eFsQazu83zTx9m8OqH54J4FRSUm2hdcpndL4wYWYYYEEE7-B8CqiwQsopwIsHs4B5WxJ5Sj4Gyw-oLbBaiOHXrPJQ5c-0hIJpzfdjbooPO08qZWUO0u0yU4-x_kFSMIJPPfA99YuO1hUnCdzTwX6DW1IL_X_J368NFXa6zx2unLkSGGwYNSJ1VGLNDLkziy6pINrxPSynS_tP5dt1-Xs1AZB319i-LOgebIF1y3FXVCSWkObAARe8m8mw8sf9vfSbUnHhKEHRn497Nz3vRkxPR4WpQwD3A6gmDkj5oyHOs9cpjk5QoC2OL4Fb0FuKOTkEeGgFVAog2D3QY-367yIs6pjoTwZf38n4TcDd7JNK_wHftvNA5BlFn3yWZ48pdtiTQ-PhhRvMzNH3-Y9QkNus1s%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8de226ea430a433e9a19cca76ac74e10&_e=4nIpCR2MjSm5xev9lSa2eFsQazu83zTx9m8OqH54J4FRSUm2hdcpndL4wYWYYYEEE7-B8CqiwQsopwIsHs4B5WxJ5Sj4Gyw-oLbBaiOHXrPJQ5c-0hIJpzfdjbooPO08qZWUO0u0yU4-x_kFSMIJPPfA99YuO1hUnCdzTwX6DW1IL_X_J368NFXa6zx2unLkSGGwYNSJ1VGLNDLkziy6pINrxPSynS_tP5dt1-Xs1AZB319i-LOgebIF1y3FXVCSYEMnNoxXhK343h8Nf_HFuyAP2DXJJOXQIopq6iXTd1tn_zGqUP0E8doYAxk_hqTODL9JN94JZS6ncjynU9un2Ynhby3tHvshEEowitHdy8m6ky0pl33WHJRt7s1HgyXSP0kvK9yfBpBGc3fUZx4DKSeCENTFnSVB0l5nUQ5EThU%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8de226ea430a433e9a19cca76ac74e10&_e=4nIpCR2MjSm5xev9lSa2eFsQazu83zTx9m8OqH54J4FRSUm2hdcpndL4wYWYYYEEE7-B8CqiwQsopwIsHs4B5WxJ5Sj4Gyw-oLbBaiOHXrPJQ5c-0hIJpzfdjbooPO08qZWUO0u0yU4-x_kFSMIJPPfA99YuO1hUnCdzTwX6DW1IL_X_J368NFXa6zx2unLkSGGwYNSJ1VGLNDLkziy6pINrxPSynS_tP5dt1-Xs1AZB319i-LOgebIF1y3FXVCS5KpdmAOgK82SiBTYx9zz-jpLL8Mdh8KLb1VlPhYLOzK97twGOmw_mxRyktuKqk1csU7w9us1Lmd2GwGWyajgX0RGYsLe76uAohDlnaUNjJjQ0pJOwGP9tWvNqDkNkFXSLePK295aGPoMj7vN_3azQvb8tH8cRLA5LtE5MtvasjA%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Defend the Constitution

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Help me train the next generation of leaders…
body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=11ce6cbd3fbc4f948452b6c914b40bd5&_e=yZpASHqLoLkHaaKk-zyIBarGBilpbsRk84e7vQGOgZ1Oj4izadUGYRkTttL9l0gnXzN4u60a9hPVOifGkEP5b7Hmd551VFxn6X2ur7CYXF6AHqB1JDZoBem4WalvtASsFQFAHihdPQQQtY9qcObBqeVIybRgV7IW58APv0QT0kkkWT0o07fraSxIrRPUON2Lx2Ynf5uUQ1O8QwhfzaMgpY1JWsAr997pJB9FAfBMUt2AZADkm5TL1pCIODoCt8rRYliVz7aUdpOf_pb_59M7ePIAEc4d8zqdq9vA4HjARB-PAXfW92_2ereXFI6dcPGxFY8n02eKGdi2A4_rSNIcYLYA-cfPezWFVwLLaRSv-WU%3D)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=11ce6cbd3fbc4f948452b6c914b40bd5&_e=yZpASHqLoLkHaaKk-zyIBarGBilpbsRk84e7vQGOgZ1Oj4izadUGYRkTttL9l0gnXzN4u60a9hPVOifGkEP5b7Hmd551VFxn6X2ur7CYXF6AHqB1JDZoBem4WalvtASsFQFAHihdPQQQtY9qcObBqeVIybRgV7IW58APv0QT0kkkWT0o07fraSxIrRPUON2Lx2Ynf5uUQ1O8QwhfzaMgpYB8hNmNBNey1SSlD76e28wf12uo-x1yaZgABOk_2hco3YhMWBw9jguVpqDyikywJrkMkPOWlxzz2F6KtHdoyVNa7ZbAyCcat_0bSlmbHdZP9Ejvut8HKKtNMKGNS7GwKjNl7q25HADiXxGwp4J3jHA%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=11ce6cbd3fbc4f948452b6c914b40bd5&_e=yZpASHqLoLkHaaKk-zyIBarGBilpbsRk84e7vQGOgZ1Oj4izadUGYRkTttL9l0gnXzN4u60a9hPVOifGkEP5b7Hmd551VFxn6X2ur7CYXF6AHqB1JDZoBem4WalvtASsFQFAHihdPQQQtY9qcObBqeVIybRgV7IW58APv0QT0kkkWT0o07fraSxIrRPUON2Lx2Ynf5uUQ1O8QwhfzaMgpfngWJvyEL4zA0Qii1OZi-9yhqgEgmEcDMhGRQ79LQwyjHWHh4GFjYY15FCkcICTdCnMfTIKs0CsSgGtfyLDl6MuE3Sh_Z200w7IbRWT79QY4S9X3jg1x9OLiXYkmZfDEuJJPv2dpxd-qzy7PbwxlHg%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=11ce6cbd3fbc4f948452b6c914b40bd5&_e=yZpASHqLoLkHaaKk-zyIBarGBilpbsRk84e7vQGOgZ1Oj4izadUGYRkTttL9l0gnXzN4u60a9hPVOifGkEP5b7Hmd551VFxn6X2ur7CYXF6AHqB1JDZoBem4WalvtASsFQFAHihdPQQQtY9qcObBqeVIybRgV7IW58APv0QT0kkkWT0o07fraSxIrRPUON2Lx2Ynf5uUQ1O8QwhfzaMgpchJy_y-Cz5BSTio1RFzYvHiXQovAj-01aFEXWg3gEWvjD224ZykQJC9G4EGuQ9xLQlgiS5VpmuGhk56cmyDj3egYG4ABQrCXXRUtrQwc0osMyiboyndQoUDb6tTeV5rDRUAUuBqis3kkdtXHu3_B90%3D)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

clean_body: Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. | | | Hi Fellow American, Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it. Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate. Best wishes, Riley Gaines P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you: From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org> Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM Subject: Did you see my announcement? Dear Friend, I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center. I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women. The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms. When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things. For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them. To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you. The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through: Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths. A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country. A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action. Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America. Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come. Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7353b3f1d59e7196a126b9df16f3b6dc9b602f367892b8a3db84f1fa4a1adee195a3a906f7265f2a7cdb591e583e104f5dc8c53dccea78b124a5efde9016d85f
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7353b3f1d59e719606dfd36010807874c78f5c8f4ba8a865da0a111dd7d0c057972aef4cea8a6e59ea1a0499c1e9414f90f0da96d300fa892afb3d913f785134

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7353b3f1d59e719606dfd36010807874c78f5c8f4ba8a865da0a111dd7d0c057972aef4cea8a6e59ea1a0499c1e9414f90f0da96d300fa892afb3d913f785134

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Begin the year with straight talk from the Savior
body:
[Unsubscribe]({{unsubscribeMessageTypeUrl}})
| | | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62559143:We-0PCiNE:m:1:2627245898:19AAB7A86F535744F2D5864B6A40FE1A:r)
---
Hello ,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
|
---
| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/2024-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62559143:We-0PCiNE:m:1:2627245898:19AAB7A86F535744F2D5864B6A40FE1A:r).

With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ , a great Christmas gift for anyone!

I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that.

I'm very thankful for your friendship with _Pathway to Victory_.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWe-0PCiNE). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWe-0PCiNE)

name: Colin Allred
subject: I was on the House floor when rioters breached the Capitol...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b56d78d-7a13-42bc-bacd-ed644f1c6664/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81655f9c-323c-4469-819a-52a110cb58f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I thought my days of putting people on the ground were over when I left the NFL. Then January 6th happened. I was on the House floor when rioters breached the Capitol, and I remember hearing the glass break and the shouts coming closer. As they pounded on the doors, I texted my wife Aly, who was seven months pregnant with our second son: “Whatever happens, I love you.” I took off my jacket and got ready to fight anyone who came through the door. Thankfully, it never came to that. And while I was barricaded on the House floor with my colleagues and our gas masks in hand, Ted Cruz – who had cheered on the mob earlier that day – hid in a supply closet. Ted Cruz’s false claims about the 2020 election helped incite the insurrection. That's Ted for you: All hat, no cattle. That day is one of many, many reasons I know Ted Cruz has got to go. People lost their lives, and our government came the closest it ever has to crumbling. His MAGA extremism is bad for Texas and our country, and it’s time to hold him accountable. [I’m running to replace Ted Cruz and give Texans the senator we deserve, and I hope you’ll help me do it, Peter. Will you donate now to me and Blue Amp Actin to help build our grassroots movement and defeat Ted Cruz once and for all? Any amount you can spare is truly appreciated. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te829be72-5742-4a44-b9dd-b3d50a218f63/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0ac15f28-eb2f-4887-ba47-21f97ea864cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c8fec94-a75d-45b0-a502-3d62a185e0b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a9dbfd2-15ab-4359-bcec-5299628937a4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24e9ba66-fd39-4257-9485-0d5c11839da7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc17755bd-3e94-4655-8e22-863a7c628460/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Then January 6th happened. I was on the House floor when rioters breached the Capitol, and I remember hearing the glass break and the shouts coming closer. As they pounded on the doors, I texted my wife Aly, who was seven months pregnant with our second son: “Whatever happens, I love you.” I took off my jacket and got ready to fight anyone who came through the door. Thankfully, it never came to that. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Unlocking the Untold Traits of the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d8cf4d2778494d9a84c874e8f6050b54&_e=nbKV-s9E11OcLddBzU0kj2qeUP9_uq6V-VZPj8S9C5QC60-sgvJ-JY_sG38CA7PWPO95LmxKiKkEGyhPgDg2nbykA61hoNeDgYqW8929aNDSEroNK_PIsE69RON2_fbC47Ri4l8CPjSeb1chgwaCGgED2IQKKAhNBOINWRKioI6tvo07EgCctifGob0n8NPXVR8hOQ7lZpFp8VguVoE5O6JJFoLX0O1h6Yl7mKikUEoPTZTIR7GmV-kQ_gdN0H3aF1B3R9vOOIB8ws6MermZaE_qwq5qYbwpaWt_jXQgrYRL_oj5VNUb-i1eiXXtkxPVkxaLuShbNBLVt_xVI714qauK__xb32UA1a4TVBVYdBh3Bzo8w4r9J-Sg0Cwd80ovUtqPM2QkdOBJpgybcO1P8A%3D%3D)

| | Dear Friend, [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d8cf4d2778494d9a84c874e8f6050b54&_e=nbKV-s9E11OcLddBzU0kj2qeUP9_uq6V-VZPj8S9C5QC60-sgvJ-JY_sG38CA7PWPO95LmxKiKkEGyhPgDg2nbykA61hoNeDgYqW8929aNDSEroNK_PIsE69RON2_fbC47Ri4l8CPjSeb1chgwaCGgED2IQKKAhNBOINWRKioI6tvo07EgCctifGob0n8NPXVR8hOQ7lZpFp8VguVoE5O6JJFoLX0O1h6Yl7mKikUEqqO6Oj-w18Da5l06QYIVEDYgcDAfj4M5IzdR4B21tV5zVLdcGJYmk6Y20RHiGZ3WF_2bh3bQ2JvDsnZqruPkOGSJoDwqZ-lpLGJhbGszaw-yECHoqKj4G9x2GZmpe6LaNZ_5dWVpfFEQlrkN2DweZmKNBV94sL-jMU15-iC7V71Q%3D%3D)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d8cf4d2778494d9a84c874e8f6050b54&_e=nbKV-s9E11OcLddBzU0kj2qeUP9_uq6V-VZPj8S9C5QC60-sgvJ-JY_sG38CA7PWPO95LmxKiKkEGyhPgDg2nbykA61hoNeDgYqW8929aNDSEroNK_PIsE69RON2_fbC47Ri4l8CPjSeb1chgwaCGgED2IQKKAhNBOINWRKioI6tvo07EgCctifGob0n8NPXVR8hOQ7lZpFp8VguVoE5O6JJFoLX0O1h6Yl7mKikUEo95wG3Lmv3M59Z6hdkAReokhzhctA5DMT34em2PP68Au5XwrJjM5q4Sox1ncdBS9CmzkV9itp25HkqnWod_qnxMwm3aoK9UtP52LTr0cgpVOI86beImSYFwPHjAMCuqREIX4U_aJ40Bl90vvaDEoivqUqSghkEFrrUDVCDubo2SQ%3D%3D)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d8cf4d2778494d9a84c874e8f6050b54&_e=nbKV-s9E11OcLddBzU0kj2qeUP9_uq6V-VZPj8S9C5QC60-sgvJ-JY_sG38CA7PWPO95LmxKiKkEGyhPgDg2nbykA61hoNeDgYqW8929aNDSEroNK_PIsE69RON2_fbC47Ri4l8CPjSeb1chgwaCGgED2IQKKAhNBOINWRKioI6tvo07EgCctifGob0n8NPXVR8hOQ7lZpFp8VguVoE5O6JJFoLX0O1h6Yl7mKikUErnrPTywmEy3Aytz9Li2YsjyAzeuw40Y0FMG8BtRUkDaz4HKuayuEcAPDxCdIz_w3W2QjEJ-NY-0-7eE7U9wtA2c4A6tq1hLzuFMzB0eY8otvXnhUUtHMO-hkHQzdhguLf4l2sUdeQyKHgea6OjZBrRMX2JYaOKYJl9rmrdm4qGHw%3D%3D)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305

body:
Worth your time | | | | | |
---
[](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=8ae9586a1f&e=b2e0e42b55)
|

Peter,
Today is the Army/Navy football game. They’ve been doing this game every year since 1945. It’s truly historic - and a celebration of our nation’s military. My kids and I have the honor of being down here today to take in the game and be with some of our nation’s heroes. The company I helped start, Heritage Gear, has allowed me the privilege of being down here with my kids. They even met NFL legend Rob Gronkowski:
[](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=484894c8d8&e=b2e0e42b55)
I’ve emailed you a few times about my Heritage Gear’s Flag bag. They were [featured on Fox News](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=416cd18d84&e=b2e0e42b55) and make the ultimate present this Christmas. These hand-crafted totes and weekenders make the ultimate gift this Christmas season. I hope [you’ll check them out and use my code HOLIDAY2023](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=1de9dcdc2d&e=b2e0e42b55) for 25% off. [Click here](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=cb67458575&e=b2e0e42b55) or the graphic below to get these bags or bags of your favorite team:
[](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=7535575960&e=b2e0e42b55)
What sets these bags apart is not just their stylish design but the commitment to unparalleled quality and craftsmanship. Each bag is a testament to the enduring spirit of America, and I am proud to endorse a product that reflects the values we hold dear. They truly are heirlooms that last a lifetime.
[Take advantage of this discoun](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=cb5be94030&e=b2e0e42b55)t and give a patriotic gift that your friends and family won’t soon forget. You can also get a gift for the ultimate football fan in your life. I hope you’ll take in the Army/Navy game today. It’s a great American tradition.

In Freedom,
Matt Birk

| Vote Trump! We do not have a country without a secure border. We the people are less safe at the local, state, and federal level because of dangerous anti-American Biden policies. The enemy is not at the gate, the enemy is through the gate. Our military must be merit based (remove CRT), have the best equipment, and the best training.
Under Biden we have:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Total communication – Mississippi’s conversative voice
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/totalcommunication?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**If you're reading this, you’re in good company; last week, 18,471 people opened and read the Mississippi Center for Public Policy’s weekly Saturday email.**

Of the 82,000 or so individuals that have signed up to receive this message, 22 percent on average actually open and read it each week. Overwhelmingly, they're in Mississippi (Being a new arrival in this great state, I won’t hold it against you if you aren’t!).

**This graph captures some of that email audience growth:**
---
|
---
_Monthly readership each November over the past four years._
| The audience for our long running podcast has taken off too, and our YouTube audience keeps growing.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=70d67e3834&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click above to listen to our podcast!_
|
---
_Monthly podcast listens_
| We also placed dozens of opinion columns in multiple state, national and international publications this year.
---
|
---
| **Why does having a mass audience matter? **

We exist to advance the cause of liberty. Our mission is to help create a climate of opinion, as Milton Friedman very nearly said, so that “even the wrong politicians have to do the right thing”.

There are no shortage of progressive media organizations in Mississippi and America only too willing to spin false narratives, and present it as the news. **On everything from school choice to tax cuts, free speech to Israel, progressive activists - masquerading as journalists - can always be counted on to misrepresent. **

**That is why having you read our email is so important. It allows us to connect with you directly about the changes Mississippi and America needs.** I hope that you might share emails that you agree with, with friends and family to ensure that they too can be part of an honest conversation about how to improve our state.

Thank you for reading my Saturday emails, and thank you for being part of a wider movement to advance the cause of liberty in Mississippi and America!

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=bada8d9b01&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=7ea574c2ce) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=7ea574c2ce).

_Copyright © 2023 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._

subject: Unseat Do-Nothing Legislators
body:
If there’s one thing Americans agree on politically, it’s that our leaders aren’t getting enough done. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/carolynrushforcongress/problem-solving-9426896?e=420896fe25)
---
,
If there’s one thing Americans agree on politically, it’s that **our leaders aren’t getting enough done**. From the fear of looming government shutdowns to wasting time expelling a liar from their ill-gotten post or setting a dress code, it’s clear**we need legislators who will cut through the gridlock.**
New Jersey’s Second Congressional District is currently represented by **one of these do-nothing legislators** \- Jeff Van Drew. Jeff thinks the loudest voice is the most effective, but he has yet to pass _any_ meaningful legislation.
I’m Carolyn Rush. I’m a Democrat, a mother of 5, and a long-time engineer running to unseat Jeff Van Drew and use my problem-solving skills to give our district and country **the leader they deserve.**
| [DONATE TO A CANDIDATE WHO WILL GET THINGS DONE](https://carolynrushforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866b1e87ca5aa4116782b6220&id=ece9c35912&e=420896fe25)
---
I’ve made a career of getting things done as an engineer and manager for 30 years. I’ve made my success by cutting through the noise and division to deliver actual solutions that work for all of us.
[](https://carolynrushforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866b1e87ca5aa4116782b6220&id=40140380a0&e=420896fe25)
Whether it’s working to create an economy that works for all of us, navigating common sense gun reforms, or ensuring the right to reproductive healthcare, **I have the knowledge and vision to solve our problems in a way that benefits ALL OF US.**
| [CHIP IN TODAY TO HELP ELECT A PROBLEM SOLVER READY TO BRING CHANGE TO D.C.](https://carolynrushforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866b1e87ca5aa4116782b6220&id=0c9ace547f&e=420896fe25)
---
With hope for America,
Carolyn Rush
