name: Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
subject: Release the Kennedy Assassination Files
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Who killed President John F. Kennedy?

|
---
| | | **Who killed President John F. Kennedy?
**
---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=k_files_12_8_23_email_1rs_1_nd&n=1)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=k_files_12_8_23_email_1rs_1_nd&n=2)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=k_files_12_8_23_email_1rs_1_nd&n=3)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
Who killed President John F. Kennedy?
The 1992 Kennedy Records Assassination Act mandated the release of all records related to the JFK assassination by 2017.
Trump refused to release the records.
Biden refused to release the records.
What is so embarrassing that the CIA is afraid to show the American public 60 years later?
Many people suspect the CIA itself was directly involved in the assassination. There is certainly good reason to think so.
JFK fired CIA Chief Allen Dulles, refused to back it up in the Bay of Pigs, and defied its wishes all over the world.
I myself suspect the CIA was involved, but whether or not that is true, the American people deserve to see these files. In a democracy, the government doesn’t keep secrets from the people to protect itself.
Releasing the full, unredacted historical records will help to restore the all-time LOW TRUST in government institutions.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=k_files_12_8_23_email_1rs_1_nd&n=4)
---
|
---
If you agree that the CIA should comply with the law, and release the JFK assassination records, then add your name to our [Release the Records Petition to President Joe Biden](https://jfkfiles.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=k_files_12_8_23_email_1rs_1_nd&n=5).
Your signature will be added to that of hundreds of thousands of others who are demanding the TRUTH BE TOLD.
Your signature, along with your city and state, will represent WE THE PEOPLE to President Biden. Your signature will represent an outcry for honesty! So please sign our [Release the Records Petition to President Joe Biden](https://jfkfiles.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=k_files_12_8_23_email_1rs_1_nd&n=6) today.
In the spirit of transparency, in the spirit of democracy, we, the undersigned, call upon President Biden to obey the 1992 act and release the Kennedy assassination documents to the public.
Your signature will put added pressure on the Military Industrial Complex and President Joe Biden to tell America, and the world, the truth about the Kennedy Assassination.
| |
---
---
Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
P.S. — The New American just published a report, _“The Deep State & The Kennedy Assassination,”_ and said, _“While the official narrative of the Kennedy Assassination is that a shooter Lee Harvey Oswald acted alone, it’s more likely that Kennedy was taken out by the Deep State.”_ The fact is we don’t know for sure. But we should. Add your name today to our [Release the Records Petition to President Joe Biden](https://jfkfiles.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=k_files_12_8_23_email_1rs_1_nd&n=7) to find out the TRUTH.
|
---

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=k_files_12_8_23_email_1rs_1_nd&n=9) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=h1LOxbVy26ImgEbXJVo-ZdMp9-e17RgxqtIk69rUIjeOqT1-oa6z7jeUAIaHEF2m&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=k_files_12_8_23_email_1rs_1_nd&n=10) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=k_files_12_8_23_email_1rs_1_nd&n=11) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=k_files_12_8_23_email_1rs_1_nd&n=12) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzI54ka0wzIYPxyZaEWdcWSHecUzjTC_26r6_PMq84pDYNHmKWp713umpU1ZYCPsJg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=k_files_12_8_23_email_1rs_1_nd&n=13)

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Respectfully asking for $3 this morning, before our FEC deadline in just over three weeks.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
If we report a bad number after this deadline, more attack ads could come.
#

Peter:
We’re writing to ask if you can choose today to make your first online contribution of $3 to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate in Arizona.
And we really hope you do.
Because in just over three weeks, we close the books on the most important FEC fundraising deadline of this campaign so far. That’s New Year's Eve, December 31st.
And when it’s over, we’re legally required to report not just how much money we’ve raised, but how many donations we’ve received to make up that total. Everyone will know.
Kari Lake and the GOP are ramping up the pressure now, and we saw the first attack ad of the cycle drop last month.
If we report a bad number after this deadline, more attack ads could come.
So we need as many of our supporters as possible to chip in and show the strength of this campaign. We’ve set a goal of 50,000 donations by the 31st. But the only way we’ll get there is if you’re willing to make your donation today:
[**Can you please make that $3 contribution to Ruben Gallego’s re-election campaign today? We’re getting so close to this FEC deadline and it all adds up when we all chip in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec23.csjDeB&refcode=em231209-1&t=1&akid=1533%2E734936%2EaoBIUc)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join Me in Standing Up for Women’s Sports and American Values
body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e19c5e8e3e5448d2aeb3dd2b360f419f&_e=IggheIToAwmPKIVuKKPxA9MXVrfsq5HUzn-PmsS8SFO5jwaRrPUY9yGOAcqqXBBrqOXI1kwXEud4IzJPFKKqnxr-CQTDteUanQnoK5eksMyzcHL2cxYDGFvHtckMeX4t1eNPZJurnZSkN06YvNI03iVwt2AB8kKoLZLv8ynITXCyJdtPr6QEfSoIyiuqTQWNPmrKBbSIqfOzB9X3IzoZHK9-XRgItOFng-RRZ7Ii2mEIvcZLeQQyGX1HKzFD1QiW-McoIPfby1ZfGs8nqZEgEX5m_eEXYqva4Dnk5O0SsZ5uHWXbUErXHU8Qpq5wmqtCcSDaYyADVU5Mxr6pfivil1aTh36uSMk_4FePuZGCIRk%3D)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e19c5e8e3e5448d2aeb3dd2b360f419f&_e=IggheIToAwmPKIVuKKPxA9MXVrfsq5HUzn-PmsS8SFO5jwaRrPUY9yGOAcqqXBBrqOXI1kwXEud4IzJPFKKqnxr-CQTDteUanQnoK5eksMyzcHL2cxYDGFvHtckMeX4t1eNPZJurnZSkN06YvNI03iVwt2AB8kKoLZLv8ynITXCyJdtPr6QEfSoIyiuqTQWNPmrKBbSIqfOzB9X3IzoZHFRRh3OhTJCzy8K20Qtng_eVq9_udoh1Ai29KtMFahFsFzFBWxOWqzBjtTy23DKvNhgyuCRt0Frb2UCguTjZjgBKRo7OXIzRXPgB6f6NfA33kegHFHxvuEm3xQvOA5KMZqtXsKqpLcE_TIB5OWNED7s%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e19c5e8e3e5448d2aeb3dd2b360f419f&_e=IggheIToAwmPKIVuKKPxA9MXVrfsq5HUzn-PmsS8SFO5jwaRrPUY9yGOAcqqXBBrqOXI1kwXEud4IzJPFKKqnxr-CQTDteUanQnoK5eksMyzcHL2cxYDGFvHtckMeX4t1eNPZJurnZSkN06YvNI03iVwt2AB8kKoLZLv8ynITXCyJdtPr6QEfSoIyiuqTQWNPmrKBbSIqfOzB9X3IzoZHMrTIn5drh10OCAQ2T0M7GN5CX1-cHaLXb5mPgLIlZ0YDlWP63d7IH4OxYWlLXTPe32LRK-Bu0wDVGtaxjUzQUwo7st7-BVJUtW-u1WOdtecN-jqlTlA5jvtg6LqEmynQklnw3QuU_5H_jAKCQh9Xz4%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e19c5e8e3e5448d2aeb3dd2b360f419f&_e=IggheIToAwmPKIVuKKPxA9MXVrfsq5HUzn-PmsS8SFO5jwaRrPUY9yGOAcqqXBBrqOXI1kwXEud4IzJPFKKqnxr-CQTDteUanQnoK5eksMyzcHL2cxYDGFvHtckMeX4t1eNPZJurnZSkN06YvNI03iVwt2AB8kKoLZLv8ynITXCyJdtPr6QEfSoIyiuqTQWNPmrKBbSIqfOzB9X3IzoZHGMNZtjh_SpWqW5xIvlVe5njRr-FtFvr26fGNBekpMh0Z34eoUu2AzP5FAuiBI3-usZsASLySX0fEj1SY5FYU4lwaCKws7Hw6JTprQho-Ap5tswV6rBcfgXc9_2pueXS6mg7jZ4m7CVDni1WUBZpyHc%3D)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

December is the last chance we have this year to showcase our Party's strength heading into 2024. But I'll be honest with you, Fellow American. This is a notoriously difficult fundraising month, _and I 'm afraid we're already pacing behind our target goal._

Missing this goal could seriously complicate our efforts to take back the White House. If we come up short, we may not be able to stop Biden from securing another four-year term.

clean_body: We need your help to keep up. Fellow American, I'm coming to you as one of the most respected Patriots in your city. December is the last chance we have this year to showcase our Party's strength heading into 2024. But I'll be honest with you, Fellow American. This is a notoriously difficult fundraising month, and I 'm afraid we're already pacing behind our target goal. Missing this goal could seriously complicate our efforts to take back the White House. If we come up short, we may not be able to stop Biden from securing another four-year term. That's why I'm coming to you with an urgent personal request. SUPPORTER: YOU CONTRIBUTION STATUS: PENDING DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT Democrats are funded by their dark money billionaire donors. The Republican Party is powered by grassroots Patriots like YOU, Fellow American. Thank you and God bless, Ronna McDaniel Chairwoman, Republican National Committee

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Thoughts when I leave DC
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPP4UMuwuVRNqveCSx_C8Tr_WxqvRITVpicMjAc_gyJEIM3DdDCQrY-1raRGt_p4TJHZtX6Y9dNqCn77JTlF1e1AN6NtqZpBzZshWA0CI5V_8hrubuxocqnVeGmDH651F_ojekh_vYPS8Zir7wEbeVlgXOf23sSUPAAPd-ULtJURH3o-dEn6kG5gwAP1aGYfKvhDvaQbuKZa8QVnB1H8bwDU6eGXUH4jAxVPVqOSmz8XzrtcbdbhAAysh9kuAUGs6p2y6m8G2QqtNyJ9iyKp9jWj2S_VdscsxOZrY6Lfd-KR6QQ3p7TuCLC1at5IaMdwKqiKiRkGqhtx4RLHGEmOCUx-E8fBwqwkU5c_wZWnMz1zPU/41z/tfZZbrAZQOiUTolbPNw-Nw/h0/3Q9ZX1OJ-z1U1FacwqhQIJLDm9TWt7u8NWc3-ZvgaCo)
---
Peter, Sometimes, it’s nice to get away from Washington. To get away from the extreme politics of today, and back to my home district around real people who just want to get to know each other and rally around each other’s challenges. I was born and raised here in Rockford. Like you, I’m not a career politician. I’m just a guy who cares about Northern and Western Illinois, our families, our neighbors, and our world. Ultimately, in our district and around the country, we want the same things, like for working families to live in safe neighborhoods with reliable infrastructure, affordable goods, and quality jobs. And it’s not easy in this environment of hate and division that extremists promote, but we have to always keep focus on the ones doing the work, not those yelling the loudest. Coming home clarifies that, just like it’s clear that the most important work I do happens here at home.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPNYjaSf0HiRB1luFcP1Zl2QM0_G6omjTvrVV6311ybJtfWr2Z92Jo9JxGwe3u5sAtXHFOfXPi2id8eS-YYz7Tb7IIofZSGQYHgrNqyXayF48CMjGTBL0rvMc9D527wXf2Ar7lWt2dPIeinH9_fmBDj-rBuST1uMP2uiK5O4NCQlHT4sXx4iwTG-Bw9TJiDfM2zKX1GrSnQDDzuaEMkcycTAeNpasbtUFqTR3umr3NY2pGpUcie78dZmY7f-9k1kDSR8SSA-HxCjMcMjF8aAhuYqDhG2VMSa1tRHha9BGi1D2YKt8LSotquZuS23qisPKdOlRmgkmnrJ1TQFwyypsxsaI6trTpAV6jRu9BuEB73c40SzcLQ5SAyu5m848zzmpA/41z/tfZZbrAZQOiUTolbPNw-Nw/h1/zDgkie9I6FZpNYcDt8rxkp0HDKA5VbbJkhXNUPHXTDY)
---
Getting outside of politics always makes clear there are way more good people than bad. And that our best days are when we work together to solve problems, not rip each other apart over our differences. When I’m back home, I come back energized in the belief of our communities, and remain driven by these truths:
---
We can respect one another. We can allow people to make their own decisions on how to be happy and healthy. We can work together to solve real problems. We _will_ solve real issues with relationships and hard work.
---
[**I'm in Congress to bridge the gaps of hate and create change. But the truth is we're expecting to get pummeled by Republican super PACs seeking to divide our community using nasty, misleading attacks. IL-17 will be the tightest race in Illinois, and I could use your help - ahead of our final public deadline of the year. clean_body: | | Peter, Sometimes, it’s nice to get away from Washington. To get away from the extreme politics of today, and back to my home district around real people who just want to get to know each other and rally around each other’s challenges. I was born and raised here in Rockford. Like you, I’m not a career politician. I’m just a guy who cares about Northern and Western Illinois, our families, our neighbors, and our world. Ultimately, in our district and around the country, we want the same things, like for working families to live in safe neighborhoods with reliable infrastructure, affordable goods, and quality jobs. And it’s not easy in this environment of hate and division that extremists promote, but we have to always keep focus on the ones doing the work, not those yelling the loudest. Coming home clarifies that, just like it’s clear that the most important work I do happens here at home. | Getting outside of politics always makes clear there are way more good people than bad. And that our best days are when we work together to solve problems, not rip each other apart over our differences. When I’m back home, I come back energized in the belief of our communities, and remain driven by these truths: We can respect one another. We can allow people to make their own decisions on how to be happy and healthy. We can work together to solve real problems. We will solve real issues with relationships and hard work. Always thankful to be given the honor to serve the good people of our community. \- Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. Peter,

We’ve seen all that Senator Hawley has done not just for Missouri, but for America.

While other Senators have bent the knee to the radical Left, Josh has always stood his ground.

He’s taken on the swamp on both sides of the aisle- and that means he’s _seriously_ under attack as he fights to keep his Senate seat in 2024.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: re: The only Palestinian American in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Have you heard about the Michigan U.S. Senate and congressional candidates
who’ve been offered between $10 and $20 million to run against me? All
because I’ve been outspoken for a permanent ceasefire.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231209-rt.XV9TUy&refcode=em20231209-32233&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=32233%2E1203867%2EZjA_Gc ]Please split a donation to my re-election campaign and Justice
Democrats now to counter the special interests spending millions of
dollars to defeat me, the only Palestinian American in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231209-rt.XV9TUy&refcode=em20231209-32233&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1020&akid=32233%2E1203867%2EZjA_Gc ]Contribute $3

Right now, we’re seeing a rise in hate crimes against Muslims, Arabs, and
Palestinians. Last week, three Palestinian students were shot in
Vermont—one, Hisham Awartani, may never walk again.[1] In a statement,
Hisham said: “This hideous crime did not happen in a vacuum.”

Hisham is right. We must speak out against this hate and dehumanization of
our communities, which we hear on cable news networks and in the halls of
Congress. I will continue to push my colleagues in Congress to see
Palestinians as human beings who deserve rights, freedom, and dignity just
as much as Israelis do.

As the only Palestinian American in Congress, my voice is needed now more
than ever. Arab Americans, Muslim Americans, and Palestinian Americans
must be heard and recognized in our government.

The vast majority of Americans support a permanent ceasefire, but that’s
not reflected in Congress. In a move that would undermine the democratic
will of the American people, the right-wing group AIPAC plans to spend
over $100 million to try to unseat me and several other progressive
members of Congress who are leading the push for a ceasefire.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231209-rt.XV9TUy&refcode=em20231209-32233&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=32233%2E1203867%2EZjA_Gc ]Please donate today to have my back as I face attacks for demanding a
permanent ceasefire. As the only Palestinian American in Congress, I will
keep working to end oppression everywhere and to protect all people—no
matter their faith or ethnicity.

Thank you.

In solidarity,

Rashida

[1] [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140284?t=1022&akid=32233%2E1203867%2EZjA_Gc ]1 of 3 Palestinian students shot in Vermont may never walk again
after bullet hit his spine, his mother says

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231209-32233-footer&t=1023&refcode2=32233_1203867_ZjA_Gc&akid=32233%2E1203867%2EZjA_Gc

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=32233%2E1203867%2EZjA_Gc

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a. to request fewer emails. Click here to . | |

clean_body: THE SUPREME COURT MUST RESTORE MY FREE SPEECH. | | | | Friend, In the midst of a presidential election, the LEADING contender to win back the White House has been GAGGED and CENSORED by the ruling party’s Department of “Justice.” As I said in my speech last weekend, the single greatest threat to American democracy is the man who occupies the White House – Crooked Joe Biden. And now, he’s attempting to take away my First Amendment right to speak out against his attacks on our democracy. Biden’s Democrats are allowed to viciously attack me, but my right to respond has been ripped from my hands. We are quickly becoming a country where telling the TRUTH is a CRIME. That’s why I will appeal to the U.S. Supreme Court to restore my First Amendment rights and to set a precedent to protect YOURS. | Thank you, | Donald J. | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8RmSf6JIaNyoXjQSvXKeSnZgav7_xS6etYKmgA0_G3gmTItJfRl_ybCKWt1wm2nCX3ejvk6uNw6kBamP86FK5maBFCU7TRNQhjaDvmczyvJ5OF1-l3s9bF10nhCcbIuJYTI5ctgOE0I9jfkg0Cg5BduzHvZ329BECH6kUatlnVzrL44398oLrBi5eUKac9cKd4x1WWyAj1CjUpizWpb_mKuqnanCPXo8_4OczJ3MRPsQANeufToPck6r-OG7QPlQU7rv7xIrNkp0PtsP2ypeP8BCE6nf13wIUTkzLaW_pcyLyRYmwKmmWwteJpYgDNXF7J2ldKNYkvwWgQlXAO6RYog/41z/IKpXkzS3TsaUFKrx_u-QwA/h0/H4rve-_BEIslLKtFOZ55ZknJzS1ZAkPOe6PwiuY2ZW4)
| | **TODAY is Election Day!** Three of our endorsed candidates need you support today in Houston as they fight to win three critical races for the city. This could be history in the making...

[Help us put more TCP-endorsed Black leaders by donating $10 to our Houston runoff fund today!](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZ1yEzpcrM0Cu-j8imQl9YUty_YZCiQTHirsYTeIiQMQYdVyhXQLexI-qDxOVjHiv_OOGsKxnw7MsS4PqSz7B3qf7yDcDP5RT2a26kZHCE1j5Ip5PFYWHos_ELA68wIYwV3P3-4ZMMYSvEKIl-y_nneMWYwyff3sKU4pg7u9at1NOxgw5LNU9TUO-feyUaWmdIWzrtTPG0MYi_LEaheD7q5MTwXfL6mP5FqGU0ytaxqShS4bltAws8jlcQx9uYkOc_Rj3hMKKZMqtAQg16CMbrcp_cMZWzt2VcjoqY5PGpCt3gu1CKeX6dSjhm5rRwUgzQ95IAgnrYKgFF6ZkPYULSZSDV0kCkHJ4QBydE0hB0vkmE-JGuJfbxpG_EpH84TP2B/41z/IKpXkzS3TsaUFKrx_u-QwA/h1/3CAe990BWSMFsOz_Slm61oDcrP3-YrSbCyxcU2OripI) | | [CHIP IN!](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZY4kz5O8wXB9hohHj-tRc90tqREUsKxPeCMY5Y_Ynqw1EFJrB6WEzE1Sl4PW3CT5-s1wSfZHn_5DIL_80MUOT4JJVb34bUYtRzgnW2cknF53-2O4dTUUiqSj0WTlbtVEJscjhUN82pSaqATTmqoWE2qrOZfDIv7TMua4KkJ_TdlrPOk6PvixRFSRrJPnuPEDJknO4_kdJBP_UQ8Z9AQulUVV4PWGXLAhGWQdc6hKTGKfx-RfyDoeghVzlsc9fHIXQi1mZs_CLkFTw7vqdR-ZM6Q2FP1dZpVZr_epKpmwwou8LbSJDiYyDE0dVH8lVDunDcUnM9855VvCtDww0DgANkTXvhacW0S0vzHl3MgHX8LUJ_YcIdslSQFD-c0BEmm0o/41z/IKpXkzS3TsaUFKrx_u-QwA/h2/e1lhE_AdBsVIe9vW-7-Y-wKp-tsO_IATYbPrdHmYAe4)
---
* * *
Peter,

On Election Day just a few weeks back, TCP-endorsed candidates fought for their respective seats nationwide. **The results called for a runoff in three crucial races in Houston, TX, on December 9th.**

We need to get more Black representation into office, and this runoff is the perfect opportunity. But we can’t do it alone. We need help from our grassroots supporters like you, Peter. [Will you help us put more TCP-endorsed Black leaders into critical seats by donating $10 to our Houston runoff fund today?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRct0wTpiBV2DY6Oz846aOQs-lIfMwx8B1QQg8OiXp8g9aCZxpaoZ3E31semB8Qcb6mNSoZ2F9LMd5zGFjDFnU27QEMiEpL_dNRXFubJO8uerc-mhez9wtOqQnqhGhqXf7zvqI_-ZmtNk1g7UVMERkKU6YPhHjuyqty0rkZ9YA4Qw3irGf6yNsfYvV7aAnHP2eWKUIaknuUGANgPG2Iqa7BjeS6-BgyrSPoDATwfjllLlJeaPqwWchlBXpjacokdzhaVCDYvE8Diw_Jg84GYaFr5E2tzkAbn54StkyXHA0CuT2RjaHAUsQrJJmsMNI40jAPBENBTXMN_gfRin2KkmN_arOtAhwYZINOewWgIWG5xH1zDrLNh883SWs1_uufRJE/41z/IKpXkzS3TsaUFKrx_u-QwA/h3/MHPfErmtFjHIaJxs0FeX3hFqIlXf0EuM02PluoNTeK0)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | TODAY is Election Day! Three of our endorsed candidates need you support today in Houston as they fight to win three critical races for the city. This could be history in the making... | | Peter, On Election Day just a few weeks back, TCP-endorsed candidates fought for their respective seats nationwide. The results called for a runoff in three crucial races in Houston, TX, on December 9th. We need to get more Black representation into office, and this runoff is the perfect opportunity. But we can’t do it alone. We need help from our grassroots supporters like you, Peter. | Who are we fighting for? you may ask. Well, let us introduce you: Letitia Plummer for City Council, Sheila Jackson Lee for Mayor, and Chris Hollins for Controller. We need to keep our candidates’ opponents out of office, with their conservative stances such as putting more police on our streets and implementing harsher sentences–neither of which make our communities safer. subject: As we'd say in the Army: This is some weak sh*t

body:
There's no satisfying power-hungry bullies like Putin. If he conquers Ukraine, it will only embolden him. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74855585/442858837/-1209416704?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231209_fr_ukraineaid_cand_mf_30da_hdr2_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmM3YmU3My05ZTk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EHL9RRduBvBBag5Y2cpqtrMrwVGGjJrsVFUVvNC4_no=)
---
As someone who has defended freedom and democracy on our soil and abroad, I have to say one thing, co-pilots: **We cannot and must not allow Vladimir Putin to win in Ukraine.** We know from history there's no satisfying power-hungry bullies like Putin. If he conquers Ukraine, it will only embolden him. That is why I'm horrified that congressional Republicans are blocking critical aid to Ukraine. If they do not pass a bill this month, funding to Ukraine will run out, giving Putin a clear path to victory. I wish I could say I'm shocked. But as we've seen from Brian Fitzpatrick's Republican party again and again – their weak leadership means letting MAGA run amok. And it's endangering all of us. When I was a commander in the Army, I learned exactly how to stand up to bullies like Putin and how to get my troops in line. **That's the same strength I'll bring to the halls of Congress.** And with this latest crisis over aid to Ukraine, it's clear how desperately we need strong leaders right now. [I can't get there without your help, though, co-pilots. So, if you're tired of seeing MAGA Republicans hurt our national security and get away with it, please pitch in $10 or whatever you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74855594/442858849/-1209416704?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231209_fr_ukraineaid_cand_mf_30da_hdr2_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmM3YmU3My05ZTk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EHL9RRduBvBBag5Y2cpqtrMrwVGGjJrsVFUVvNC4_no=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

subject: A Commando Needs to Talk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=695196144bbd4ee3bd075b07c96bf763&_e=mjd2Uzw6B2IHIpjaA9m1pWeNSAqDnHUFveZDtf3UkhLT5UFtHNXsFVK-8u2jCERRsCd_PSFKaOUX6nhWlTUxCrheb7IV970Qxz3ml3KCx-UjlUY-GJor4ERKl-OHI4vB93ulonuCITnQaP17uY_I_s0CLZ-6i5v95rK0B_429s8c-Zg9NyKJ6ACtIN4Q0ybROCPdy0GM9q70fkjRKsWsFh_IHAT-p91mShUwz6k0RMvXRgeGNmdGE_-IGrKxswKWEvh4L3SI91FyQpz1BIHmNw7sKilrVnvJSbJpb1nzFns-qOQfBmE5Qi9JO7dItKxspM5kESvaZLq8qbkveBseuhpmucAbdPH9f92-UoUHU1bJh-OWVJpDas1hrdgd32Kkxb9xqd6NKG_sFZvpAcjIJg%3D%3D)

Fellow American,
---
**_Urgent Message from a U.S. Special Forces Commando:_** I didn’t serve my country in grueling special ops combat missions just to have an incompetent president in the White House call me a “threat to democracy”. If you think that Biden is the most anti-veteran President in history, I need you to keep reading. My name is Pat Harrigan. I’m a former Green Beret who graduated from West Point, I’m running for Congress in a MUST-WIN race in North Carolina, and I’m ready to battle the radical-left mob that’s holding our country hostage.

Trust me when I say this: they aren’t taking my announcement lightly. **[The opposition is doubling-down on wiping me off the map this election.](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=695196144bbd4ee3bd075b07c96bf763&_e=mjd2Uzw6B2IHIpjaA9m1pWeNSAqDnHUFveZDtf3UkhLT5UFtHNXsFVK-8u2jCERRsCd_PSFKaOUX6nhWlTUxCrheb7IV970Qxz3ml3KCx-UjlUY-GJor4ERKl-OHI4vB93ulonuCITnQaP17uY_I_s0CLZ-6i5v95rK0B_429s8c-Zg9NyKJ6ACtIN4Q0ybROCPdy0GM9q70fkjRKsWsFh_IHAT-p91mShUwz6k0RMvXRgeGNmdGE_-IGrKxswKWuzH9aFkVqM0Tcdbh76APpGcqdK3H7QFwlXb_V2QBrhCXxj5VyWBw1hsgLRydS3Q4S3gxZZjJokHxhTcBrS5yxt0EQRPV3piP3Bhgj73-STKqc4aEOSUNXH6Dd7m56y7WluchbT9C5-7J8CLlJpowZw%3D%3D)** Biden has begun rallying a gang of shadow billionaires to pump-up the Democrats’ numbers in North Carolina. I’m bogged down by their attacks and NEED reinforcements. I don’t have DC cronies with bottomless checkbooks. All I have are grassroots folks like you to keep my neck above the water. I hate asking for help, I’m a Green Beret after all, but you know just as well as me the kind of dirty tricks the Democrats are willing to pull off ot win. **Can I count on seeing a contribution from you?**
---
[**CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT HERE**](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=695196144bbd4ee3bd075b07c96bf763&_e=mjd2Uzw6B2IHIpjaA9m1pWeNSAqDnHUFveZDtf3UkhLT5UFtHNXsFVK-8u2jCERRsCd_PSFKaOUX6nhWlTUxCrheb7IV970Qxz3ml3KCx-UjlUY-GJor4ERKl-OHI4vB93ulonuCITnQaP17uY_I_s0CLZ-6i5v95rK0B_429s8c-Zg9NyKJ6ACtIN4Q0ybROCPdy0GM9q70fkjRKsWsFh_IHAT-p91mShUwz6k0RMvXRgeGNmdGE_-IGrKxswKWygfLq5Gj4-xkQnjI2EQQcn9e5CsBKobPL94VpX6edEfiGiwgaOLIbVvu9MUMF2RuPvWcBd-wiHcvzlfAcmYI2XiEHf9tJbLutJQQWikITDo1ebVAQOHtSCDAGJ83hMwymtvBDYMaxl_kk0_O0djNpQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American, these people won’t stop the onslaught until folks like you and I stand up for conservative values. I’ll give you my word as a combat veteran that I’ll fight with all I have to do what’s right & make our country proud again.
---
Thank you and God Bless,
---

I’ll give you my word as a combat veteran that I’ll fight with all I have to do what’s right & make our country proud again. Thank you and God Bless, Pat Harrigan | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. body:

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: I’m officially running for re-election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
My roots in this district run deep.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74858930/442871387/-701443660?refcode=BLU-VFC-20231209-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGE5N2U5Zi1hMzk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SU0AV2zJPp-mmKuuigPKOM0iTTwfYkEeNFoRkHV4SBo=)
---
| Peter,

I’m officially running for re-election in NC’s 4th Congressional District.

My roots in this district run deep. I ran for office after years of service to my community – advocating for North Carolina families on the Chapel Hill-Carrboro Schools Board to the Orange County Board of Commissioners, to serving in the North Carolina state House and then state Senate.

In Congress, I’ve remained steadfast in my commitment to prevent gun violence, ensure access to abortion care, and take action to protect our planet from climate change. The urgency of these issues cannot be understated.
---
| | _“Congresswoman Foushee is a bold, progressive fighter for her constituents who has championed access to abortion, Medicare for All, the Green New Deal and many other progressive priorities. We need her continued leadership in the House and for the 4th District. We’re proud to endorse Congresswoman Foushee’s re-election to continue her work on behalf of the people of North Carolina’s 4th congressional district.”_

**Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC Co-Chairs Pramila Jayapal, Mark Pocan, and Jamie Raskin**
---
Tandem with these issues is the need to fortify our voting rights, fight against egregious partisan gerrymandering, and defend our democracy. The uncertainty of voting rights in the past year and even in the past month here in North Carolina confirms my job is far from over.

We’ve made incredible progress this year. I’m proud to have three critical voting rights bills in committee and to be a member of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force.

As the Republican party veers into far-right extremism, we must maintain a steady momentum on the issues that matter most.

[_**That starts here. Peter, will you support my re-election campaign to help me fight against extremist legislation and defend our voting rights?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74858932/442871390/-1986927361?refcode=BLU-VFC-20231209-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGE5N2U5Zi1hMzk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SU0AV2zJPp-mmKuuigPKOM0iTTwfYkEeNFoRkHV4SBo=)

clean_body: My roots in this district run deep. | = | Peter, I’m officially running for re-election in NC’s 4th Congressional District. My roots in this district run deep. I ran for office after years of service to my community – advocating for North Carolina families on the Chapel Hill-Carrboro Schools Board to the Orange County Board of Commissioners, to serving in the North Carolina state House and then state Senate. In Congress, I’ve remained steadfast in my commitment to prevent gun violence, ensure access to abortion care, and take action to protect our planet from climate change. The urgency of these issues cannot be understated. | | “Congresswoman Foushee is a bold, progressive fighter for her constituents who has championed access to abortion, Medicare for All, the Green New Deal and many other progressive priorities. We need her continued leadership in the House and for the 4th District. We’re proud to endorse Congresswoman Foushee’s re-election to continue her work on behalf of the people of North Carolina’s 4th congressional district.” Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC Co-Chairs Pramila Jayapal, Mark Pocan, and Jamie Raskin Tandem with these issues is the need to fortify our voting rights, fight against egregious partisan gerrymandering, and defend our democracy. The uncertainty of voting rights in the past year and even in the past month here in North Carolina confirms my job is far from over. We’ve made incredible progress this year. I’m proud to have three critical voting rights bills in committee and to be a member of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force. As the Republican party veers into far-right extremism, we must maintain a steady momentum on the issues that matter most. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Onward, Valerie * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. clean_body: | = Have you seen the headlines, Peter? | | "Abortion rights have won in every election since Roe v. Wade was overturned" — NBC News Republicans should be scared, Peter. It’s become incredibly clear that abortion will be a losing issue for them, every time, even in states they consider to be deep red. It’s too bad they’ve been obsessed with overturning Roe for the past 50 years, and now that they finally have, we’re going to make them wish they never did. Mess with our fundamental rights, and women will show up at the polls every time. = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. | = = | = = | = = Thanks, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

| | From campaign events to meeting voters in every corner of the state, this grassroots team has really made the most of every opportunity over the last month. Needless to say, it’s been a pretty busy few weeks, Peter. [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8503?t=10&amount=25&akid=726%2E52803%2EKo4vsB) | | | [Donate](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8503?t=11&amount=25&akid=726%2E52803%2EKo4vsB)
---
✅ _We took part in a senate candidate forum in Prince George’s County._
_✅ We got to discuss all things Maryland with voters in places like Frederick, Baltimore, National Harbor, Silver Spring, and Bethesda._
_✅ We went to a Mardi Gras brunch in Howard County._
And that’s all just within the last week!
**There’s still a lot on our to-do list before the holidays, Peter, and it all boils down to _more conversations with more voters_.** [**Can I count on you to chip in $25 toward my campaign so we can reach all of the Marylanders we need to win?**](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8503?t=12&amount=25&akid=726%2E52803%2EKo4vsB)

| | Today is the United Nations' International Anti-Corruption Day, and it's important to talk about it this year. **I know for some, New Jersey politics —**** _and politics in general_****— has a reputation for corruption.** Many people and politicians brush it off, saying _that's just Jersey_. But, when we say that corruption "comes with the job," people lose faith in our democracy. They begin to think that if it's all corrupt, why should they even bother? **You've heard me say before that I believe that the opposite of democracy is apathy.** We are losing more and more people to it while we allow corruption to remain. clean_body: Today is the United Nations’ International Anti-Corruption Day, and it’s important to talk about it this year. | | | | Today is the United Nations' International Anti-Corruption Day, and it's important to talk about it this year. I know for some, New Jersey politics — and politics in general— has a reputation for corruption. Many people and politicians brush it off, saying that's just Jersey. But, when we say that corruption "comes with the job," people lose faith in our democracy. They begin to think that if it's all corrupt, why should they even bother? You've heard me say before that I believe that the opposite of democracy is apathy. We are losing more and more people to it while we allow corruption to remain. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Now more than ever, New Jersey needs hard working, trustworthy leaders focused on the common good and injecting some integrity and civility back into our politics,not politicians only supported by the well-connected and well-off who think the rules only apply to them. body:
did you see this, friend?
| | |
---
Team, did you see this? **After Rick Scott endorsed Donald Trump, Trump finally returned the favor — he officially endorsed Scott's bid for reelection this week.**
**[This is a HUGE moment for our campaign — _all eyes are on Florida's Senate race._ So we need to take advantage of this momentum to defend our Senate majority! **Rush a donation now to ensure that Debbie has the grassroots resources she needs to win against her Trump-endorsed extremist opponent.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74862619/442884345/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100&refcode=jtk334-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDU4NDJmODEtYTg5Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lqJKRWtZLaJxdt6F5ZpHOoCDVRVUWr8zne7i-G5KyWQ=)**

---
We don't have to wonder why Florida voters are turning away from Rick Scott — _just take a look at his record:_
**📈 He wants to raise taxes on working families — instead of on megamillionaires like himself.**
**🚨 He wrote the plan to END Medicare and Social Security for MILLIONS of seniors who rely on these lifesaving programs.**
**❌ He supports Ron DeSantis' extreme abortion ban, and now, he wants to ban abortions NATIONWIDE****.**
**And now, his friend, the far-right chair of the Florida GOP, has been accused of sexual assault.** Rick Scott's late and tepid response to his long-time ally's alleged conduct sends a crystal-clear message to voters.
After years of pushing a far-right, unpopular agenda, Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable Senators on the ballot in 2024. And Debbie's grassroots campaign is giving Democrats the chance to FINALLY defeat him.

subject: Patriot is the real star

body:
We’re on the brink of outraising Biden’s celebrity donors.| | | Patriot,

---
Crooked Joe is hosting _ANOTHER_ Hollywood fundraiser tonight, reportedly expected to beg left-wing celebrities for $930,000 EACH.
---
These Hollywood mega-donors are claiming there’s been _“pent-up enthusiasm”_ and _“excitement”_ to see Crooked Joe.
---
That might be the single biggest lie ever told in the history of politics – and politicians _love_ to lie.
---
Not a soul in the world has “pent-up excitement” to see Joe Biden.
---
I’ll tell you what’s really going on. These left-wing donors are excited to make a move to _BUY_ the White House for their puppet candidate so that they can continue to have power and influence over our country and cast the Silent Majority back into the shadows.
---
To fight back, I’ve selected 930,000 patriots from our list of supporters to make a __contribution of any amount__ tonight – and you’re 1 of them, Patriot!
---
_Who needs a $930,000 check from a Hollywood donor when _930,000 patriots_ can step up by midnight to make a grassroots donation!_
---
As far as I’m concerned, hardworking Americans like YOU are the real stars of our country.
---

Hi there, friend, it's Emily, reaching out on behalf of Kirsten.
It's hard to believe that 2024 is just under a month away. This is going to be one of the most consequential — and closest — elections of our lifetime. Control of Washington is totally up for grabs, and Democrats are facing an uphill battle to save our Senate majority.
We'll only be able to defeat the GOP and defend our seats if we build a united, powerful grassroots team. And that starts with hearing from people like you.

body:

David McCormick — a mega-millionaire hedge fund guy who can spend HUGE sums of his own money and self-fund this race — is trying to flip PA’s Senate seat red. So the biggest mistake grassroots Democrats can make right now is to sit by and think that re-electing Bob Casey is a shoo-in. As someone who’s spent nearly half a century electing Democrats and winning tough elections across the country, I’m telling ya — this is gonna be a close one, and we gotta act now. [**_Please, will you split a donation of $20_** _** or more between Bob Casey and Eugene DePasquale? The fact is, if we don’t rally for Bob RIGHT NOW, we’re toast. That’s how serious Mitch McConnell and his cronies are about winning this race.
**National Republicans are getting ready to spend potentially more than EVER in the Keystone State!!!**
I’ll take it one step further — if we want to win, I think we need to see a LOT more grassroots donations than we have since McCormick launched his campaign.
[_**Act now to shore up our strength in Pennsylvania. clean_body: I had to reach out ASAP. = Hey, it’s Carville. I’ll tell you right now: we’ve gotta get serious about Pennsylvania’s Senate race. David McCormick — a mega-millionaire hedge fund guy who can spend HUGE sums of his own money and self-fund this race — is trying to flip PA’s Senate seat red. So the biggest mistake grassroots Democrats can make right now is to sit by and think that re-electing Bob Casey is a shoo-in. As someone who’s spent nearly half a century electing Democrats and winning tough elections across the country, I’m telling ya — this is gonna be a close one, and we gotta act now. = | | = The fact is, if we don’t rally for Bob RIGHT NOW, we’re toast. That’s how serious Mitch McConnell and his cronies are about winning this race. National Republicans are getting ready to spend potentially more than EVER in the Keystone State!!! I’ll take it one step further — if we want to win, I think we need to see a LOT more grassroots donations than we have since McCormick launched his campaign. = | = Thanks as always, James Carville | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. body:
Please take a moment to answer a few brief questions.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74865279/442894229/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzU3M2RjMDAtYWM5Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TDOOAqLJAsUGtJblRqQZCGRXcYcXutmHi9aUOVPHP6s=&emci=292c8df5-1e96-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=3573dc00-ac96-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
As 2023 comes to a close, we’re reflecting on the work we’ve done this year — with your continued support — of delivering accessible, real news in the places where it’s needed most.
But there’s always room for improvement and even our talented team of journalists aren’t exempt from this. That’s why we’re reaching out to you — to get your input and feedback on what we could be doing better as we head into 2024.
[**Will you take a moment to answer a few questions about the coming year?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74865284/442894232/547819044?source=em20231209&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzU3M2RjMDAtYWM5Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TDOOAqLJAsUGtJblRqQZCGRXcYcXutmHi9aUOVPHP6s=&emci=292c8df5-1e96-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=3573dc00-ac96-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=14016711)
**We have a lot of work ahead of us, Peter.** Donald Trump and his MAGA loyalists are gaining ground again, spreading their lies and threatening our democracy.
With the mainstream media failing to hold Trump and other right-wing bad actors accountable, COURIER's nine newsrooms across the country will be working around the clock to ensure that everyone, especially those in news deserts, hears the truth.
We would love to hear about your top priorities for the year ahead — including where you think we should open our next newsroom to continue our mission of providing informative, high-quality journalism.
[**Peter, can you spare a moment to answer a few brief questions? Take the survey now and help COURIER plan and prepare for our biggest year yet!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74865287/442894240/547819044?source=em20231209&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzU3M2RjMDAtYWM5Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TDOOAqLJAsUGtJblRqQZCGRXcYcXutmHi9aUOVPHP6s=&emci=292c8df5-1e96-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=3573dc00-ac96-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=14016711)

clean_body: Please take a moment to answer a few brief questions. Peter, As 2023 comes to a close, we’re reflecting on the work we’ve done this year — with your continued support — of delivering accessible, real news in the places where it’s needed most. But there’s always room for improvement and even our talented team of journalists aren’t exempt from this. That’s why we’re reaching out to you — to get your input and feedback on what we could be doing better as we head into 2024. We have a lot of work ahead of us, Peter. Donald Trump and his MAGA loyalists are gaining ground again, spreading their lies and threatening our democracy. With the mainstream media failing to hold Trump and other right-wing bad actors accountable, COURIER's nine newsrooms across the country will be working around the clock to ensure that everyone, especially those in news deserts, hears the truth. We would love to hear about your top priorities for the year ahead — including where you think we should open our next newsroom to continue our mission of providing informative, high-quality journalism. Thank you for sharing your thoughts, — COURIER Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

# All in for Allek!
---
| |
---
| | | In the spirit of holidays, Allek is on a mission to be the gift that keeps on giving! From the warmth of his Orlando upbringing to the festive summers in Puerto Rico, Allek, a dedicated family man, understands the significance of family, joy, and cherished traditions. He is committed to expanding universal healthcare, safeguarding reproductive rights, and fostering economic growth through legislation that exempts social security from being taxed and overtime pay. We wish you and your family the warmest of holidays! Will you join Allek in creating a holiday legacy? We're aiming for **2,500 donations of $100** to light up our festive fundraising goal and secure a holiday victory in the primary to beat Cory Mills in 2024.
---

name: Wes Moore
subject: Sharing some throwbacks
body:
So much has changed since these pictures were taken
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74865390/442894469/1666406465?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDM0MTIyNS1hYzk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d4QSMhMtLPv4SYX7_b9H-lWvWcNraLp-rHID5RlyqoI=)
Friend, I just wanted to share a couple of throwback pictures I found. ⬇️ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74865391/442894470/1674579917?refcode=em20231209&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDM0MTIyNS1hYzk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d4QSMhMtLPv4SYX7_b9H-lWvWcNraLp-rHID5RlyqoI=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74865392/442894471/1674579917?refcode=em20231209&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDM0MTIyNS1hYzk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d4QSMhMtLPv4SYX7_b9H-lWvWcNraLp-rHID5RlyqoI=) These are from the day that Dawn and I got engaged. And let’s just say, so much has changed from when these pictures were taken. We’ve added our amazing kids to our family and I’ve been elected to serve as Governor. But the important things stayed the same. **Family values, service, gratitude, and humility continue to be the foundation of our marriage, and our work in Maryland.** Now I’m fighting every day for families like mine to succeed and thrive. I want all of you to know that none of this would be possible without your support. **[That’s why I’m asking if you can continue that support by adding a donation today. clean_body: So much has changed since these pictures were taken = Friend, I just wanted to share a couple of throwback pictures I found. ⬇️ = = These are from the day that Dawn and I got engaged. And let’s just say, so much has changed from when these pictures were taken. We’ve added our amazing kids to our family and I’ve been elected to serve as Governor. But the important things stayed the same. Family values, service, gratitude, and humility continue to be the foundation of our marriage, and our work in Maryland. Now I’m fighting every day for families like mine to succeed and thrive. I want all of you to know that none of this would be possible without your support. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Elevate, Wes Moore

will you sign my petition, Derek?

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74865438/442894483/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDM0MTIyNS1hYzk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pRtjVAa9mFC1-M4Oy1DQgSEMNlCB8dmfU_8QkyY56pQ=&emci=d593aee2-4c95-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=30341225-ac96-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Reproductive health care is under attack nationwide. Here in Virginia, we narrowly escaped the GOP’s planned abortion ban when Democrats took full control of the General Assembly in November. But not every state has been as fortunate. **Right now, the Commonwealth is the only state in the south without some form of a restriction on reproductive health care.** As we continue to see stories from across the nation that underscore the real, human toll of the Dobbs decision, it couldn’t be more evident that we need to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law and make sure Democrats have the final word on reproductive health care. But the only way we can make that happen is by expanding our Democratic Senate majority. _****[So I’m asking: Will you sign my petition today to commit to electing defenders of reproductive health care to the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74865439/442894484/1542902510?refcode=mw_em_231209_1&ms=mw_em_231209_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDM0MTIyNS1hYzk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pRtjVAa9mFC1-M4Oy1DQgSEMNlCB8dmfU_8QkyY56pQ=&emci=d593aee2-4c95-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=30341225-ac96-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=4568237)****_ If Republicans take back the Senate, we could not only see a _national_ abortion ban, but also further efforts to curtail access to birth control too. By now, you know that I’ll always speak up in support of reproductive health care. But frankly, that’s not enough. If we want to protect care for women across the entire country, I need your help. _****[Please, Derek, add your name now to join me in my fight to elect Democrats to the Senate next year so we can codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74865440/442894485/1542902510?refcode=mw_em_231209_1&ms=mw_em_231209_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDM0MTIyNS1hYzk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pRtjVAa9mFC1-M4Oy1DQgSEMNlCB8dmfU_8QkyY56pQ=&emci=d593aee2-4c95-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=30341225-ac96-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=4568237)****_ Thank you, Mark ******[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74865441/442894486/1542902510?refcode=mw_em_231209_1&ms=mw_em_231209_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDM0MTIyNS1hYzk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pRtjVAa9mFC1-M4Oy1DQgSEMNlCB8dmfU_8QkyY56pQ=&emci=d593aee2-4c95-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=30341225-ac96-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=4568237)******

body:

name: Bob Casey
subject: Why this month is special
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1336%2E552475%2EWmLqqS)
Peter —
I’m writing to ask you to make your first contribution to our re-election campaign, and I hope you’ll take just a few moments to read why this is so important.
[**Before I get into it, here’s a link where you can make a donation.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231209-1?refcode=em20231209-1&refcode2=1336_552475_WmLqqS&akid=1336%2E552475%2EWmLqqS)
We’re up against a mega-millionaire opponent who has the ability to pour hundreds of millions of dollars into his own campaign. On top of that, we have a critical deadline coming up: the end of the final fundraising quarter of 2023.
At the end of December, our team will report everything we’ve raised to the Federal Election Commission. Everyone, including our opponent, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment, will be able to see how much support we have behind our re-election campaign.
A weak showing could mean they decide to pour even more money into Pennsylvania to try to buy this Senate seat.
A strong showing will prove that this team has what it takes to win. With your help, I know we can do just that.
**[That’s why I am asking you to chip in $5 or whatever you can right now to our campaign. Your donation is critical to our success, so I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231209-1?refcode=em20231209-1&refcode2=1336_552475_WmLqqS&akid=1336%2E552475%2EWmLqqS) **
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231209-1?refcode=em20231209-1&refcode2=1336_552475_WmLqqS&akid=1336%2E552475%2EWmLqqS)**
I’m glad to have your support, Peter.
With gratitude,
Bob

body:
Big Tech companies have censored Biden’s opponents over 160 times. They have censored me the most among any of the presidential candidates. The TRUTH cannot be censored.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=947e9837fcc74c248045924368762409&_t=OdLp5IpOqPao1dE_jaZ4BovR5KBScjmO2CLe5vgFG6_v59td4t5ZnoK2Hr-R38J0lmrPgyfj2hHZAMa1ryzfB41Z79lF74jOANRHcneijDQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=947e9837fcc74c248045924368762409&_t=OdLp5IpOqPao1dE_jaZ4BovR5KBScjmO2CLe5vgFG6_v59td4t5ZnoK2Hr-R38J0lmrPgyfj2hHZAMa1ryzfB41Z79lF74jOANRHcneijDQ%3D)

| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=947e9837fcc74c248045924368762409&_e=Icnxa6AvOI57GBZFF_V33NaASWrxP1ldloFhC0tYwIjafgOvz4puOZNZzIjcbVx4J5kcaEuop7BbUjuFUfo47Q5phl4aF0BO0vglj_FVZekB2dhd1wImbunBn41E4Lxg-t-1MLNN4tye9USacsrwCR7g20dEc80HRMJuFZF5J0VuNwbIebO-xLxHE0ePNNI8AxEjDHz6A9WlKO4R7IuQp40BJKQkqoig3SZ4TP1OG5n6GYaXFrVIN8NTiLwX_yyN4H-p41NbbQ6d8HyNJJv_ZBf50si_ff20DpUrL1N2IW0ABnmeInPa9epQ1NTdS2FXuGZJyqrpfU__uJBK5Aq_5tR8jzs5Yg071Oaf0FD38RToJ9NuEbbN-RPqvA038cwXO-vN5TV69AU4yzJrutUuLA%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

2024 hasn’t even begun yet, but Big Tech’s election-interfering censorship is already here. I have a new title to add to the list – **_the most censored presidential candidate._**

Back in May, LinkedIn locked my account and censored me for posting videos where I expressed fact-based views as a presidential candidate about climate policy and Biden's relationships with China. They said it violated their policies relating to "misinformation, hate speech, and violence."

Now we’re finding out that was only one instance of **18 times Big Tech censored or suppressed my freedom of speech.** _This is election interference of the highest order._

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=947e9837fcc74c248045924368762409&_e=Icnxa6AvOI57GBZFF_V33NaASWrxP1ldloFhC0tYwIjafgOvz4puOZNZzIjcbVx4J5kcaEuop7BbUjuFUfo47Q5phl4aF0BO0vglj_FVZekB2dhd1wImbunBn41E4Lxg-t-1MLNN4tye9USacsrwCR7g20dEc80HRMJuFZF5J0VuNwbIebO-xLxHE0ePNNI8AxEjDHz6A9WlKO4R7IuQp40BJKQkqoig3SZ4TP1OG5nqSuXpTr7gzOgU1Kpkm7IrhQec886SwPOMv9qMO-Ox_baMXibL5FzWmeHHHasmOL_rUuYd9hLkKuHbq6mPmfHlQdljr_zn1zO2VJHUMERSkEclMg6Gqaul05oQp3KCKORO4uRimhN54BHjP2-3vzXPIH3gkLEkpDruYxT3zrv8Vw%3D%3D)

They are not censoring me because it's false. **They are censoring me because it's the TRUTH.**

But at this point are we really that surprised? Conservatives have been dealing with censorship, shadow bans, and outright suppression of free speech for years now.

_**I’ve had enough. Once I’m President, we will shut this [censored] down.**_

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
Have you wondered what a second Trump presidency could look like?
#
Have you wondered what a second Trump presidency could look like, Peter?
If you have, then you know why we have to work as hard as we can to elect progressive Democrats. So, [**please consider donating $3 to our campaign to re-elect Pramila to Congress next year.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47964?refcode=em20231209-3257&t=1&akid=3257%2E420207%2Eu8tE2r)
If you haven’t, The New York Times recently published an article that answers that question, and **_spoiler alert_** , it’s not good.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47964?refcode=em20231209-3257&t=2&akid=3257%2E420207%2Eu8tE2r)
A second Trump presidency would not only mean many Biden-era policy wins are turned back — especially those that protect our climate, marginalized communities, and overall civil rights – it means a renewed outright assault on our rights. Trump could once again control the highest office in our country - and if his dangerous rhetoric has taught us _anything_ , it’s that **we must avoid a Trump possibility at all costs.**
Pramila refuses to let Trump destroy our democracy once again. Pramila is lifting up progressive candidates and fellow Democratic voices to make sure we win big in 2024. **But, she can’t do this alone, Peter.**
[**Can we count on your $3 contribution today to help us fight off the far-right's attempts to reinstall Trumpism to our government?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47964?refcode=em20231209-3257&t=3&akid=3257%2E420207%2Eu8tE2r)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47964?refcode=em20231209-3257&t=22&akid=3257%2E420207%2Eu8tE2r)**
Thank you,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231209-3257-footer&t=23&refcode2=3257_420207_u8tE2r&akid=3257%2E420207%2Eu8tE2r)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

I need input from 5 more solid conservatives in your region before 11:59pm tonight.

**In short:**
America is under threat from the intolerant left's policy on the economy, wars, crime, and open-borders because it's putting the actual physical safety of Americans at risk.

To combat these issues, we need to all be on the same page. That's where you come in...

Completing your 2023 Priorities Survey take less than 2 minutes, and your feedback is VITAL.

| [**ACCEPT INVITATION** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0976a25463554d369f3adf208205ef00&_e=MxkUTm5aJk8QW6FlvsP0_QEcg8R-Kch6SBwb2zdFfjn_CgNJcvphDnYXtTruW1a38fiy0-_lL97ki81dCC5BoAeavMpNakiV_DGhN5FXP87wvPAs2VHB0izKJs9lja9dlGXoBlnJ6FxlE65m9QLXqHo8X9D6WFbERHBYEpzj1RyFjnMjcYwtlYtBqBZE6U-KsGJZ7dIP2pz15Y0hRYd1TEpjo1o9PfPo01S9L5pt_FlzTmfv4DkuHbm9GaYa_upS)

Kari Lake

I’m sure you saw the news this week that there was another tragic mass shooting.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74868543/442905773/444630146?refcode=12-9-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2OTg0N2RlLWIxOTYtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8FLGU7RKjEEGsk5G_3646KmGB73JlaLXkqMpm7_RYEk=)

| | Friend, I’m sure you saw the news this week that there was another tragic mass shooting. Unfortunately, this is an almost daily occurrence now, and one that Americans know all too well. In 2023 alone, there have been 630 mass shootings- that’s almost two every single day. But it doesn’t have to be this way. Republican politicians across the country continue to put the NRA’s Dark Money above the lives and safety of the American people. At the cost of too many lives. **[**The NRA will always have Republican politicians to do their bidding until we get Big Money out of politics. And until we do, the American people will continue to pay the price. Can you chip in $10 so we can continue to work together to get Big Money out of politics and give power back to the people?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74868544/442905774/444630146?refcode=12-9-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2OTg0N2RlLWIxOTYtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8FLGU7RKjEEGsk5G_3646KmGB73JlaLXkqMpm7_RYEk=)** Listen, we know that with the amount of gun violence in our country, it’s easy to become desensitized to it. But we can’t let that happen. We’re working tirelessly for a solution- removing the grasp that the NRA has on Republican politicians throughout the country. **[We need everyone’s help if we’re to keep up our work toward getting the NRA’s Dark Money out of politics. By contributing $10 today, we’ll be working together to prevent avoidable tragedies by minimizing the NRA’s grip on our politics. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74868545/442905775/444630146?refcode=12-9-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2OTg0N2RlLWIxOTYtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8FLGU7RKjEEGsk5G_3646KmGB73JlaLXkqMpm7_RYEk=)** It’s because of the NRA’s control of Republican politicians that we can’t pass common sense gun reform measures like an assault weapons ban. Their “thoughts and prayers” following every mass shooting is craven and cowardly.It must change. Our lives depend on it. **[We know that you care about saving lives, and finally passing gun reform. It starts with breaking the NRA’s grip on the Republican Party. And that starts with shutting off their spigot of Dark Money. Join us by chipping in $10 to do just that. Your contribution will help us get the NRA’s blood money out of politics once and for all.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74868546/442905776/444630146?refcode=12-9-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2OTg0N2RlLWIxOTYtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8FLGU7RKjEEGsk5G_3646KmGB73JlaLXkqMpm7_RYEk=)** Thank you.— Team ECU/LAV Action

clean_body: I’m sure you saw the news this week that there was another tragic mass shooting.| | | = | | Friend, I’m sure you saw the news this week that there was another tragic mass shooting. Unfortunately, this is an almost daily occurrence now, and one that Americans know all too well. In 2023 alone, there have been 630 mass shootings- that’s almost two every single day. But it doesn’t have to be this way. Republican politicians across the country continue to put the NRA’s Dark Money above the lives and safety of the American people. At the cost of too many lives. = Listen, we know that with the amount of gun violence in our country, it’s easy to become desensitized to it. But we can’t let that happen. We’re working tirelessly for a solution- removing the grasp that the NRA has on Republican politicians throughout the country. = It’s because of the NRA’s control of Republican politicians that we can’t pass common sense gun reform measures like an assault weapons ban. Their “thoughts and prayers” following every mass shooting is craven and cowardly.It must change. Our lives depend on it. = Thank you.— Team ECU/LAV Action | | | | | | Contributions to End Citizens United//Let America Vote Action Fund are not tax deductible. Fellow Conservative, _Did you see the news this week?_

The Texas Democratic Party – pandering to the woke mob – has become the first state party in the nation to call for a ceasefire in the Israel-Hamas war. They’ve come to the defense of cowardly and depraved terrorists who have committed the most horrific acts imaginable and routinely use their own population as human shields.

**It’s sad how extreme Texas Democrats have become. This is a whole new low.**

Colin Allred– the Democrat running against me – has not had the courage to denounce this resolution!

_**[_**Stand with me as I call out Texas Democrats for this WOKE INSANITY >>>**_](http://trk.tedcruz.-5kqbAQ83n0UPU3I5Y4yg)**_

I know you don’t want these radicals representing YOU in the U.S. Senate!

We can’t let Colin Allred hide his extremist views. It’s vital that we share the truth about who he really is with Texas voters.

Thank you in advance for any donation you can send today.

name: Team Slotkin
subject: Our December roadmap
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=897%2E135344%2EwctCi_)

Team, It’s hard to believe, but we are fully in December: Towns across Michigan are decorated with twinkling lights, local businesses are filled with gifts, and it feels like holiday parties are back to pre-COVID levels.
Add it all up, and it’s fully the holiday season. But that also means something else: We are quickly approaching our final FEC deadline before the 2024 election year officially kicks off.
We know what the hustle and bustle of the holidays means: These emails will get opened less and less as the month goes on. Here on Team Slotkin, we’re realists, so we wanted to walk you through our shift in plans.
As we’ve outlined before, every year candidates running for federal office face four official quarterly fundraising deadlines – March 31, June 30, September 30, and December 31. After these deadlines pass, we are legally required to report how much money we’ve raised and the number of donations we receive. We will have to file our fourth quarter report on January 31, 2024.
Once we file our report, our fundraising numbers will be made public and political insiders, reporters, and our opponents will use it as a metric to gauge our strength as we enter the election year.
Typically, we break down a large quarterly goal by month, then break those goals down by weeks. Usually, we plan on raising 25% of our money in October, 25% in November, and 50% in December. But here’s the catch: We raise about 70% of our monthly goal in the last two weeks of the month – as urgency ramps up around the deadline.
With the holidays in December, we have to be much more strategic in how we’re raising – the earlier in the month, the better, because it helps us offset the steep decline in fundraising as people go offline for the holidays.
[**So, how do you fit into this? Well, the majority of our individual contributions come through emails like this one. And if everyone reading this gave $3 now, we’d certainly be on track to hit our December goal before our FEC deadline this month.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231209-1-tt&t=2&akid=897%2E135344%2EwctCi_)**

clean_body: Team, It’s hard to believe, but we are fully in December: Towns across Michigan are decorated with twinkling lights, local businesses are filled with gifts, and it feels like holiday parties are back to pre-COVID levels. Add it all up, and it’s fully the holiday season. But that also means something else: We are quickly approaching our final FEC deadline before the 2024 election year officially kicks off. We know what the hustle and bustle of the holidays means: These emails will get opened less and less as the month goes on. Here on Team Slotkin, we’re realists, so we wanted to walk you through our shift in plans. As we’ve outlined before, every year candidates running for federal office face four official quarterly fundraising deadlines – March 31, June 30, September 30, and December 31. After these deadlines pass, we are legally required to report how much money we’ve raised and the number of donations we receive. We will have to file our fourth quarter report on January 31, 2024. Once we file our report, our fundraising numbers will be made public and political insiders, reporters, and our opponents will use it as a metric to gauge our strength as we enter the election year. Typically, we break down a large quarterly goal by month, then break those goals down by weeks. Usually, we plan on raising 25% of our money in October, 25% in November, and 50% in December. But here’s the catch: We raise about 70% of our monthly goal in the last two weeks of the month – as urgency ramps up around the deadline. With the holidays in December, we have to be much more strategic in how we’re raising – the earlier in the month, the better, because it helps us offset the steep decline in fundraising as people go offline for the holidays. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Team Slotkin PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

subject: Full steam ahead →
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74869725/442909564/-233825198?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzNlMDI2My1iNDk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MT63islyNzrsbSDMg8CIHe4z2Obpsd-U0S679ECbDYk=)
Peter, it’s hard to believe 2023 is nearly over.

In a matter of weeks, we will be running full steam ahead toward Election Day – and with your help, achieving our ultimate goal of ousting GOP Rep. Mike Garcia and giving CA-27 the community-centered representation we need.

**[Today, I’m not asking you to chip in toward our campaign. Instead, I am only asking for a minute of your time to help our team prepare for the critical next months ahead. Will you begin your personalized survey now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74869726/442909572/1424510084?refcode=em-12.9.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzNlMDI2My1iNDk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MT63islyNzrsbSDMg8CIHe4z2Obpsd-U0S679ECbDYk=&emci=d8e4fa69-1d96-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=673e0263-b496-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=36198509)**
