---

My favorite part of running for Congress is meeting with voters on the campaign trail. Over the past few months, my team and I have held campaign events, knocked on hundreds of doors, and participated in community action across the district.

**Connecting with the people of the Santa Clarita and Antelope Valleys is key to our success in this grassroots campaign – unlike Mike Garcia, I am prioritizing our community instead of special interests.**

But despite the hard work we are building on the ground, I can’t reach everyone at once. That’s why today I am reaching out with my campaign survey to hear your thoughts on what matters most to you and your family.

**[If you have a minute, can I count on you to respond? I’m hoping to see 250 completed surveys in my inbox before midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74869735/442909577/1424510084?refcode=em-12.9.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzNlMDI2My1iNDk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MT63islyNzrsbSDMg8CIHe4z2Obpsd-U0S679ECbDYk=&emci=d8e4fa69-1d96-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=673e0263-b496-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=36198509)**
****[Begin the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74869742/442909587/1424510084?refcode=em-12.9.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzNlMDI2My1iNDk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MT63islyNzrsbSDMg8CIHe4z2Obpsd-U0S679ECbDYk=&emci=d8e4fa69-1d96-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=673e0263-b496-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=36198509)****

Thank you,

George

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Everyone deserves a roof over their head
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| As a United States Senator, I have big plans to continue this work to address housing insecurities.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4706%2E5257348%2EP79TPX)
Derek –
It has been my top priority as a member of Congress to combat the housing affordability crisis in the Golden State — and I will keep up the fight in the Senate.
Fifteen years after the housing bubble burst, thousands of Californians are still struggling to afford a place to live while saving enough to retire. We’ve made some important progress along the way, but there is so much more to be done:
1. We’ve provided crucial support to veterans, seniors, students, and families across our state.
2. Increased the availability of affordable housing throughout California.
3. Expanded and created facilities serving individuals experiencing homelessness.
4. Implemented measures to reduce poverty and food insecurity among our fellow Californians.
5. Strengthened resources and support systems for those grappling with homelessness, mental health crises, and addiction.
6. Secured over **$190 million** in funds to boost housing affordability and combat homelessness in California.

And while I’m proud of the work we’ve accomplished, **I recognize that our work is far from over. We need to build a vast amount of new, affordable housing, by providing new tax credits and a major new federal investment in housing. And we need a national policy on housing, not the present ad hoc approach that is leaving far too many people commuting hours to work, or worse, unhoused.**
As a United States Senator, I’ll continue this work to address housing affordability and homelessness.
**I believe that, by working together, we can ensure California has the resources necessary to overcome these challenges and create more housing that is affordable for all.**
[**Add your name to my petition if you support our efforts to create more affordable housing in California and across the country.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202312-Housing-petition.hznNyz&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20231209_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4706%2E5257348%2EP79TPX)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202312-Housing-petition.hznNyz&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20231209_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4706%2E5257348%2EP79TPX)
---
Thank you for adding your name and being a vital part of our journey toward a California where everyone has a place to call home.
– Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3294?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20231209_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4706%2E5257348%2EP79TPX)

Secured over $190 million in funds to boost housing affordability and combat homelessness in California. And while I’m proud of the work we’ve accomplished, I recognize that our work is far from over. We need to build a vast amount of new, affordable housing, by providing new tax credits and a major new federal investment in housing. And we need a national policy on housing, not the present ad hoc approach that is leaving far too many people commuting hours to work, or worse, unhoused. As a United States Senator, I’ll continue this work to address housing affordability and homelessness. I believe that, by working together, we can ensure California has the resources necessary to overcome these challenges and create more housing that is affordable for all. Thank you for adding your name and being a vital part of our journey toward a California where everyone has a place to call home. – Adam | | 135 E. body:
Peter, I don't even know what happened here.
---
Yesterday, I reached out to this powerful community with an update – my end-of-month deadline is getting closer and I need to raise $10,000 by midnight tonight.
From the get-go, dozens of supporters made donations to help me meet my goal. But then, out of nowhere, donations came to a standstill – causing us to be on the verge of falling short of our goal for December.
I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short, but I _refuse _to let it get the best of us. I’m confident in the size and strength of this grassroots team – **and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up the gap on our final $2,479 left with only hours to go.**

**[582] fearless fighters from your area have chipped in this year to support Attorney General James' work.** Thanks to the support of your peers, the attorney general has been able to take the powerful and corrupt to court, secure real wins for everyday Americans from manipulative corporations and organizations, and fight to protect our fundamental rights, like reproductive freedom for all.
But the reality is, 2024 will be our toughest year yet for progress – and we truly need _every_ single supporter who is in the position to give to help fund Letitia James' work.
Once again, the White House, Senate, and House of Representatives are all at stake in 2024 – but next year will be unlike any before. With things like our reproductive rights, voting rights, and social services under attack, losing control of Washington could be _catastrophic_ for millions of Americans.
**And that is exactly why it is vital that we support strong, fearless fighters at the state level, like Attorney General James.** She's working tirelessly to ensure that New York _remains_ a beacon of progress while also going toe to toe with other far-right attorneys general to expand these protections beyond New York.
**But this fight will only grow harder. clean_body: Peter, I don't even know what happened here. Yesterday, I reached out to this powerful community with an update – my end-of-month deadline is getting closer and I need to raise $10,000 by midnight tonight. From the get-go, dozens of supporters made donations to help me meet my goal. But then, out of nowhere, donations came to a standstill – causing us to be on the verge of falling short of our goal for December. I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short, but I refuse to let it get the best of us. I’m confident in the size and strength of this grassroots team – and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up the gap on our final $2,479 left with only hours to go. Peter**, I’m counting on you to be one of the people I need to make a donation, so please: = | | = Thank you, Letitia \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Letitia James Date: Thurs, Dec 7, 2023 Subject: This is a tough time of year | | | = Peter, according to our records, you have NOT made a single donation to support Attorney General Letitia James' work this year. | | = MADE A 2023 DONATION? NOT YET! SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: $5 | | = [582] fearless fighters from your area have chipped in this year to support Attorney General James' work. Thanks to the support of your peers, the attorney general has been able to take the powerful and corrupt to court, secure real wins for everyday Americans from manipulative corporations and organizations, and fight to protect our fundamental rights, like reproductive freedom for all. But the reality is, 2024 will be our toughest year yet for progress – and we truly need every single supporter who is in the position to give to help fund Letitia James' work. Once again, the White House, Senate, and House of Representatives are all at stake in 2024 – but next year will be unlike any before. With things like our reproductive rights, voting rights, and social services under attack, losing control of Washington could be catastrophic for millions of Americans. And that is exactly why it is vital that we support strong, fearless fighters at the state level, like Attorney General James. She's working tirelessly to ensure that New York remains a beacon of progress while also going toe to toe with other far-right attorneys general to expand these protections beyond New York. But this fight will only grow harder. So we have to ask, before the year ends:** = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you. – Team James | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, Letitia James is counting on people like you to fuel her fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure AG James can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

Friend, **Rep. Jamaal Bowman has been an outspoken leader in the movement for a ceasefire.** **AIPAC recruited an anti-ceasefire candidate who just announced he’s running against Jamaal in 2024.** And this week, the House voted on a censure resolution against Jamaal. They're trying to distract from the fact they are unable to govern. They are trying to distract from the fact they can’t stop the genocide. They are distracting from the fact they can't pass a budget for the American people. Jamaal has called out members for doing nothing to stop the gun crisis in our country. Jamaal has called out the U.S. government for being complicit in the mass murder of children and the ethnic cleansing of Palestinians. And this week he joined me in voting against HR 894, a dangerous resolution conflating anti-Zionism with antisemitism. **Because we’re speaking up for Palestinians’ human rights, AIPAC is funding attack ads against us, and plans to spend $100 million in an attempt to defeat us in next year’s elections.** [**AIPAC is trying to silence our movement and undermine our democracy. We can’t let this happen. Please chip in today so Rep. Jamaal Bowman and I can withstand their attacks.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKuxxxGNCMufLZFZwalOj6rEt8-lfD1ZZUUiDWuQieYJ8fGet69xcDglUASGKx4KMAberyp7k33mdZVoiinXZwY2R2AaSU8KqkxDSOCW3C4SPmz0PkNXJJlftxSZf9cwoEoUtKCaBBEGcQIue-lKd99Oady8SgkEKi_dPi9NLVhQ1QmQcT54IHRPwu5jzbzkamUCGAIsHZqeq73dIFVsqUjSVErYAsQxONuX9sDFChGnzrG3spsApdV_6Gpzwt6gi2h124w_3SQ6Se__7FtGok9p0l0uUBNlJgANw2Gqu8JQGe9SjisLBVyMhIsDV2EEKn38qenw4y9ODmJoQahF1ZIJRbhsHnb9YlbscehGir_2Dg2DiImZNy1KMGRIJcv91cHa_FM1g1uVRx1TFC76TMhQ/41z/eqa18ZSQR4-utlZaCuwAoQ/h1/ykglr8VZOKYsUYeVXc6Ozazo-DHEkcJznMbnx7_e4HA) | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKuxxxGNCMufLZFZwalOj6rEt8-lfD1ZZUUiDWuQieYJ8fGet69xcDglUASGKx4KMAKGmYLxLEj81dQkmmj_JhtGxnzB_8UDz8_EgphfHhLddZ2D409yAt1v8fSvxRW9TT3K_T_IzIUUItDTw0533YFomoBfoYC4e_nRzIcVRTtEr5l3TnqqvajixGD3wxJD_BrFILSy623PfgsArUsh6VCWq64oRARCu1YU1hVr72r3NfxpJSWx72sPIIZKZ_n5dINdf3A3tL23h86DzE1o6LdVQEAKbVrFRXIXHyCrqDFOms-C3U9bCpUA6Uh0YhonEre-L2oosFdQFh-dICDbLT31MnEkciFka-QzmaVTME6vgjLSY8HKSbA3kfoMoUYhR9NVaj51iQsrutMCsFjBiVdQ/41z/eqa18ZSQR4-utlZaCuwAoQ/h2/YNQGb8RwUuwarU9akA9aY0E0O8kegqRfUyXveJ5pNtQ)

Last year, AIPAC and its network of PACs spent $40 million against Black and brown progressives, with most of the funds coming from Republican donors who’ve supported Trump.

**An AIPAC spokesperson claimed that Jamaal is part of an “extremist fringe,” but our calls for a ceasefire are in line with the vast majority of Americans—across the political spectrum. The rest of Congress needs to catch up and value all human life.**
Jamaal is especially able to humanize Palestinians because he’s visited the West Bank, where he met with my sity (my grandmother).
He was stopped at a military checkpoint near her house, and saw first-hand how Palestinians live in fear under constant military presence. And he connected that to his own experience as a Black man in the U.S. who’s been targeted by police violence.
Jamaal and I know that the struggles for justice and equality are interconnected, from the U.S. to Palestine and beyond. That’s why we continue to take politically courageous stands, despite attempts to silence and intimidate us.
**AIPAC is working with far-right Trump donors to interfere in our democracy. They’re targeting candidates of color representing working class districts, who rely on grassroots donations rather than corporate PAC money.**

And this week he joined me in voting against HR 894, a dangerous resolution conflating anti-Zionism with antisemitism. Because we’re speaking up for Palestinians’ human rights, AIPAC is funding attack ads against us, and plans to spend $100 million in an attempt to defeat us in next year’s elections. | Last year, AIPAC and its network of PACs spent $40 million against Black and brown progressives, with most of the funds coming from Republican donors who’ve supported Trump. An AIPAC spokesperson claimed that Jamaal is part of an “extremist fringe,” but our calls for a ceasefire are in line with the vast majority of Americans—across the political spectrum. The rest of Congress needs to catch up and value all human life. Jamaal is especially able to humanize Palestinians because he’s visited the West Bank, where he met with my sity (my grandmother). He was stopped at a military checkpoint near her house, and saw first-hand how Palestinians live in fear under constant military presence. And he connected that to his own experience as a Black man in the U.S. who’s been targeted by police violence. Jamaal and I know that the struggles for justice and equality are interconnected, from the U.S. to Palestine and beyond. That’s why we continue to take politically courageous stands, despite attempts to silence and intimidate us. AIPAC is working with far-right Trump donors to interfere in our democracy. They’re targeting candidates of color representing working class districts, who rely on grassroots donations rather than corporate PAC money. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Jamaal Bowman and Rashida Tlaib | | | | | | | | | Thank you for joining me and Jamaal in recognizing our shared humanity. We will continue speaking up to save lives—no matter people’s faith or ethnicity. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---

Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

body:
Will you contribute $1 today?
#

Friends -
We are writing to ask you to make a $1 donation to GIFFORDS PAC today.
Yes, just $1.
$1 to help us continue fighting for lifesaving gun safety legislation at the federal level and in every state nationwide.
$1 to help us elect gun safety champions up and down the ballot next year.
$1 to fight back against the gun lobby and their message of fear.
We know that $1 may not seem like the kind of money that can do all those things. But when everyone adds their $1, it makes a world of difference.
So please:
[**Can you use this link to contribute $1 to GIFFORDS PAC today? Your contribution goes directly towards our work to keep our communities safe from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec23.vYScJV&refcode=em231209-1-30&t=1&akid=7017%2E3935704%2ExmItJ2)

\- The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Fellow American, Hunter Biden is refusing to submit to a deposition in front of my committee for one simple reason: he thinks he gets to dictate the terms of a subpoena because he's the President's son. I have news for Hunter and the entire Biden Crime Family; **that 's not going to fly with me.** I don't care what their last name is, nobody is above the law. _**Hunter and every other Biden family member who receives a lawful subpoena from me will comply with my investigation.**_ The Biden family lawyers are desperate to have their Democrat lackeys on the Oversight Committee run interference as my Republican colleagues and I ask the pressing questions that will expose Joe Biden's role as head of the Biden Crime Family. Without proven liars Jamie Raskin and Dan Goldman grandstanding for the camera's, Hunter's sworn testimony, which I will publicly release, will lay bare the influence peddling and widespread cover-up perpetrated by the Biden family. **That 's why the Biden's are fighting harder than ever to keep their sprawling criminal enterprise from blowing up in their faces. Which means we must fight back harder than ever, too.** They've even had shady out-of-town opposition researchers in my hometown digging into every business record and acre of land I've ever owned to smear me and my family. Not once has my courage wavered in my pursuit of exposing the truth about the Biden Crime Family, and I know you're counting on me to remain steadfast in my resolve. [**If you want to join me in fighting back and defending the good name I 've spent my lifetime building, the best way to help is by chipping in a few dollars to my campaign.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8d4ae97139a04b47a6c65e0ca1a8d3fd&_e=_OTbViaWyGlboq4Z2IZw_hMneynxnwNmC-5BzhtgHAK1KclGosxCGabwJaZVkg-95TK1Xk0t6cFcUL5KQuppY8uroDgnqdc6SS6eQ161HaWRoorqWYJjEbsbGOIno9OvBIcXWhiaAbimv8-XFCa3I2VKB5ztExYnjZkR6sOZkND-y2bDV3sutBUJKN6Q5Hb51Q0I9yAGCED6JtN7SIaZhCbD0T0o3QYAvCW23eTn-6wqwMkYhICS0gwyYHr4Bq065mYHOiPdixGBx12SHymGB7Wu-WANBAsvs2Wf_-r9OZaq020CqDholvum_s4zBxqc) _With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee

body:
Discover why this high-stakes GOP primary is making national headlines – Bailey’s 'America First' approach endorsed by key Republican figures

BREAKING: Rep. Mary Miller Endorses Darren Bailey in High-Profile GOP 12th Dist. Race, Cites Faith-Driven Service (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/12/breaking-rep-mary-miller-endorses-darren-bailey-in-high-profile-gop-12th-dist-race-cites-faith-driven-service.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=10d57e1431-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/12/breaking-rep-mary-miller-endorses-darren-bailey-in-high-profile-gop-12th-dist-race-cites-faith-driven-service.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=10d57e1431-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
U.S. Rep. Mary Miller (left) and Darren Bailey at a Trump rally on June 25, 2022. (Source: Mike Sorensen/AP)

In a stunning development in one of the nation’s most closely-watched primary races, U.S. Representative Mary Miller has officially endorsed Darren Bailey for Congress in the 12th District. This endorsement is more than just political alignment – it's a testament to Bailey's unwavering commitment to core conservative values.

🔹 Why This Endorsement Matters: Rep. Miller, a respected figure in the Republican party, praises Bailey for his dedication to serving through faith and his staunch support of the 'America First' principles. She recalls President Trump’s endorsement of both herself and Bailey as pro-Trump, America First candidates, underscoring Bailey’s deep roots in MAGA philosophy.

🔹 Bailey’s Political Journey: As a former state representative and senator, Bailey has been a formidable force against Governor JB Pritzker's mandates, defending vital issues like the Second Amendment and anti-abortion stances. His lawsuit during the pandemic against the state's extended stay-at-home order was a bold statement for personal freedoms and the rights of small businesses.

🔹 A Vision for the Future: Miller highlights Bailey's understanding of the challenges facing American farmers and small business owners, emphasizing his readiness to tackle inflation and energy policies. Her endorsement is not just support; it’s a call to action for conservative values in Illinois.

🔹 Bailey’s Response: Grateful and resolute, Bailey sees this endorsement as a reflection of his strong grassroots support within the America First movement. He’s ready to join forces with like-minded conservatives to champion these values in Congress.

🔹 Don’t Miss Out: Click here (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/12/breaking-rep-mary-miller-endorses-darren-bailey-in-high-profile-gop-12th-dist-race-cites-faith-driven-service.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=10d57e1431-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to read the full article on Illinois Review for an in-depth look at this game-changing endorsement and what it means for the future of the GOP and the 12th District.

Stay informed, stay engaged.

He’s ready to join forces with like-minded conservatives to champion these values in Congress. 🔹 Don’t Miss Out: Click here () to read the full article on Illinois Review for an in-depth look at this game-changing endorsement and what it means for the future of the GOP and the 12th District. Stay informed, stay engaged. CLICK HERE TO READ THE FULL ARTICLE () Copyright © 2023 IR Media Corp., all rights reserved. subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kL1OwzAUhZ_mZmtkn-skzeABKGFAQkiwdHTjW-oSk9RJifr2qKGw3p_vfDouDl3YXyxV9wQcgh8JIL4j4LSdYzof4_PT6ph4dSpfYnFd4oGA6TLI_-UNkkt0obtOq03mLe-9MplYXSlow6g5O1i123tfC9iVwrW0bicQeIESrY3jLFgosIaqdcWskEsr69KLqVFWhtWajFpychclhdbpcZpdSn0f87aPWWcP0zSMi1hDaObU51_ntpPz-PvW9pHQ3JQJzTeh-Zx9UdameANxs5TAm7nYvr8-njhL1g9z6LowlhUZ9fFH-QkAAP__HtNfiA) | [Unsubscribe](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kLFOwzAQhp_msjWy71y7GTwAJQxIiIGlo2NfqKu4Se1EUd8etRTW_-6--_S7NA2xv1owz4B4jKEAItATIF4Oa8rLKb2_bU6ZNhf9kba3Ib4A4nyd-H_zAak5uTjcUrOvgqU-CFWxlUagVIQNVUeLgXznnAgYOtdpyZpF00uS2qBTPVfRokCSKBppiATW7HmnA6sGtVEkdqDE_U_tEufonSzz6nIex1T7MVWDPc7zVO5iLWC75rE-L37gpfye-TEBtg9lwLYsXfE5TnMczwWwXc6PpGOg9t4I7dft4evz9UJVtmFa4zDEog0o8f2H_AkAAP__iQZmQg)

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjj1v4zAMhn8NvdmQSFuyBg25M3w4HK6dOwWqPhIlVu3ISoP8-8JB26kj3_ch-Zi0TDHcNchfgHiMbgVEoB0gXl5uKV9P6d-f-pSpvoin1G0l_gbEcl_8N_l5pPHJxGlL5VA5TcGxtvKaS4a8JVRUHbXoQs-lN53A4ILz0hN2PhhmOfrOiCpqZEgcmeKSiGHjre-F861CIVtiPbTs8acxyedoDV_LzeQ8z6mxc6omfSxlWR9iI-DYLiWfkW8d4GinaM9AY8nv0QENHBVTgGI3_h22kakOUJgQ9uv1dQt6YvWXUL1y1VnebwvXkvbWpMXEwxvQQP-f65_ZKmu33OI0xVVIaNnh4W7n9BEAAP__SoBsUA). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjj1v4zAMhn8NvdmQSFuyBg25M3w4HK6dOwWqPhIlVu3ISoP8-8JB26kj3_ch-Zi0TDHcNchfgHiMbgVEoB0gXl5uKV9P6d-f-pSpvoin1G0l_gbEcl_8N_l5pPHJxGlL5VA5TcGxtvKaS4a8JVRUHbXoQs-lN53A4ILz0hN2PhhmOfrOiCpqZEgcmeKSiGHjre-F861CIVtiPbTs8acxyedoDV_LzeQ8z6mxc6omfSxlWR9iI-DYLiWfkW8d4GinaM9AY8nv0QENHBVTgGI3_h22kakOUJgQ9uv1dQt6YvWXUL1y1VnebwvXkvbWpMXEwxvQQP-f65_ZKmu33OI0xVVIaNnh4W7n9BEAAP__SoBsUA) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjj1v4zAMhn8NvdmQSFuyBg25M3w4HK6dOwWqPhIlVu3ISoP8-8JB26kj3_ch-Zi0TDHcNchfgHiMbgVEoB0gXl5uKV9P6d-f-pSpvoin1G0l_gbEcl_8N_l5pPHJxGlL5VA5TcGxtvKaS4a8JVRUHbXoQs-lN53A4ILz0hN2PhhmOfrOiCpqZEgcmeKSiGHjre-F861CIVtiPbTs8acxyedoDV_LzeQ8z6mxc6omfSxlWR9iI-DYLiWfkW8d4GinaM9AY8nv0QENHBVTgGI3_h22kakOUJgQ9uv1dQt6YvWXUL1y1VnebwvXkvbWpMXEwxvQQP-f65_ZKmu33OI0xVVIaNnh4W7n9BEAAP__SoBsUA) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Jay=20Lee?=
subject: My Commitment to You
body:
I can’t promise you the world, but here’s what I can guarantee as your next Congressman... | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/35194d08439b/john-lee-mayor-who-rescued-north-las-vegas-announces-for-congress-12669834?e=91a702298f)
---
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=be748e1878&e=91a702298f)
|
---
Friend,
**I can’t promise you the world, but here’s what I can guarantee as your next Congressman...**
1. _**I will always tell the truth, no matter what it is.**_
2. _**I will always put the interests of NV-04 first and foremost above all else.**_
3. _**I will always be available to listen to my constituents.**_
4. _**I will make sure our conservative agenda gets passed and signed into law.**_
5. _**We will keep our House majority!**_

While the Democrats grovel over their failing Presidential candidate in the White House, I will make sure that Nevada leads the country again. I did it as Mayor of North Las Vegas, and I’ll do it again as a Member of Congress.
This is a race that will be won on the ground, so it’s time for us to unite and make sure that the good people of NV-04 know that they will have a fighter and a leader in their corner. **House Republicans only have a five-seat majority, and the Democrats will work to take every seat across America that they can.**
Unfortunately for them, patriots like us exist who understand the importance of fiscal responsibility, law enforcement, the value of a dollar, and the rule of law.
[_**All that I ask of you is that you help spread the word about this campaign by contributing as little as $1 today to make sure that we are well-funded to win the Republican nomination and take back this important district.**_](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=48647d7a97&e=91a702298f)[_**And please consider visiting my website to learn more about my agenda for Nevada >> **_](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=72a8f3ef27&e=91a702298f)
| [LET’S KEEP THIS CAMPAIGN FUNDED INTO 2024 >>](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=16e612f294&e=91a702298f)
---
| [LEARN MORE ABOUT MY CAMPAIGN >>](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=52589d0cef&e=91a702298f)
---
**For Nevada,**_John Jay Lee_ Candidate for Congress [NV-04]
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=e0544bd2cc&e=91a702298f)

name: John Kennedy
subject: heebie-jeebies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
"You won’t know what hit you” – Chuck Schumer
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |

---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/BqJMaQAXvzlcP62wPMzaJw~~/AARclAA~-6d0ZWCBY9xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "John Kennedy")
---

I'm relieved that you opened this email in time.

My colleagues on the other side of the aisle just launched a COORDINATED POLITICAL AMBUSH against our Conservative Supreme Court Majority. _**[And we're running out of time to stop them!](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/BqJMaQAXvzlcP62wPMzaJw~~/AARclAA~-6d0ZWCBY9xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "And we’re running out of time to stop them!")**_
- **Don't forget:** Chuck Schumer went on live TV to say, "You won't know what hit you!" to _threaten_ Conservative justices to not rule against Liberals

- **Don't forget:** Crazed young Liberals protested in front of the _personal homes_ of Conservative justices

- **Don't forget:** A dozen House Democrats called for the _impeachment_ of Justice Clarence Thomas

- **Don't forget:** Senate Democrats weighed _official subpoenas_ for his personal friends

- **Don't forget:** The Liberal Media published a debunked _hit piece_ against Justice Samuel Alito
Listen folks,

It makes my stomach turn that the Democrats control the Senate and the White House. The **ONLY** thing standing in the way of Joe Biden having full control - and ramming through anything he wants - is Republicans in Congress and a Conservative Supreme Court Majority.

And both are being bombarded with Liberal hit pieces, personal attacks, and downright lies.

_**[That's why I'm teaming up with my good pal, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to help hold the line in the House and make sure we have the support to save our Conservative Supreme Court Majority.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/BqJMaQAXvzlcP62wPMzaJw~~/AARclAA~-6d0ZWCBY9xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "That’s why I’m teaming up with my good pal, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to help hold the line in the House and make sure we have the support to save our Conservative Supreme Court Majority.")**_

So I'm asking as a personal favor to me - and for the good of the country - will you pitch in a few bucks to help before the end of the day?
---
**[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/BqJMaQAXvzlcP62wPMzaJw~~/AARclAA~-6d0ZWCBY9xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)[**YES**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/BqJMaQAXvzlcP62wPMzaJw~~/AARclAA~-6d0ZWCBY9xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) _[**NO**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/BqJMaQAXvzlcP62wPMzaJw~~/AARclAA~-6d0ZWCBY9xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**
---
If the Democrats take control of the House and Supreme Court, I can't begin to tell you how bad it would get...

**You could kiss your free-speech rights goodbye. Say sayonara to voter ID laws. Wave goodbye to election integrity. And don 't even think about being able to buy a firearm in this country ever again.**

_If that doesn 't give you the heebie-jeebies, I don't know what will!_

_**[I'm asking you one last time for help. We could really use your support to save our House Majority, win back a Republican Senate, and save our Conservative Supreme Court.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/BqJMaQAXvzlcP62wPMzaJw~~/AARclAA~-6d0ZWCBY9xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "I’m asking you one last time for help. We could really use your support to save our House Majority, win back a Republican Senate, and save our Conservative Supreme Court.")**_

God bless you,
John Kennedy

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2h6pFvWhx5e2DVxTmaif1Q~~/AARclAA~~ "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")
---

It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2h6pFvWhx5e2DVxTmaif1Q~~/AARclAA~~ "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

_What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats?_

**Look around, Peter. Right now, in America...**
_Children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves._

_The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God._

_Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes._

_Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth._

_Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives._

**As Speaker of the House, my mission is clear: we must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. **

As we aim to make history in the 2024 Election, I need to have my hand on the pulse of the most important thing: _**American voters.**_

[**Which is why I am conducting a _critical_ American Voter Survey today.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2d56933d69014ce78869623b852045e9&_e=eebcvcVb-YK35h7KleuJqA81dqYKTiQUNJc1-QvqXc5OlTGuD3s1mJCHSAz8NJkEeTlcGDHsgrR6KoNHkQyINHtSPJozN_85jfIw7WAWmukpKvxLVCLscVHtQAMCXGO_lTUbRWFIODUyAChg5AtbCzPjVFLxcuRQQ0Q6axX9xgR5zv68vqC354zFPIaRi9ZxIzXR9ViGJsp4NyeXsQG85CCux8H2GTkddFHNuMaTVyTLc_2XaieeN5l8IqGLG-1POGVM1JQnmwhXsxv-Vx5KR0wrp5o8iu1sF_feL4mQL93MYGMh0EzZpwaZfuRRJqufkEX1aA_XYKnHyGEYKa9ILBucrbiiQyJWiLDI-r1CBZbE11KIwYxyFx59-_cmPLNm7wfKLHmRZVQl6m0jjSirDemvrwh2lwxh5gj-M9NWw9ELluCJmZMZJOeMNMIQ4qPc)

**_-RESPOND TO SPEAKER JOHNSON-_** [** LAUNCH AMERICAN VOTER SURVEY > **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2d56933d69014ce78869623b852045e9&_e=eebcvcVb-YK35h7KleuJqA81dqYKTiQUNJc1-QvqXc5OlTGuD3s1mJCHSAz8NJkEeTlcGDHsgrR6KoNHkQyINHtSPJozN_85jfIw7WAWmukpKvxLVCLscVHtQAMCXGO_lTUbRWFIODUyAChg5AtbCzPjVFLxcuRQQ0Q6axX9xgR5zv68vqC354zFPIaRi9ZxIzXR9ViGJsp4NyeXsQG85CCux8H2GTkddFHNuMaTVyTLc_2XaieeN5l8IqGLG-1POGVM1JQnmwhXsxv-Vx5KRwHGvt886_4lY_GeElsjrCFKy4Kh1JhXUBtnb7J4RR2Yed9wDrfftJ_d_yh9uGdW9S34lOE0TLEZVkc5oJKWnhL7tVBGdsQf1Ya_WtFd1CAM1v7Ae59YUa3PYfJliTQOXKiJzWpPAF9RcIXWXMBZkG7g_xHtusqZWIFpJ0gYdgKB)
If you care about the future of this country... _if you care about what happens in next November's election,_ [**please take 5 minutes out of your day to respond.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2d56933d69014ce78869623b852045e9&_e=eebcvcVb-YK35h7KleuJqA81dqYKTiQUNJc1-QvqXc5OlTGuD3s1mJCHSAz8NJkEeTlcGDHsgrR6KoNHkQyINHtSPJozN_85jfIw7WAWmukpKvxLVCLscVHtQAMCXGO_lTUbRWFIODUyAChg5AtbCzPjVFLxcuRQQ0Q6axX9xgR5zv68vqC354zFPIaRi9ZxIzXR9ViGJsp4NyeXsQG85CCux8H2GTkddFHNuMaTVyTLc_2XaieeN5l8IqGLG-1POGVM1JQnmwhXsxv-Vx5KR1z71K3xvnUQQ7H3pSQuJc4kgGjXeUewTPd5-SzkXWgT_v66KSdyBnq4QQpbpo2oofGBiQNA8wNJk1ii9BU_-ZiwoKES5JFMnkPx7s4UN9NLkDEuE6pbjYwZrVOJSqyauJccci1SAg9Q7C59-8UtvAk6l7JgqAF9Xb6e-HA9eHlc)

As Speaker of the House, there are many pressing issues that come across my desk each day, [**so I want to ensure I am dedicating my time and energy to the issues you care about most.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2d56933d69014ce78869623b852045e9&_e=eebcvcVb-YK35h7KleuJqA81dqYKTiQUNJc1-QvqXc5OlTGuD3s1mJCHSAz8NJkEeTlcGDHsgrR6KoNHkQyINHtSPJozN_85jfIw7WAWmukpKvxLVCLscVHtQAMCXGO_lTUbRWFIODUyAChg5AtbCzPjVFLxcuRQQ0Q6axX9xgR5zv68vqC354zFPIaRi9ZxIzXR9ViGJsp4NyeXsQG85CCux8H2GTkddFHNuMaTVyTLc_2XaieeN5l8IqGLG-1POGVM1JQnmwhXsxv-Vx5KRyYYBoVS50RWY2LgvW8ZuTDqhKQnmakxTVBcLZOMGMsfbFUj3hucSOJhJnuEoq0m2MnFjcwA1VSptGW5evETM7m8BDztpXy3FB2jeAFaXkHAdkO2VGDTP_RC-ErYY9NNs8_t9CPoDe1E21-t_HqsO9wv7ZbXYstKcDgLuHuKftYU)

clean_body: If you do one thing today, please let it be responding to this email. I urgently need to hear from you. | | Look around, Peter. Right now, in America... Children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. As Speaker of the House, my mission is clear: we must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. As we aim to make history in the 2024 Election, I need to have my hand on the pulse of the most important thing: American voters. -RESPOND TO SPEAKER JOHNSON- If you care about the future of this country... if you care about what happens in next November's election, As Speaker of the House, there are many pressing issues that come across my desk each day, My team has identified you as a reliable voice in Republican politics, which is why I am asking for your important input. clean_body: Did you catch our executive director in the Boston Globe? | | Team, Our amazing executive director, Kelly Hall, was featured in the Boston Globe where she’s sounding the alarm and fighting back against attacks on the ballot measure process. As our successful ballot measures have shown time and time again, when lawmakers refuse to get past partisan gridlock and the people are empowered to show up to the ballot box, progressive policies win. That’s why conservative lawmakers are attacking this process. They know when their constituents are allowed to vote, they will choose progress. = = We’ve been prepared to push back against attempts to belittle ballot measures for years. In 2021, we launched the Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign (BMRC) to fight back against attempts to rollback voters’ power at the ballot box. And since then, we’ve fought back and WON in states like Ohio and South Dakota. We know that these attacks will continue to come. That’s why we need to suit up for the battles that are sure to come next year. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you! Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: DC Daily Journal
subject: stop eating oatmeal and quinoa
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

You've been told over and over in
the media that foods like oatmeal and quinoa are good for you,
and you should eat lots of them. But what most people don't
realize is that these two particular foods contain compounds that
can actually harm your health and your digestion in many ways...

And as your favorite
Nutritionist, I'll explain why in this quick email, so you can
avoid further harming your health and digestion with these
so-called "healthy" foods...

1. Oatmeal and Oat Milk

While oatmeal is touted as a
healthy carb and a source of fiber, unfortunately there are more
cons than pros with this food...

The first problem with oats is
that they are loaded with a compound called phytic acid
(phytates) that significantly lowers your absorption of certain
minerals and vitamins, such as calcium, magnesium, and zinc.

So whenever you eat oats, the
phytic acid causes you to absorb less of these vitally important
minerals which could cause health problems if you eat oats too
frequently, since most people already don't get enough minerals
like magnesium and zinc.

The second problem with oats is
that they contain one of the highest residue concentrations of
the toxic herbicide glyphosate, which can damage your gut, and
have been linked to other health problems like cancer, hormone
issues, and more.

The next major problem with oats
is that they are a significant source of mycotoxins in the diet,
which are mold based toxins that can cause an array of gut
problems, hormone problems and more.

Lastly, oats can also contain
high levels of the toxic heavy metal Cadmium, which is linked to
health problems as this toxic heavy metal accumulates in your
body.

2. Quinoa

Quinoa is another food that is
pitched as a health food or a "superfood". Unfortunately, this
is another example of a food that has more downsides than good
sides.

First off, quinoa is high in
compounds called saponins, that have been shown in some studies
to cause gut damage and contribute to "leaky gut".

Another problematic compound in
quinoa are lectins, which are a type of antinutrient that can
damage the cells of your intestines, and contribute to several
gut disorders and immune system problems.

Many friends and colleagues of
mine have reported feeling abdominal pain after eating quinoa,
bloating, and loose stools or diarrhea, as well as triggering of
autoimmune conditions such as skin conditions.

Now that we've talked about why
we should avoid oatmeal and quinoa if we want to avoid many of
these health issues, let's look below at a unique way to HEAL
your gut, get rid of gas and bloating, increase energy, and lose
fat easier...

Broccoli vs Kale vs Green
Beans... (the #1 WORST veggie for your gut & energy)
According to the best-selling
author and world-renowned heart surgeon, Dr. Steven Gundry,
there's one veggie people over 40 should never eat.

This veggie can damage your gut
and disrupt your hormones... It contains a toxin that damages the
lining of your intestines, causes bloating, embarrassing gas, and
a bulging belly.

Do you know the veggie I'm
talking about? Make sure you do by clicking the one below you
think it is, and get the answer from Dr. Gundry himself on the
next page:

>> Green Beans

>> Broccoli

>> Kale

>> Cauliflower

clean_body: Please read the following message from our sponsor. You've been told over and over in the media that foods like oatmeal and quinoa are good for you, and you should eat lots of them. But what most people don't realize is that these two particular foods contain compounds that can actually harm your health and your digestion in many ways... And as your favorite Nutritionist, I'll explain why in this quick email, so you can avoid further harming your health and digestion with these so-called "healthy" foods... 1. Oatmeal and Oat Milk While oatmeal is touted as a healthy carb and a source of fiber, unfortunately there are more cons than pros with this food... The first problem with oats is that they are loaded with a compound called phytic acid (phytates) that significantly lowers your absorption of certain minerals and vitamins, such as calcium, magnesium, and zinc. So whenever you eat oats, the phytic acid causes you to absorb less of these vitally important minerals which could cause health problems if you eat oats too frequently, since most people already don't get enough minerals like magnesium and zinc. The second problem with oats is that they contain one of the highest residue concentrations of the toxic herbicide glyphosate, which can damage your gut, and have been linked to other health problems like cancer, hormone issues, and more. The next major problem with oats is that they are a significant source of mycotoxins in the diet, which are mold based toxins that can cause an array of gut problems, hormone problems and more. Lastly, oats can also contain high levels of the toxic heavy metal Cadmium, which is linked to health problems as this toxic heavy metal accumulates in your body. 2. Quinoa Quinoa is another food that is pitched as a health food or a "superfood". Unfortunately, this is another example of a food that has more downsides than good sides. First off, quinoa is high in compounds called saponins, that have been shown in some studies to cause gut damage and contribute to "leaky gut". Another problematic compound in quinoa are lectins, which are a type of antinutrient that can damage the cells of your intestines, and contribute to several gut disorders and immune system problems. Many friends and colleagues of mine have reported feeling abdominal pain after eating quinoa, bloating, and loose stools or diarrhea, as well as triggering of autoimmune conditions such as skin conditions. Now that we've talked about why we should avoid oatmeal and quinoa if we want to avoid many of these health issues, let's look below at a unique way to HEAL your gut, get rid of gas and bloating, increase energy, and lose fat easier... Broccoli vs Kale vs Green Beans... (the #1 WORST veggie for your gut & energy) According to the best-selling author and world-renowned heart surgeon, Dr. Steven Gundry, there's one veggie people over 40 should never eat. This veggie can damage your gut and disrupt your hormones... It contains a toxin that damages the lining of your intestines, causes bloating, embarrassing gas, and a bulging belly. Do you know the veggie I'm talking about? Make sure you do by clicking the one below you think it is, and get the answer from Dr. Gundry himself on the next page: > Green Beans > Broccoli > Kale > Cauliflower DCDailyJournal.com 525-K East Market Street # 114 City: Leesburg State: Virginia Zip Code: 20176 © Copyright DCDailyJournal.com All Rights Reserved. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: They are torturing this woman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Wanted to make sure you saw yesterday’s email.

Just last night, the nine Republicans on the Texas Supreme Court told Kate
Cox she’ll have to wait to get the life-saving abortion she needs until
they decide what she and her doctors can do with her body. They are
torturing this woman.

Each of these Supreme Court justices are chosen through partisan
elections. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231209.YpOd8U&refcode=ema20231209-236109&t=1001&akid=236109%2E444211%2EeY-Lj2 ]Please chip in $3 today to help us mobilize
the voters we need to fire them next year.

— Beto

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Email from December 8, 2023 is forwarded below:

Last week, pregnant 31-year-old Kate Cox learned that her baby was
developing with an umbilical hernia, a twisted spine, and an irregular
heart and skull. It wouldn’t survive outside of the womb.

Her doctors told her that continuing the pregnancy could lead to serious
complications, including permanent infertility and death. But because of
the extreme abortion laws in Texas, they couldn’t help her.

In a last-ditch effort, Kate went to court seeking permission for an
emergency abortion. Yesterday, moved to tears by Cox’s story, the judge
ruled in her favor.

At last, some hard-won justice for a woman whose life depends on it.

But then, just hours later, Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton threatened
to throw Cox’s doctors in prison *for life* if they performed the
procedure.

In a state that already leads the country and much of the developed world
in its rate of maternal mortality, Republicans are now going woman by
woman, doctor by doctor, blocking access to lifesaving care.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231209.YpOd8U&refcode=ema20231209-236109&t=1002&akid=236109%2E444211%2EeY-Lj2 ]If you’re as sickened by this as I am, please make a contribution today
to help us replace these cruel, failed politicians with pro-choice leaders
in 2024.

Earlier this week, we launched the largest Democratic voter registration
program in Texas. We’re training and deploying thousands of volunteers
across the state to bring eligible, but unregistered Democrats onto the
rolls ahead of the critical 2024 elections.

Please chip in whatever you can afford to help us ramp up this effort, win
these elections, and ultimately restore every woman’s freedom to make her
own decisions about her own body, her own health care, and her own future.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231209.YpOd8U&refcode=ema20231209-236109&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=236109%2E444211%2EeY-Lj2 ]DONATE

Thank you,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=236109%2E444211%2EeY-Lj2

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Hi team, it’s Marissa — Nikki’s campaign manager — back with a simple request: **[Now that Nikki has officially filed for reelection, can you start a $3 monthly recurring contribution?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74882849/442929473/-104351985?amount=3&recurring=yes&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231209_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTI0MjExNi1jMTk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HcP17YIDiq2IgFhSzom6x-fFYm5_qMUOQuhZ5QxUnoU=)** Yes, you read that right. For less than the price of a cup of coffee, you can begin pitching in a monthly gift to our campaign and power our efforts to keep Nikki fighting for working families across IL-13. Now, we’re pulling back the curtain to make sure you know about his radical, dangerous agenda. Tammy’s new opponent is **“totally opposed to abortion”** and committed to passing his anti-abortion agenda at the federal level. Hovde supported overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , which sent Wisconsin back to its draconian 1849 abortion ban. name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: This holiday season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC
body:
| Peter —

This holiday season, I want to say thank you for standing by me and my fellow Democrats.

Grassroots supporters like you are what motivates us to work every day to make progress in our communities. I am extremely grateful for all you do to protect democracy and move our nation forward, not back.

I hope you get a chance to connect with your loved ones and rejuvenate before the start of the New Year.

Enjoy a recipe below for the holidays and follow me **_[@cleancookingcongresswoman](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74883185/442930711/-367444636?refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20231209_EN_1.1_0_1MO_debbie_NA_NA_holiday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmE0ZDE3Zi1jMjk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-7CvPK-45NrzRMCzM5eLm9aPyiIfV0qKTV0zjMAxi0Y=&emci=92784840-dd95-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=66a4d17f-c296-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=5260669)_** for more recipes.

From my family to yours, Happy Holidays!

— Debbie
* * *
**PULL APART MENORAH PIZZA (ADAPTED FROM JAMIE GELLER RECIPE)**
**Ingredients:**
* 12 ounces pizza dough
* 3⁄4 cup pizza sauce
* 1⁄2 cup shredded mozzarella
* 2 teaspoons Jamie Geller Za'atar, divided
* Extra virgin olive oil for brushing
* 1 clove garlic, minced

**Instructions:**

Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
1. Roll out the pizza dough into a large circle on a piece of parchment paper. Using a pizza cutter, pastry cutter or knife cut across in half.
2. Spread the sauce over one half-moon of dough. Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese and zaatar. Flip the other half moon over top of the filling. Stretch the dough to cover completely.
3. Using a pizza cutter or knife, make slices about 1 inch apart from the middle outward to create 5 curved arms on each side, leaving the middle intact.
4. Pull the bottom strips into the center and twist and fold over to create the base. Twist the remaining 4 strips on each side. Fold and twist the middle while Pulling up to make the shamash. the middle to stretch and make taller than the rest.
5. In a small bowl, mix olive oil with garlic and remaining zaatar and brush over top. Bake for 12-15 minutes

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: When I say policy is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
It’s a little long, but I hope you’ll take the time to read it.
#
Team, I want to take a moment to tell you the story of the little boy in the picture above—my story and why I’m running for Congress—and I hope you’ll let me. [**(If you’re ready to do the thing — flip NY-17 and retake our Democratic House majority — split a donation between my campaign and The Long Run here today.)**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-mondaire-split.IhGW7T&refcode=em231209-1-t2&t=1&akid=5062%2E196590%2EroodX8)
I say “policy is personal,” because, for me, it is.
I was born and raised in Spring Valley, New York, by a single mother who worked multiple jobs to keep food on the table. Even though she worked around the clock, we still needed Section 8 housing and food stamps to get by.
When child care was too expensive, I often went to work with my grandma, who worked well past the age of retirement cleaning homes, while my grandpa worked as a janitor at the local middle school.
I was lucky to be raised by a hard-working family, which did everything it could to provide me with what I needed. But life wasn’t always easy, and I often think about what a profound difference affordable child care, health care, and better wages would have made in easing the burdens on my mother and grandparents.
Despite our circumstances, my mom always taught me to dream big, and that’s exactly what I did. I’m here running to return to Congress to keep fighting for families like mine and ensure _everyone_ has the opportunities and resources to not only survive, but to thrive.
[**Split a donation of $3 or whatever works for you today between my campaign and The Long Run to flip NY-17, retake our Democratic majority, and create a government that works for all of us.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-mondaire-split.IhGW7T&refcode=em231209-1-t2&t=2&akid=5062%2E196590%2EroodX8)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Mondaire Jones and The Long Run immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-mondaire-split.lZau3R&amount=5&refcode=em231209-1-t2&t=21&akid=5062%2E196590%2EroodX8)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-mondaire-split.4FIo3J&refcode=em231209-1-t2&t=22&akid=5062%2E196590%2EroodX8)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-mondaire-split.52_RMb&refcode=em231209-1-t2&t=23&akid=5062%2E196590%2EroodX8)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-mondaire-split.iHSDDt&refcode=em231209-1-t2&t=24&akid=5062%2E196590%2EroodX8)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-mondaire-split.Av-EuS&refcode=em231209-1-t2&t=25&akid=5062%2E196590%2EroodX8)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-mondaire-split.IhGW7T&refcode=em231209-1-t2&t=26&akid=5062%2E196590%2EroodX8)
Let me be frank, there are not many members of Congress with backgrounds like mine. Most members of the House and Senate are millionaires; many are worth upwards of tens of millions of dollars.
Corporate lobbyists from Big Oil to Big Pharma spend billions trying to influence elected officials like Republican Mike Lawler—himself a former oil and gas lobbyist—to maintain the status quo and keep our government working solely for the wealthy and well-connected.
It’s created a system of government that makes it all too easy to give corporate bailouts and tax breaks for billionaires, while keeping everyday people locked in a struggle just to make ends meet.
We need more leaders committed to making sure our government serves the public interest—not corporate profiteers or power-hungry politicians.
Because for me, policy is personal, I will:
* Put the lives of our children over the NRA to enact common-sense gun safety regulations.
* Continue to lower prescription drug costs so everyone has the lifesaving medications they need, without being forced to work multiple jobs or past retirement to pay for them.
* Protect access to abortion, so everyone can make their own health care decisions.
* Ensure wages are high enough to meet the daily costs of living.

[**Legislation that actually helps people isn’t a pipe dream. With your support, we will flip NY-17, retake our House majority, and create a government responsive to the needs of everyday people. Split a donation of $3 to send me back to Congress. Let’s make our dream a reality.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-mondaire-split.IhGW7T&refcode=em231209-1-t2&t=27&akid=5062%2E196590%2EroodX8)
Sincerely,
Mondaire

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=5062%2E196590%2EroodX8). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=5062%2E196590%2EroodX8)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=5062_196590_roodX8&akid=5062%2E196590%2EroodX8)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=31&akid=5062%2E196590%2EroodX8)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Biden & the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest.

And at this point, I'm at the end of my wits, Friend.

If I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**This is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's Secretary of the Interior and I was Ground Forces Commander for SEAL Team 6.**
**Now I 'm endorsing Trump in 2024. And if President Trump can't win Montana, nobody can.**
I'm running for Congress in the most important race in America.

I led the team of Navy SEAL's running for Congress, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm the toughest Republican in Washington D.C.
**Biden hates me because I 'm Trump's friend and close ally. And if he can destroy a Trump Patriot like me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.**

| | Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

name: Barbara Grassley
subject: Are you baking this weekend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
|
---
Every year, Chuck and I look forward to celebrating special traditions during the holiday season.

Before we worship in church and gather around the tree on Christmas morning, there's important business to get to first: baking cookies!

The wonderful smells, tastes (and kitchen mess!) bring up wonderful memories. I remember baking with my mother and it's wonderful to see this tradition continue with our grandkids. I bet your family hands down recipes from one generation to the next, as well.

**If you're looking for a tried and true sugar cookie recipe, I've got one to share with you today. It's a great one for cookie exchanges, too!
**

Peter,

The Democrats’ Senate majority is r _azor thin - but right now, they’re raising millions to not just defend it, but also EXPAND it and cause more damage to America!_

**All of the political pundits in Washington D.C. are saying that Democrats are a shoo-in to keep control of the Senate. Now, it’s up to us to prove them wrong.**

**[Please, will you pitch in now to help us win and defend Republican Senate seats in battleground states and TAKE BACK our majority?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=61583c21431c496c9ff20e9a61ee90a3&_e=G7Q9iTdlekhGBWV-prp-u6phMF1c5ATPsa9nRG1uQQ1iyTYmhXhQ3gRMmo4ijvcdP5RMbYBzibuNANAwZC8GAQSs_6QzfkcGemc9m6lRhc0gkjdYiugn8XbRNxiuAMKk7JymO26u9NhhmsRmXX5vSJuNo5UK31ueKkMRSPPOCYw2VRw5RKMLX9CR_r_nN93ILsl15RiIBW19NaYebQbxSihMU5waLfSvkmJZnz3NdYNq6G1g-NUkwAc0jDwdzHovLXRlVXYX2ZmSHJ3l--oRd2ZPHlxDg_d6HjYlhTaoY5464Bj6WKdi3Vqt3PRt2g3pw_hAQf2efyz_ujxSeR-Wt5XFz1gLyeTc5FF7TzOXq5Y%3D)**

I know we have the best grassroots team in the country, and it’s going to take every single one of us doing our part if we’re going to win.

clean_body: | | | Peter, The Democrats’ Senate majority is r azor thin - but right now, they’re raising millions to not just defend it, but also EXPAND it and cause more damage to America! All of the political pundits in Washington D.C. are saying that Democrats are a shoo-in to keep control of the Senate. Now, it’s up to us to prove them wrong. I’m fighting tooth and nail to hold onto this seat, Peter. If we lose just a single Republican seat in the Senate, we’ll lose all chances at taking back our majority. I know we have the best grassroots team in the country, and it’s going to take every single one of us doing our part if we’re going to win. Thank you Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

**Look around, Fellow American. Right now, in America...**
_Children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves._

_The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God._

_Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes._

_Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth._

_Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives._

**As Speaker of the House, my mission is clear: we must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. **

As we aim to make history in the 2024 Election, I need to have my hand on the pulse of the most important thing: _**American voters.**_

[**Which is why I am conducting a _critical_ American Voter Survey today.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=34883afee3ce4b9d9a39ed9da511edcc&_e=eEriq8OrLI1ET11ICJ1eaMnedrusOPDuHfvzOn8EH5HXuLlor8uSurPNHcVW2_Zu0hn-Qjx9-moTd78SQe9OSFXflGXhpMVdtnL6dziXWpgJZz_6Ql7k9_3BmMx5TDvV_wHHe-C8T6FWJ8Nw12WeKqdC6NoXPETLJifrhqev8uTFtPMDBUY6jDGhoJQuMzolDdCIDfms88Bk1fF2onJZn_GwvpYp7hPwGpiM-sTuZT3IOj9Ob2pNQWPJt-HUfHAKEvDqFaLM2GXtrZY6y6vxDK-7UzG_y99YNAWbKLavKHxZURiNT4epHsFgUy-0zgDStn-ZCKIuXIQbxvgcvPSlKfAzjnhUmx5g9fmZ_fAma3QS4FMewOeEd7k4f_9B-KR50e0Eq0AX58Y9k0sVU4ni-d2zRq-44WxfrlOv6mAUI_I%3D)

Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. As Speaker of the House, my mission is clear: we must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. As we aim to make history in the 2024 Election, I need to have my hand on the pulse of the most important thing: American voters. -RESPOND TO SPEAKER JOHNSON- If you care about the future of this country... if you care about what happens in next November's election, As Speaker of the House, there are many pressing issues that come across my desk each day, My team has identified you as a reliable voice in Republican politics, which is why I am asking for your important input. If I am going to successfully help elect strong conservative leaders to Congress in 2024, I need to hear from you in the next hour. -RESPOND TO SPEAKER JOHNSON- Thank you for being a reliable member of Team Johnson. Gratefully, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. Would you take a moment to complete my today? Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input. | SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Fred Guttenberg
subject: I’m with Debbie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Friend
I’m writing to you today because I am proud to endorse Debbie Mucarsel-Powell for U.S. Senate in Florida.
I love Florida, and am proud to call it home — but our state has been victim to some of the worst mass shootings in our country. Florida families, including mine, have been shattered by shootings in Parkland, Fort Lauderdale, and Orlando.
I know from personal experience that Florida desperately needs a leader in the United States Senate who cares about public safety and fiercely defends the right of every Floridian to live free of gun violence. Debbie Murcasel-Powell is that leader. Meanwhile, as a Senator, Rick Scott has sided with the gun lobby every time.
Debbie is up against a man who bought this Senate seat for himself last time round — and still only won by less than 1%! I hope you’ll join me in supporting Debbie Mucarsel-Powell for Senate by splitting a gift between her campaign and Serve America — with grassroots support, I know she can deliver the leadership Florida deserves. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Thank you for being in this fight. I know Debbie, and I know we can build a brighter future for Florida.
Fred Guttenberg
Brady PAC National Advisory Council
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]

body:

Now, we have a special election on February 13, 2024. That is only 67 days from now!!
This will be a tough special election. National Republican groups will spend millions against me. With your help and the help of a grassroots team we can win NY-03.
Your help has never been more important!! So, Peter, I’m humbly asking for your support. clean_body: Peter, it’s Tom Suozzi. Roland Gutierrez asked me to reach out with an important message. Big news!! I was officially nominated as the Democratic nominee to take back the seat formerly held by George Santos! Now, we have a special election on February 13, 2024. That is only 67 days from now!! This will be a tough special election. National Republican groups will spend millions against me. With your help and the help of a grassroots team we can win NY-03. Your help has never been more important!! So, Peter, I’m humbly asking for your support. name: A.G. Holder Alert
subject: “Will you join us in sustaining this nationwide fight for fairness in our democracy?”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, after last month’s elections, Attorney General Eric Holder had this to say: | “Voters have unequivocally voiced their rejection of the corrosive influence of far-right extremism, standing tall in protection of their fundamental rights.

**Will you join us in sustaining this nationwide fight for fairness in our democracy?”

_– Attorney General Eric Holder_**
---
[JOIN THE FIGHT FOR FAIRNESS!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74885042/442936714/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231209_FR_12E_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1MmJkZTNkLWM3OTYtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jLHjU6mPtMpc_xhmMcSvDu-qqC_2o5iMTHuUzM9BGRo=)
---
A.G. Holder is right: Voters across the country have _repeatedly_ made their voices heard in favor of democracy and against far-right extremism.
→ In **Ohio** , voters blocked GOP efforts to restrict their power and chose to protect abortion rights in the state constitution.

→ In **Pennsylvania** , voters rejected a judicial candidate who promoted Donald Trump’s Big Lie and selected a fair-minded justice.

→ In **Virginia** , fairer maps, which our movement helped secure, allowed voters to make their voices heard by electing pro-choice, pro-democracy candidates across the state.
**_Your grassroots support helped make these victories possible!_

[_Team, the 2024 elections will be here before we know it – so our nationwide fight for fairness has never been more important. clean_body: | Team, after last month’s elections, Attorney General Eric Holder had this to say: | “Voters have unequivocally voiced their rejection of the corrosive influence of far-right extremism, standing tall in protection of their fundamental rights. Will you join us in sustaining this nationwide fight for fairness in our democracy?” – Attorney General Eric Holder = A.G. Holder is right: Voters across the country have repeatedly made their voices heard in favor of democracy and against far-right extremism. → In Ohio , voters blocked GOP efforts to restrict their power and chose to protect abortion rights in the state constitution. → In Pennsylvania , voters rejected a judicial candidate who promoted Donald Trump’s Big Lie and selected a fair-minded justice. → In Virginia , fairer maps, which our movement helped secure, allowed voters to make their voices heard by electing pro-choice, pro-democracy candidates across the state. name: Jon Tester
subject: not taking anything for granted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I’m humbled by this team and the support our campaign has received. Thanks to you, TV ads are up and running across Montana to share my story and what I’m fighting for.

| Hey, Peter.

I’m humbled by this team and the support our campaign has received. Thanks to you, TV ads are up and running across Montana to share my story and what I’m fighting for. But unfortunately, we’re not the only ones picking up the pace.

Mitch McConnell has me set in his sights, and I know national Republicans will spend just about anything to try and beat me. Just last month, a super PAC flooded the airwaves in Montana to support one of my potential opponents.

**They’re spending so much money to try and turn me into someone I’m not because they know they can’t beat who I am.**

But we’re not taking anything for granted. Here’s what I know about my team—we won’t be outworked, but we might be outspent.

**If we continue to have the resources to reach and turn out Montana voters, we’ll win this election. It’s that simple—and I’m asking you to help:**

[_**Will you split a contribution of any amount right now between Fight for Progress and my campaign to help us build the strongest team we can? This is a battleground race, and every dollar makes a difference.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74885360/442937813/665036970?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-12-9_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0NzViMzA5LWM5OTYtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0Oiy_x7zJt1sVL6lSiODySOXBJOaWtm1Kwp83rtXpqQ=)

Friend,

Ohio doesn't need another Senator kowtowing to D.C. politicians and the party line.

Ohio needs leaders.

Matt Dolan is focused on serving the people of Ohio. He's built a proven conservative record helping Ohioans save their hard-earned money, build businesses, and live free.

**On the other hand -- Sherrod Brown has spent his entire time in the U.S. Senate serving his party's leadership, and he has voted with Joe Biden **98.5%** of the time.**

**Here 's EXACTLY what Sherrod Brown stands for ->**
* Expanding the Supreme Court and packing it with far-left judges.
* Keeping our unsecured southern border wide open.
* Gutting our healthcare system and eliminating private health insurance.
* Ending the filibuster to enforce the Far-Left agenda.
* Undermining American energy independence and Ohio jobs.

Sherrod Brown's blind loyalty is a disservice to the people of this great state. It's time to get Ohio back on track and start putting the **PEOPLE** first.

clean_body: You deserve to know the truth. | Friend, Ohio doesn't need another Senator kowtowing to D.C. politicians and the party line. Ohio needs leaders. Matt Dolan is focused on serving the people of Ohio. He's built a proven conservative record helping Ohioans save their hard-earned money, build businesses, and live free. On the other hand -- Sherrod Brown has spent his entire time in the U.S. Senate serving his party's leadership, and he has voted with Joe Biden 98.5% of the time. Here 's EXACTLY what Sherrod Brown stands for -> Expanding the Supreme Court and packing it with far-left judges. Keeping our unsecured southern border wide open. Gutting our healthcare system and eliminating private health insurance. Ending the filibuster to enforce the Far-Left agenda. Undermining American energy independence and Ohio jobs. Sherrod Brown's blind loyalty is a disservice to the people of this great state. It's time to get Ohio back on track and start putting the PEOPLE** first. | Best, Team Dolan | Matt Dolan is running for U.S. Senate in Ohio he needs YOUR HELP. Rush a contribution below! | PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

name: Maxwell Frost
subject: for my loved ones, and yours, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS

| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/FYBIRQ871bokwdK_Mr0n3A~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnV0VHP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTIwOV9lbV9mcl9iMV9maWdodGluZ2Zvcl9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MzEmY2RtYz0yWkg4cjg2UmF1M3JxRHM1Qjh2VDBnZ3RBcEEmcmVmY29kZTI9MlpIOHI4NlJhdTNycURzNUI4dlQwZ2d0QXBBJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJaSDhyODZSYXUzcnFEczVCOHZUMGdndEFwQVcDc3BjQgplc0fAdGV3Rtp-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)
