[I’m about to ask for your help raising $5,861 before my midnight deadline.](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/07oO2D1_yUqyVsUfyeSC1w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnV0VHP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTIwOV9lbV9mcl9iMV9maWdodGluZ2Zvcl9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yWkg4cjg2UmF1M3JxRHM1Qjh2VDBnZ3RBcEEmcmVmY29kZTI9MlpIOHI4NlJhdTNycURzNUI4dlQwZ2d0QXBBJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJaSDhyODZSYXUzcnFEczVCOHZUMGdndEFwQVcDc3BjQgplc0fAdGV3Rtp-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) But first, it is important you understand why I ran to serve one of the most diverse districts in the country, where there’s been a serious lack of investment and most people can’t afford an unexpected $300 expense. I’m fighting for the people of this country who politicians have failed time and time again. People who deserve better. **People like my mom and abuela.** My mother and grandmother came here from Cuba during the freedom flights in the late 1960s. What my family had to go through just to eat and have a roof over their heads, is a testament to the resilience and drive of immigrants. But it is also an incredibly sad story. What would it have been like if our country was committed to equity when moving here? If money wasn’t an issue? If she had not been exploited by Miami factories that had her working 70+ hours a week for almost nothing. Where would our people be? **People like my biological mother.** A victim of the system and enmeshed in trying circumstances, she turned to drugs and crime while pregnant with me. She had no access to healthcare and wasn’t able to see a doctor once during her pregnancy. In the wealthiest country in the world, she was neglected by society and left without anyone to turn to. As the mother of seven, she made the difficult decision to put me up for adoption because she lacked the resources to care for and raise another child. **People like my barber.** He was deprived of his right to vote due to a 20 year old felony. He committed a crime of desperation, served his debt to society, and became a successful businessman. Yet he still couldn’t participate in our democracy. I’m so very proud that while working at the ACLU, I organized the movement that restored voting rights to 1.6 million Floridians with previous felonies. But there is so much work to be done. **People like Josh.** A houseless man I met when I was pumping gas last year. One of my campaign buttons rolled out the door when I was getting out of the car. He picked it up and asked “who is Maxwell Alejandro Frost?” I told him it was me and we got to talking about what I hoped to do if I was elected. He couldn’t conceive of the possibility of Medicare for All and healthcare as a human right, because he hadn’t been to the doctor in years. He asked me _“what do I have to do to deserve healthcare?”_ **This system that makes life more difficult for the most vulnerable among us is no accident, Peter. It is by design. And the people who want to keep it that way will spend countless sums of dark money to stop any chance of progress we have.** [I came to Congress so I could fight for my loved ones and yours, but I'll only stay here with the support of grassroots donors like you. Thank you for reading, now let’s keep fighting, together:](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/07oO2D1_yUqyVsUfyeSC1w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnV0VHP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTIwOV9lbV9mcl9iMV9maWdodGluZ2Zvcl9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yWkg4cjg2UmF1M3JxRHM1Qjh2VDBnZ3RBcEEmcmVmY29kZTI9MlpIOHI4NlJhdTNycURzNUI4dlQwZ2d0QXBBJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJaSDhyODZSYXUzcnFEczVCOHZUMGdndEFwQVcDc3BjQgplc0fAdGV3Rtp-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) | | | [Donate $10](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/d1qfh3_IkT46BWSfAMriwg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnV0VHP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTIwOV9lbV9mcl9iMV9maWdodGluZ2Zvcl9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MTAmY2RtYz0yWkg4cjg2UmF1M3JxRHM1Qjh2VDBnZ3RBcEEmcmVmY29kZTI9MlpIOHI4NlJhdTNycURzNUI4dlQwZ2d0QXBBJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJaSDhyODZSYXUzcnFEczVCOHZUMGdndEFwQVcDc3BjQgplc0fAdGV3Rtp-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

Debbie’s mom worked double shifts to afford rent for their one room apartment. When Debbie turned 15, she started working at the local doughnut shop to help make ends meet.
Because of their relentless hope and hard work, Debbie graduated college, helped expand health care access in her community, and eventually became the first South American immigrant elected to Congress.

**Rick Scott, on the other hand, has spent his time in the Senate working to _destroy_ the opportunities that make the American dream possible. **

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Our party’s job is to show voters a better path forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Katie flipped a Republican held seat blue in 2018.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=34490%2E3422442%2ENcNdAG)
Just another week for House Republicans...
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231209?refcode=EMA023_1_REP_20231209_V1_F&refcode2=34490_3422442_NcNdAG&akid=34490%2E3422442%2ENcNdAG)
**With the midterm elections less than a year away, it’s our party’s job to show voters a different way forward, instead of the hard-right path the GOP continues to walk.** House Republicans have just a few seat majority, and some of Democrats' best pick-up opportunities are right here in California.
California is key to flipping the House and making Johnson’s Speakership a short one. **Katie flipped a Republican held seat blue in 2018,** so she knows firsthand the support candidates need, how to talk with voters of all persuasions, and how to turnout Democrats on Election Day. She always says her responsibility as a Senate candidate is to uplift down-ballot candidates so that Democrats win big across the country, across every level of government in 2024.
That’s exactly what our campaign is doing—let’s show Republicans we’re not going to stand by. [**Can you chip in today to help us reach key voters up and down the state?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231209?refcode=EMA023_1_REP_20231209_V1_F&refcode2=34490_3422442_NcNdAG&akid=34490%2E3422442%2ENcNdAG)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231209?refcode=EMA023_1_REP_20231209_V1_F&refcode2=34490_3422442_NcNdAG&akid=34490%2E3422442%2ENcNdAG)
Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMA023_1_REP_20231209_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=34490_3422442_NcNdAG&akid=34490%2E3422442%2ENcNdAG)**

That’s why monthly recurring donations from supporters like you are so important. | | | I’m a planner, friend. And planning is one of the most important aspects of running a campaign. Me and my team can only plan if we have an idea of how much money we will be bringing in each month. Now, that ebbs and flows, but consistent money is key. That’s why monthly recurring donations from supporters like you are so important. Folks giving $5, $10, or even $20 each month are the lifeblood of my campaign. Every single donation we receive makes a difference in helping me win this race to give our district the representation it deserves, but recurring donations help power us every month. I know committing to give your money to a campaign every single month is a big deal. But if you’re able, a monthly donation will help to power everything we do throughout the race. **Look around, Fellow American. Right now, in America...**
_Children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves._

_The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God._

_Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes._

_Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth._

_Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives._

**As Speaker of the House, my mission is clear: we must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. **

As we aim to make history in the 2024 Election, I need to have my hand on the pulse of the most important thing: _**American voters.**_

name: Ted Lieu
subject: HUMILIATING loss
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress

Peter, I only reach out when it’s important, so hear me when I say: this is as important as it gets.

Peter,
I only reach out when it’s important, so hear me when I say: this is as important as it gets:
_**[My friend Raja Krishnamoorthi is just 9 hours away from his midnight deadline -- and as of 3pm, he still needs 600 gifts to reach his goal. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74886195/442941014/-1810142053?refcode=20231209_em_fr_b1_lieu_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTdkNGM4OC1jZDk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uOSTQt3-zhkBEFP9JanJnuXWRq995UJ78bn0s6HQ9HM=)**_
[_**That’s why I’m rallying Democrats from coast to coast today to help Raja reach his critical goal, close this fundraising gap, and hand Republicans a HUMILIATING loss. Can I count on you before midnight? >> **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74886196/442941015/-1810142053?refcode=20231209_em_fr_b1_lieu_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTdkNGM4OC1jZDk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uOSTQt3-zhkBEFP9JanJnuXWRq995UJ78bn0s6HQ9HM=)
Peter, let me explain:
Raja is working night and day to:
\-- Defend healthcare access from Republican attacks
\-- Protect our communities from gun violence
\-- Grow our economy and create good-paying jobs from coast to coast
\-- And so much more
Meanwhile, MAGA Republicans are busy defending insurrectionists, calling for a MASSIVE tax increase on the middle class, and pushing baseless investigations against President Biden and our Democrats.
**[Simply put, it’s never been more clear that Raja is _exactly_ the kind of leader we need to keep in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74886197/442941016/-1810142053?refcode=20231209_em_fr_b1_lieu_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTdkNGM4OC1jZDk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uOSTQt3-zhkBEFP9JanJnuXWRq995UJ78bn0s6HQ9HM=)**
[_**That’s why I’m proud to stand by Raja, Peter. I know he will do everything in his power to make sure Democrats take back the Majority and make sure Republicans never hold an ounce of power over us again. But he still needs 600 gifts to reach his goal. Will you stand with Raja and rush in $14 before midnight? >> **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74886198/442941017/-1810142053?refcode=20231209_em_fr_b1_lieu_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTdkNGM4OC1jZDk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uOSTQt3-zhkBEFP9JanJnuXWRq995UJ78bn0s6HQ9HM=)

Friend - It all started in this small 10x10 office in New York. I didn’t have a fancy office like I did on Wall St. I didn’t have a team working for me around the clock. I didn’t have mega donors funding my campaign. You see, when I left J.P Morgan I had two things - a laptop and desire to serve. But I knew I had to answer the call to continue my service to this country before the America I knew was gone for good. Now, THIS is where the magic happens. I’ve been spending the day speaking with the incredible supporters and donors who are backing my plan to get this country back on track. And I can’t help but feel that this was the BEST decision of my life. Because of YOU, Friend! But my 2 man operation here on the ground is a grind. We work long days and sleepless nights. But It’s always worth it when I know I’m fighting for YOU. **[That’s why I wanted to ask if you’d take this priority survey so we know what you care about the most, Friend!](http://links.friendsofkellencurry.com/u/click?_t=6ee7a82151bd4c5caddc8b7097991cb3&_m=82610eeaa67b406886207af09f3ca360&_e=M_YSOCxykiEIjYRXT8e7H5ecteqYSVjqMFsGSNRusrIJW4FFVnFnu431P3J-xcD8kjHVH9PiGgha5joWivJ84ReDGVL-07lpuVE4rQrPs8_J0Jz5X-ZgKH-c0QezVIWU6jFShlDMN4_gtWIKYGVCHja0SDSskaTEKXIPF22bdusXhG-UGMYiAG8G1TcpD7OPPdat-CvAxFWsLcH3j_kI5qMpJ0768TWSPGIpdV5kYaT1S0Mmv435xGsgYpUViRJlPSahAkZGlA4YfC0WNpUBRha1zj_R_aVkOeRu3YP5Zawltpl_bWMVIP9ZGP-iBQqZJvJTYY40ZD6wXHoZPZXoLvlROhrOf4kOhdYh8HraQTp60-V3SJTpa4RxSbbg93NdNh4bZyIBM-C_kxGBqh4cX1YN3q3nO4WeeUuqC_Aw2_wsuOEgjFB9C67k7oo-pAJc)**

body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-dec2023-fr-december?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-dec2023-fr-december?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Herding cats is no task for the faint of heart, friend. And based on his latest announcement, it looks like Kevin McCarthy would rather abandon ship than even try:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/km-meow?refcode=E5435-20231209-WhiteElephant-IMAGE-Other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/km-meow?refcode=E5435-20231209-WhiteElephant-IMAGE-Other]

GOOD RIDDANCE, KEV! » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/km-meow?refcode=E5435-20231209-WhiteElephant-SB-Other]

You’ve gotta hand it to him, though. Forcing the longest Speakership vote in recent history, threatening to fight... well, anyone who opposed him on the House Floor, and getting ousted by the Freedom Claw-cus?! That’s a banner year in our books.

Friend, his departure will shrink Republicans’ House majority down to just two seats , so barring special election results, this could mean we only need to flip two seats to take back the House in 2024.

Commemorate Kevin’s cat-astrophic year (and help us start mobilizing to replace his soon-to-be vacant seat!) by getting your Kevin McCatnip toy before the holidays! Just like Kevin, everything must go! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/km-meow?refcode=E5435-20231209-WhiteElephant-SL-Other]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/km-meow?refcode=E5435-20231209-WhiteElephant-IMAGE-Other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/km-meow?refcode=E5435-20231209-WhiteElephant-IMAGE-Other]

GONE, BUT NEVER FUR-GOTTEN » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/km-meow?refcode=E5435-20231209-WhiteElephant-SB-Other]

Don’t let the door hit ya on the way out, Kev.

— Team Swalwell

body:
The GOP is playing political games while our friends dodge bullets.
#
Derek,
More than 400 officers are taking their leadership positions now that we forced Tommy Tuberville and the GOP to stand down and unfreeze their promotions.
But fresh off of one manufactured crisis, the GOP is ready to push us into another.
The people of Ukraine are fighting off a murderous dictator. They are holding the line for democracy — not just in their country, but for all of Europe. America has supported Ukraine every step of the way.
Until now.
**[Watch our new video, “Waiting,” and then contribute to help us eviscerate the GOP for politicizing aid for Ukraine.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec23-waiting.mfIbUF&refcode=em231209-1-30-NOR&t=1&akid=21297%2E3013755%2EBL0Dk7)

Republicans in the House and Senate have held up critical aid for Ukraine.
The GOP is playing political games while our friends dodge bullets.
The American people still support Ukraine. Victory in Ukraine is still critical to our National Security and critical to ending Putin’s expansionist aims. And our aid has never been more important to them than it is now.
But the Republican Party, from the top down, is worse than AWOL — they’re actively opposing it.
We **_will**_ hold the GOP accountable for this, and VoteVets gets results.
**[Please, chip in whatever you can to help VoteVets pressure Republicans in Congress and the Senate. Help us get this aid moving, before it’s too late.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec23-waiting.mfIbUF&refcode=em231209-1-30-NOR&t=3&akid=21297%2E3013755%2EBL0Dk7)

Peter, With 2024 just around the corner, United Rural Democrats is getting ready for one of the most important political battles in the history of our nation. December is an important time to build relationships and strategize for the next year, and this year it’s more essential than ever. This month, we’re focused on:

name: www.officialderrickgates.com
subject: Vote Derrick Gates 66th Assembly Central Committee
body:
66th Assembly Central Committee Dear friends and fellow Conservatives, I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=86196.87.1.d8a8fffd6b2fce295fb01668249bc762)
---
[](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=86196.88.1.660872323bdcd6118a00af0155c09f27) |
---
## 66th Assembly Central Committee
---
|
---
Dear friends and fellow Conservatives,
I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee.
As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member.
While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future.
I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond.
Thank you for your support and dedication to our party.
Sincerely,
Derrick R. Gates
[officialderrickgates.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=86196.89.1.6825cedfdde528b8875115b6ccc947b8)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Sign the Petition: Protect grizzly bears hibernating this December from cruel trophy hunters
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2186034?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **Friend,** imagine you are a mama grizzly bear... it’s December, and it is time to get your cubs ready for hibernation! You know from past winters how much of a challenge it could be -- to hunt and search for food when the rivers begin to freeze over and plants begin to die. **There is not much time or resources left to prepare your den!** As you roam around the forest on your daily hunt for food, you trek through layers of snow with your bear cubs. You suddenly come across a pile of food out in the open. JACKPOT! There is no need to question how exposed the pile is, you’re happy to discover something to feed your **hungry, weak babies.** You take a quick glance around and after assuming safety, you approach the available grub with your cubs close behind you. Leaning into the pile, **PIERCING** sounds fill the frigid air and **_SHARP_ pains spread across your side. **You cry out in pain and _COLLAPSE_ to the ground. You cannot move, and it is getting harder to breathe. You are dying. Your bear cubs, confused and scared, are now left to**STARVE** and will soon die without their mother. It takes only **_ONE_ **bullet to **_KILL_ **a mama grizzly. Vicious trophy hunters are mercilessly hunting and killing these beloved creatures for sport, leaving their vulnerable orphaned cubs to and die of**STARVATION and HYPOTHERMIA** during the harsh winter months. And as waterways begin to freeze and plants die, food searching and hunting can be an******impossible** challenge for grizzly bear cubs. GOP legislators and hunting lobbyists in Northern Rocky Mountain states are actively proposing**_cruel anti-bear laws_** and want to **REMOVE EXISTING PROTECTIONS **to make it even easier to**_BRUTALLY SLAUGHTER_ **these beloved animals. [**Please, Friend, defenseless grizzlies desperately need us to be their voice this winter. Can they count on you to help protect them from cruel trophy hunters? Take action now >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2186035?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2186036?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Grizzly bears are an iconic, treasured North American species. We are experiencing a drastic decline of grizzly bears — with _**only 2,000 grizzlies remaining**_ in the lower 48 states. _**There was once a roaring population of 50,000 grizzlies in the continental U.S.!**_ With the population plummeting, we are losing time to restore this fragile population before it becomes extremely difficult.
Despite the devasting numbers, **Republicans want to go even further and remove more protections for grizzly bears** in the Greater Yellowstone and Northern Continental Divide ecosystems. **Please Friend, grizzly bear cubs can’t fight off trophy hunters and hunting lobbyists alone.[We need 4,972 signatures to demand better protections for vulnerable grizzly bears before we lose this species for good! Take action NOW! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2186037?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2186036?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for protecting grizzly bears,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)

name: South Bay CRA
subject: 66th Central Committee Christmas Party
body:
Christmas Party News Friends, The holiday season is upon us, and we are thrilled to invite you to our upcoming Christmas Party on Tuesday Dec, 12th
| |
---
|
---
# Christmas Party
---
---
|
---
# News
Friends,
The holiday season is upon us, and we are thrilled to invite you to our upcoming Christmas Party on Tuesday Dec, 12th at 7 pm. We can't wait to celebrate with you and spread some holiday cheer!
The party will be a night full of fun and excitement, with plenty of opportunities to make new memories and cherish old ones. We encourage everyone to wear their best Christmas outfits to add to the festive mood of the night. We will also have a professional photographer on hand to capture the best moments of the night so you can cherish them forever.
As a highlight of the evening, we will be presenting two Republicans of the Year awards, recognizing the outstanding contributions of our community members to our party. You won't want to miss this exciting moment!
We hope you can join us for this joyous occasion. Please RSVP so we can plan accordingly. We look forward to celebrating the holiday season with you and many candidates running for local office! We will be holding the event at Rock & Brews in Redondo Beach (Torrance address)
Sincerely,
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
In addition please see the press release statement from my husband Derrick Gates below.

|
---
|

body:
CRA Christmas Party CRA Christmas Party For those that don't know, my wife is the South Bay CRA president and our Christmas party is this Tuesday. D
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=93072.95.1.e18192b000632faa7fe48f964d6d2fa4)

## CRA Christmas Party
---
|
---
# CRA Christmas Party
For those that don't know, my wife is the South Bay CRA president and our Christmas party is this Tuesday. Details below.
Friends,
The holiday season is upon us, and we are thrilled to invite you to our upcoming Christmas Party on Tuesday Dec, 12th at 7 pm. We can't wait to celebrate with you and spread some holiday cheer!
The party will be a night full of fun and excitement, with plenty of opportunities to make new memories and cherish old ones. We encourage everyone to wear their best Christmas outfits to add to the festive mood of the night. We will also have a professional photographer on hand to capture the best moments of the night so you can cherish them forever.
As a highlight of the evening, we will be presenting two Republicans of the Year awards, recognizing the outstanding contributions of our community members to our party. You won't want to miss this exciting moment!
We hope you can join us for this joyous occasion. Please RSVP so we can plan accordingly. We look forward to celebrating the holiday season with you and many candidates running for local office! We will be holding the event at Rock & Brews in Redondo Beach (Torrance address)
Sincerely,
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
|
---
## 66th Assembly Central Committee
---
|
---
Dear friends and fellow Conservatives,
I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee.
As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member.
While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future.
I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond.
Thank you for your support and dedication to our party.
Sincerely,
Derrick R. Gates
[officialderrickgates.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=93072.97.1.d1f9e6285907d70fe8cfbee1bdebe450)

Hello,
**[Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to make a donation to Adam Frisch’s campaign against Lauren Boebert before our final federally-mandated FEC fundraising deadline of the year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74887826/442946496/1610638071?refcode=em20231209pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=9072d6ea-d596-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDcyZDZlYS1kNTk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Inylw8qXNpDE-s6Nq5jr3xhHMbmMbR46_G4S-0_b9O8=)**

What if we told you that we’re facing our FINAL FEC fundraising deadline of the year?
What if we told you that, after December 31st, we’re required by law to make all of our fundraising numbers public – and that reporters, Boebert’s Super PACs, and the national Democratic and Republican parties will all be scouring our report?
**And what if we told you that Adam out-raised Boebert last quarter, but we’re still extremely short of our $2 million online goal – with time quickly running out?**
$5 might not seem like much against Lauren Boebert’s millions and her Super PAC allies, but if tens of thousands of people like you chip in now, Adam will win and send Boebert packing.
**Adam’s not taking money from corporate PACs like Boebert is, and this is your _last_ chance to donate before our FEC fundraising deadline and before our numbers go public:**
**[Please, will you give $5 or more right now to Adam Frisch’s campaign – whatever you can afford before our final federally-mandated FEC fundraising deadline of the year – to help him defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024? No amount is too small and every dollar counts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74887827/442946497/1610638071?refcode=em20231209pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=9072d6ea-d596-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDcyZDZlYS1kNTk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Inylw8qXNpDE-s6Nq5jr3xhHMbmMbR46_G4S-0_b9O8=)**

clean_body: Is there anything we can say to convince you to make a donation to Adam Frisch’s campaign against Lauren Boebert before our federally-mandated FEC fundraising deadline? Hello, = What if we told you that last year – after a recount – Adam lost to Boebert by just 546 votes in what was the closest race in the entire country? What if we told you that the first polling shows Adam narrowly LEADING – 50% to 48% – and the political pundits all say that Adam absolutely can defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024? What if we told you that we’re facing our FINAL FEC fundraising deadline of the year? What if we told you that, after December 31st, we’re required by law to make all of our fundraising numbers public – and that reporters, Boebert’s Super PACs, and the national Democratic and Republican parties will all be scouring our report? And what if we told you that Adam out-raised Boebert last quarter, but we’re still extremely short of our $2 million online goal – with time quickly running out? $5 might not seem like much against Lauren Boebert’s millions and her Super PAC allies, but if tens of thousands of people like you chip in now, Adam will win and send Boebert packing. Adam’s not taking money from corporate PACs like Boebert is, and this is your last chance to donate before our FEC fundraising deadline and before our numbers go public: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Your donation now is about so much more than the amount you can afford to give. It’s about standing up to extremism, protecting our democracy, and finally restoring some sanity to Washington. Thank you for being a critical part of Adam’s grassroots-powered campaign, Team Frisch ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

---
**Did you see the BREAKING news!?!**
**MAGA Republicans’ plan to destroy the USPS _is working!!_** | [1,000 RESPONSES NEEDED: PLEASE, TAKE OUR EMERGENCY POSTAL WORKER APPROVAL POLL SO WE CAN HAVE THE DATA WE NEED TO SAVE THE USPS! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20231209_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20493%2E4449941%2Eib1Vn4)

Look, MAGA Republicans saw the power the USPS held in keeping our democracy functional during the pandemic. ⬇

So they hired Trump-fan and MAGA donor, Louis DeJoy, to destroy the USPS _and their plan is working!!!_

**Now the USPS is at the risk of COLLAPSE, so we need 1,000 Democrats like you to take our emergency poll so we can have the data we need to see our successful Save USPS Strategy through!**

body:

— Bob Casey for Senate

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Win for the People!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
We scored a HUGE victory for We The People!

|
---
| | | **We scored a HUGE victory for We The People!
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=blt_acs_12_9_23_email_1_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
**We scored a HUGE victory for We The People!**
Our team sued Utah Lt. Governor Deidre Henderson and Ryan Cowley, the Director of Elections of the State of Utah, over the Beehive State’s unconstitutional early filing deadline that prevents ballot access for independent presidential candidates.
Our lawsuit rightly claimed, _“[T]he current deadline is the earliest deadline ever sought to be imposed on independent presidential candidates in the modern era. No federal court has ever upheld a January deadline [for independent presidential candidates].”_
THE GOOD NEWS IS Lt. Governor Henderson _agreed with us and moved Utah’s unconstitutional ballot access deadline from Jan. 8, 2024 to March 5, 2024_.
**In response to this historic ruling, RFK Jr. said:**
| |
---
| **_“In a democracy, the people are supposed to decide with their votes who gets into office. Not state officials who prevent popular candidates from getting on the ballot.”_**
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=blt_acs_12_9_23_email_1_1_nd&n=2)
---
|
---
Utah is one of a number of states that have set extremely difficult barriers to any independent candidate getting on the ballot.
This early show of strength sends a strong message to the mainstream media, and our volunteers and supporters across the country, that we will do everything in our power to give all voters an independent choice free from the broken two-party system.
In an effort to keep our ballot access momentum going in every state across the union, please consider a gift of support today!
We need all hands on deck–your hands too!
[Please chip in $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more right now.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=blt_acs_12_9_23_email_1_1_nd&n=3)
Together we can secure the future of America.
Team Kennedy
[TeamKennedy.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=blt_acs_12_9_23_email_1_1_nd&n=4)
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=blt_acs_12_9_23_email_1_1_nd&n=5) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=h1LOxbVy26ImgEbXJVo-ZdMp9-e17RgxqtIk69rUIjeOqT1-oa6z7jeUAIaHEF2m&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=blt_acs_12_9_23_email_1_1_nd&n=6) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=blt_acs_12_9_23_email_1_1_nd&n=7) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=blt_acs_12_9_23_email_1_1_nd&n=8) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzI54ka0wzIYPxyZaEWdcWSHecUzjTC_26r6_PMq84pDYNHmKWp713umpU1ZYCPsJg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=blt_acs_12_9_23_email_1_1_nd&n=9)

name: Team Gillibrand
subject: it's a very special day...🎂
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
help make Kirsten's birthday extra special
| | |
---
**Friend, today is a very important day for all of us on Team Gillibrand...it's Kirsten's birthday!**
Kirsten has spent all year fighting tirelessly for working families in the Senate. So, to wish her happy birthday and thank her for all that she's done, we've set a goal to raise $5,000 for Off the Sidelines.
Kirsten started Off the Sidelines more than a decade ago to encourage more Democratic women to run for office and make sure they had the financial resources to do it! Since creating Off the Sidelines, Kirsten has raised $12 million for women running for office across the country — and inspired giving circles who've raised another $15 million.
**Off the Sidelines is a cause near and dear to Kirsten's heart — and we know that hitting this goal would mean so much to her.[_So please, will you help make this day extra special for Kirsten by donating $5 or more to Off the Sidelines? We're showing Kirsten how much we've raised later tonight, so be sure to get your gift in ASAP!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74888477/442948999/1171552878?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4621-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWYxOWVlNi1kYzk2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hyMu3IM6tpH4KvoHtfkHoSlcZo_Ri0FTfjandvQfgQI=)**

clean_body: help make Kirsten's birthday extra special | | | Friend, today is a very important day for all of us on Team Gillibrand...it's Kirsten's birthday! Kirsten has spent all year fighting tirelessly for working families in the Senate. So, to wish her happy birthday and thank her for all that she's done, we've set a goal to raise $5,000 for Off the Sidelines. Kirsten started Off the Sidelines more than a decade ago to encourage more Democratic women to run for office and make sure they had the financial resources to do it! Since creating Off the Sidelines, Kirsten has raised $12 million for women running for office across the country — and inspired giving circles who've raised another $15 million. Off the Sidelines is a cause near and dear to Kirsten's heart — and we know that hitting this goal would mean so much to her.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for helping us celebrate Kirsten's birthday! — Team Gillibrand | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

**Look around, Fellow American. Right now, in America...**
_Children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves._

_The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God._

_Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes._

_Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth._

_Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives._

**As Speaker of the House, my mission is clear: we must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. **

As we aim to make history in the 2024 Election, I need to have my hand on the pulse of the most important thing: _**American voters.**_

* * *
Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8b1f33da1d0040ce97aaac7da3759e69&_e=DBlkW1rHPuWgAPTEOyGv5AKuWCBRhKkOqjFDOMDmZcGsTDxlXvw2x907m1Y9nsgbGyZnL8brSODAWqPLgTNkNL6liL8WuSHlSqQ5GDw5gREqmm_gDoh659DuEHrJ0sbv8A8nDrzL3n0yrHF8KqgQTDPFm3ZsMlViiR8FsmvAzAfEHFNt9myLWrOp0AAxatW5L12RiuxDmRaByEHqXLbUsKX8WV5JdOpDxHKTgqq3Nl79M6vLeHPTVQQzNiKlwiX72O3byhsDti2kIRbK_5gAjDLLucU_Wd4xYRPLhDOTkEq65mqcfojiJw125APbrxZ1VQYPbXmUmZQwGzaX3YwH0id6Z06CpHX5iJCmZcmxwCtkhqWkBVQ2UvuvsbgdCEbzAIkfkhYhq0R92R0On_uc2QlKRjukHg2Pwa3KJTwdEac%3D)

---

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8b1f33da1d0040ce97aaac7da3759e69&_e=DBlkW1rHPuWgAPTEOyGv5MBd-Pf4CP9EyIw7kU2ZZpR2xf2mfcdmuzqb9PT_MxZCvfzam0QdVGsf8UmVmhLwelmOaFt3creXlQCk25Mlef9QPNxTCAOm4y20au-9kK40PEGQ7j8cCEIkV15rFwCO9Q8453-cXFSiNksS0eYpeio7gJWZENAXIhVe6wQD-s73ZgN5K44daeRr5e0C7060XSWGjE7Cz7B0xkkRohYqd9Q%3D) [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8b1f33da1d0040ce97aaac7da3759e69&_e=DBlkW1rHPuWgAPTEOyGv5A0-EYWz7JuG4aA0uGvt6IwWcDmnRPz8u2olorfrEvpLVZvLvqKjK-TVaYfLmYzCD1YjiTaNhatPiy0x3sVnYPyDBbEXj0D2hDeTbUu_crecq_NK7ZR4dze7BByWsD2ZXdozCOMMQFzjZvsKi40ZNmRXB8yFBauYvtjtbpbKT2uZXt5DAQ1gEN87W50JnVTnj7pkiXj5O5jhhArrHWb27B8%3D) [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8b1f33da1d0040ce97aaac7da3759e69&_e=DBlkW1rHPuWgAPTEOyGv5G7HNP5fwcEKMdzc8xmlrsdB5KfwuK1IrDhfZ2CM8ebS-Rxzn4GezbawZz-XLhNruFGOSONShj5E6k79yGyORX69bCSCMdV0kTlB5O77FPFUcRu6QkD_C_m0YYd-EKb5zBNDQOZDPfu79zP7OXaa-zIVTJo6dGOM9HPHOwN4BU0yKnN22uxwLnqP8Ivyi2MB-A%3D%3D)

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Bernie on Israel Aid, Barbara Lee on Economic Justice, Richard Wolff on Democracy, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Bernie vs Blank Check for Israel | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13010?t=1011&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]Economic Justice Town
Hall w/ Barbara Lee, Ro Khanna | Prof. Richard Wolff on Wealth Gap &
Democracy | Preparing for 2024 | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1012&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]Our movement is crucial in the call for peace abroad and the fight for
justice here at home. If you’re not already a grassroots supporter, please
consider a monthly donation to power the work of Our Revolution organizers
as we head into 2024.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1013&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

THE PUSH FOR PEACE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12984?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1014&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

Thanks to your surge of support, Bernie Sanders was successful at blocking
$10 billion of unconditional aid to Israel’s extreme right-wing
government!

The aid vote failed 49-51 on Thursday, and there is no doubt that your
thousands of signatures and donations made a big difference.

However, allies of Netanyahu’s regime, like AIPAC, are going to use their
near-unlimited resources to punish progressives for daring to call for an
end to the civilian bombing in Gaza.

Bernie was the only non-Republican Senator to vote against unconditional
aid and will now be the target of enormous pressure to reverse course.

As Bernie said, we cannot be complicit. Hamas is a terrorist group, but
bombing innocent people only causes more death and danger.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12984?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1015&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]Sign now to stand with Bernie and call on Israel to stop violating
international law by bombing civilians.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1016&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

Tens of thousands tuned in this week to Our Revolution’s [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13010?t=1017&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]Economic
Justice Town Hall with Reps. Barbara Lee and Ro Khanna, Professor Richard
Wolff, and worker activists like Sergio Valderrama from around the
country.

We dug into the issues that cut to the core of our shared economic
struggle, including jobs, wages, housing, labor power, healthcare costs,
student debt, greed-flation, and more.

A rigged economic system is crushing people and creating a wealth gap that
has enabled the ultra-wealthy to hijack democracy in America.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1018&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

Rep. Barbara Lee lived the struggle as a single mother and knows the tough
decisions families face when wages are too low, and the rent is too damn
high.

She has spent her life and career waging the fight for economic justice,
and now we have a chance to send her to partner with Bernie Sanders and
speak for our movement in the Senate.

“I know what economic injustice is. I know how people are struggling,”
Barbara said on the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13012?t=1019&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]Town Hall. “We can’t have people just hanging on
the edge in the wealthiest, most powerful country in the world.”

Barbara and Bernie recently teamed up together on the new OLIGARCH Act to
tax the ultra-wealthy. They’re also pushing for a Wall Street speculation
tax, a bill to close the CEO-worker pay gap, an audit of the Pentagon, and
more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13013?source=revreport%3Fsource%3DEM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1020&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13013?source=revreport%3Fsource%3DEM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1021&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]CALL YOUR REPS

“Senator Sanders and I have worked on this daily,” Barbara said. “People
cannot wait. Billionaires are scamming the system, and regular folks are
paying excessive taxes to fuel the Pentagon budget. This is money that
should be invested in healthcare, housing, and lifting people out of
poverty.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1022&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

Rep. Ro Khanna is chairing Barbara Lee’s campaign for the U.S. Senate
because he knows her passion and record and these crucial issues.

“I’ve often said Barbara Lee is the antiwar voice we need, but I could
never have predicted we’d need that voice so urgently in the moment we’re
in,” Ro said on our Town Hall. “If you care about peace, if you care about
a ceasefire in the Middle East, Barbara Lee is the only candidate in this
race to come out for a permanent ceasefire.”

“As is often the case, she is a bit ahead of all of us. She showed the
way, and we’ve got to rally around her. She’s going to win because people
are going to find out California is a progressive, pro-peace state.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12373?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1023&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]HELP US ELECT BARBARA LEE TO THE SENATE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12991?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1024&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

When 1% of America controls nearly a third of the wealth and the bottom
half can claim less than 3%, we’re in trouble, and so is our democracy, Ro
told us.

“For 50 years, there’s been a war on the working and middle class in this
country, and people feel that,” Ro said. “Wages aren’t keeping up, and
folks can’t afford medical debt, student debt, credit card debt. They say,
‘I can’t afford to live in America.’”

“That is the central challenge that the Democratic Party has to tackle,”
he explained, “to create economic opportunity and wealth generation in
every district in America. There are many parts of this country where
there’s no economic opportunities, no job creation, no sense of the
American Dream. This country cannot stand that divided. “

“It’s why I co-chaired Bernie’s campaign and why I’m chairing Barbara
Lee’s campaign. We need to prioritize the working class. That means
Medicare for All, universal childcare, forgiving student loans, free
public college, a living wage, paid family leave, power for labor unions,
and more. We know what needs to be done in this country, and it also means
taxing the ultra-rich.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12991?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1025&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]ADD YOUR NAME — TAX THE RICH

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1026&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

We were excited to have Economist Professor Richard Wolff also join the
Town Hall on Monday!

“The problem for people is an unequal distribution of wealth, which is
used to corrupt our politics,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13014?t=1027&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]Professor Wolff told us. “The rich
understand you can’t have democracy because the mass of people might use
it to change the distribution of wealth, and for that reason, they aim to
stop that process.

“If you want a political democracy, you have no choice but to advocate for
an economic democracy because, without that, you’ll never get the
political democracy either,” he explained.

Wolff said he takes great encouragement from seeing the surge of
unionization and labor strikes — from Starbucks to UAW to graduate
students organizing on campus.

“There is a movement already underway of people saying they don’t need to
live in a world as unequal as this one,” Professor Wolff said. “We can do
better than this, and it’s our job just as the working people who
struggled before us — to stop slavery, to stop feudalism. Now, it’s our
turn to make a better world.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1028&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

Sergio Valderrama is doing just that and making a difference as a worker
activist with Fight for $15 and a Union.

He joined our Town Hall Monday night from his car between DoorDash
deliveries. A McDonald’s worker for 10 years, Sergio has always had to
work two or three jobs to support his wife and children.

Last year, Our Revolution joined Sergio in the fight to win AB257, which
set a $20 minimum wage for fast food workers and gave them a seat at the
negotiating table in California — a form of sectoral bargaining we want to
export around the country.

“Winning this bill was important. It helped a lot with expenses and rent,
but the cost of living keeps going up, and we must keep fighting,” he
said. “And I don’t have insurance, so I can’t actually afford to go see
the doctor.”

Sergio speaks for so many of us, and we’re proud to be with him in this
working-class movement to demand real change and elect progressive leaders
who fight alongside us.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1029&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]CHIP IN TO POWER THIS MOVEMENT

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1030&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

On Tuesday, federal call center workers are traveling to DC to demand
action from the Biden administration to turn their “low-wage, dead-end
jobs” into good jobs that support their families and communities — just
like the president promised.

Our Revolution proudly stands with call center workers like Tonya Jackson,
who told us on our live show that she and her coworkers help folks
navigate healthcare but can’t afford to use their own plans. She works a
second job as a home health aide.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13015?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1031&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]RSVP TO JOIN WORKERS IN DC!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1032&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1033&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

This year, Our Revolution elected 77 new progressive allies to offices up
and down the ballot, thanks to our grassroots supporters and activists!

Our Revolution Board Member Megan Green now leads a progressive majority
in St. Louis, where they passed a universal income program, raised wages,
and took on corporate developers. They’re now working on tenants’ rights
and giving city residents a direct say over spending decisions. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13016?t=1034&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]Read
more here about Megan Green and the power of progressives in St. Louis.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1035&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

Together, we also helped elect Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson, a former
teacher and labor organizer, who has already delivered on his promise to
raise the wage — and not leave tipped workers behind.

And Our Revolution ally Sara Innamorato now joins a progressive trifecta
in Pittsburgh, winning the powerful Allegheny County Executive seat with
the power to help protect abortion care, push for county-wide housing, and
address human rights violations in the county jail.

That’s not all — all of our candidates swept the NYC Council, and we now
have a progressive majority in Minneapolis. We even had a progressive
takeover of the city council in Hilliard, Ohio, and we’re one seat away
from getting control of the council in Duluth, Minnesota!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13017?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1036&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

Every seat matters. That’s why Our Revolution is gearing up NOW for 2024
to expand our organizational capacity and our voter turnout operation for
the crucial battles to come.

Not only must we defeat Donald Trump and the far right, but we have got to
take back the House, defeat enemies of progress like Kyrsten Sinema in the
Senate, and elect amazing progressives like Barbara Lee to turn this ship
around.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13017?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1037&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]If you can, please kick in a few bucks to help us staff up for the big
elections ahead in 2024 — there’s no time to waste!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13018?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1038&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

AIPAC lobbyists are getting ready to spend over $100 MILLION to try to
replace pro-peace members of Congress like Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar,
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, Summer Lee, Jamaal Bowman, and Ayanna
Pressley — at a time when 66% of Americans want our government to work
toward a ceasefire.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13018?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1039&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]SIGN NOW to protect our progressive caucus from cynical dark money and
rightwing attacks. The working class can't afford to lose the power of
these seats.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12488?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1040&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

In September of 2001, Barbara Lee cast the lone “No” vote in Congress
against a blank check for war in Afghanistan. She endured death threats,
hate mail, and media slander for years. But history vindicated her.

Today, Barbara Lee is the only candidate for U.S. Senate in California
calling for a ceasefire in Gaza. Check out this [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12238?t=1041&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]LA Times article on
why Barbara is the Peace Candidate in this race compared to her opponents,
Katie Porter and Adam Schiff.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12488?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1042&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

Last week, Our Revolution leaders joined Barbara Lee at the CA Democratic
Convention, where we helped organize delegates to endorse her for Senate!
She got the most votes at 42% — beating out opponents Adam Schiff and
Katie Porter!

This is HUGE. And, with the powerful endorsements of national progressive
leaders like Reps. Pramila Jayapal, Cori Bush, Ayanna Pressley, and many
others, Barbara is the clear progressive choice for the U.S. Senate seat
in California.

“Our momentum is picking up speed. The people want a tried and tested
progressive with the record to prove it. I’m ready to deliver,” Barbara
said.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12373?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1043&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]JOIN PROGRESSIVES FOR BARBARA LEE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1044&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8510?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1045&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]FRESH NEW MERCH!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8510?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1046&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

We know what we’re fighting for, but we need to share the message far and
wide. Get your new Our Revolution T-shirt and advocate for our progressive
values everywhere you go!

We are proud to stand up for Education for All, Racial Justice,
Reproductive Rights, Medicare for All, Economic Justice, Labor Rights,
Housing for All, Environmental Justice, LGBT+ Rights, and so much more. In
short: JUSTICE FOR ALL.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8510?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1047&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]GET YOUR NEW SHIRTS TODAY!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12528?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1048&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

You can help elect Barbara Lee from anywhere in the country by making
calls as part of Our Revolution’s Phone Bank Team. It’s a lot of fun, but
this is serious business because we know what it would mean to get a
powerhouse like Barbara in the U.S. Senate!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12528?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1049&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ]PHONE BANK FOR BARBARA

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231209_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1050&akid=4984%2E5885482%2EXRLrK5 ][IMG]

From boots on the ground to the halls of Congress — we are building an

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION HEADLINES: Bernie vs Blank Check for Israel | [ ]Economic Justice Town Hall w/ Barbara Lee, Ro Khanna | Prof. Richard Wolff on Wealth Gap & Democracy | Preparing for 2024 | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Our movement is crucial in the call for peace abroad and the fight for justice here at home. If you’re not already a grassroots supporter, please consider a monthly donation to power the work of Our Revolution organizers as we head into 2024. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ THE PUSH FOR PEACE [ ][IMG] Thanks to your surge of support, Bernie Sanders was successful at blocking $10 billion of unconditional aid to Israel’s extreme right-wing government! The aid vote failed 49-51 on Thursday, and there is no doubt that your thousands of signatures and donations made a big difference. However, allies of Netanyahu’s regime, like AIPAC, are going to use their near-unlimited resources to punish progressives for daring to call for an end to the civilian bombing in Gaza. Bernie was the only non-Republican Senator to vote against unconditional aid and will now be the target of enormous pressure to reverse course. As Bernie said, we cannot be complicit. Hamas is a terrorist group, but bombing innocent people only causes more death and danger. [ ]Sign now to stand with Bernie and call on Israel to stop violating international law by bombing civilians. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Tens of thousands tuned in this week to Our Revolution’s [ ]Economic Justice Town Hall with Reps. Barbara Lee and Ro Khanna, Professor Richard Wolff, and worker activists like Sergio Valderrama from around the country. We dug into the issues that cut to the core of our shared economic struggle, including jobs, wages, housing, labor power, healthcare costs, student debt, greed-flation, and more. A rigged economic system is crushing people and creating a wealth gap that has enabled the ultra-wealthy to hijack democracy in America. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Rep. Barbara Lee lived the struggle as a single mother and knows the tough decisions families face when wages are too low, and the rent is too damn high. She has spent her life and career waging the fight for economic justice, and now we have a chance to send her to partner with Bernie Sanders and speak for our movement in the Senate. “I know what economic injustice is. I know how people are struggling,” Barbara said on the [ ]Town Hall. “We can’t have people just hanging on the edge in the wealthiest, most powerful country in the world.” Barbara and Bernie recently teamed up together on the new OLIGARCH Act to tax the ultra-wealthy. They’re also pushing for a Wall Street speculation tax, a bill to close the CEO-worker pay gap, an audit of the Pentagon, and more. [ ][IMG] [ ]CALL YOUR REPS “Senator Sanders and I have worked on this daily,” Barbara said. “People cannot wait. Billionaires are scamming the system, and regular folks are paying excessive taxes to fuel the Pentagon budget. This is money that should be invested in healthcare, housing, and lifting people out of poverty.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Rep. Ro Khanna is chairing Barbara Lee’s campaign for the U.S. Senate because he knows her passion and record and these crucial issues. “I’ve often said Barbara Lee is the antiwar voice we need, but I could never have predicted we’d need that voice so urgently in the moment we’re in,” Ro said on our Town Hall. “If you care about peace, if you care about a ceasefire in the Middle East, Barbara Lee is the only candidate in this race to come out for a permanent ceasefire.” “As is often the case, she is a bit ahead of all of us. She showed the way, and we’ve got to rally around her. She’s going to win because people are going to find out California is a progressive, pro-peace state.” [ ]HELP US ELECT BARBARA LEE TO THE SENATE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] When 1% of America controls nearly a third of the wealth and the bottom half can claim less than 3%, we’re in trouble, and so is our democracy, Ro told us. “For 50 years, there’s been a war on the working and middle class in this country, and people feel that,” Ro said. “Wages aren’t keeping up, and folks can’t afford medical debt, student debt, credit card debt. They say, ‘I can’t afford to live in America.’” “That is the central challenge that the Democratic Party has to tackle,” he explained, “to create economic opportunity and wealth generation in every district in America. There are many parts of this country where there’s no economic opportunities, no job creation, no sense of the American Dream. This country cannot stand that divided. “ “It’s why I co-chaired Bernie’s campaign and why I’m chairing Barbara Lee’s campaign. We need to prioritize the working class. That means Medicare for All, universal childcare, forgiving student loans, free public college, a living wage, paid family leave, power for labor unions, and more. We know what needs to be done in this country, and it also means taxing the ultra-rich.” [ ]ADD YOUR NAME — TAX THE RICH ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] We were excited to have Economist Professor Richard Wolff also join the Town Hall on Monday! “The problem for people is an unequal distribution of wealth, which is used to corrupt our politics,” [ ]Professor Wolff told us. “The rich understand you can’t have democracy because the mass of people might use it to change the distribution of wealth, and for that reason, they aim to stop that process. “If you want a political democracy, you have no choice but to advocate for an economic democracy because, without that, you’ll never get the political democracy either,” he explained. Wolff said he takes great encouragement from seeing the surge of unionization and labor strikes — from Starbucks to UAW to graduate students organizing on campus. “There is a movement already underway of people saying they don’t need to live in a world as unequal as this one,” Professor Wolff said. “We can do better than this, and it’s our job just as the working people who struggled before us — to stop slavery, to stop feudalism. Now, it’s our turn to make a better world.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Sergio Valderrama is doing just that and making a difference as a worker activist with Fight for $15 and a Union. He joined our Town Hall Monday night from his car between DoorDash deliveries. A McDonald’s worker for 10 years, Sergio has always had to work two or three jobs to support his wife and children. Last year, Our Revolution joined Sergio in the fight to win AB257, which set a $20 minimum wage for fast food workers and gave them a seat at the negotiating table in California — a form of sectoral bargaining we want to export around the country. “Winning this bill was important. It helped a lot with expenses and rent, but the cost of living keeps going up, and we must keep fighting,” he said. “And I don’t have insurance, so I can’t actually afford to go see the doctor.” Sergio speaks for so many of us, and we’re proud to be with him in this working-class movement to demand real change and elect progressive leaders who fight alongside us. [ ]CHIP IN TO POWER THIS MOVEMENT ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] On Tuesday, federal call center workers are traveling to DC to demand action from the Biden administration to turn their “low-wage, dead-end jobs” into good jobs that support their families and communities — just like the president promised. Our Revolution proudly stands with call center workers like Tonya Jackson, who told us on our live show that she and her coworkers help folks navigate healthcare but can’t afford to use their own plans. She works a second job as a home health aide. [ ]RSVP TO JOIN WORKERS IN DC! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] This year, Our Revolution elected 77 new progressive allies to offices up and down the ballot, thanks to our grassroots supporters and activists! Our Revolution Board Member Megan Green now leads a progressive majority in St. Louis, where they passed a universal income program, raised wages, and took on corporate developers. They’re now working on tenants’ rights and giving city residents a direct say over spending decisions. [ ]Read more here about Megan Green and the power of progressives in St. Louis. [ ][IMG] Together, we also helped elect Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson, a former teacher and labor organizer, who has already delivered on his promise to raise the wage — and not leave tipped workers behind. And Our Revolution ally Sara Innamorato now joins a progressive trifecta in Pittsburgh, winning the powerful Allegheny County Executive seat with the power to help protect abortion care, push for county-wide housing, and address human rights violations in the county jail. That’s not all — all of our candidates swept the NYC Council, and we now have a progressive majority in Minneapolis. We even had a progressive takeover of the city council in Hilliard, Ohio, and we’re one seat away from getting control of the council in Duluth, Minnesota! [ ][IMG] Every seat matters. That’s why Our Revolution is gearing up NOW for 2024 to expand our organizational capacity and our voter turnout operation for the crucial battles to come. Not only must we defeat Donald Trump and the far right, but we have got to take back the House, defeat enemies of progress like Kyrsten Sinema in the Senate, and elect amazing progressives like Barbara Lee to turn this ship around. [ ]If you can, please kick in a few bucks to help us staff up for the big elections ahead in 2024 — there’s no time to waste! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] AIPAC lobbyists are getting ready to spend over $100 MILLION to try to replace pro-peace members of Congress like Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, Summer Lee, Jamaal Bowman, and Ayanna Pressley — at a time when 66% of Americans want our government to work toward a ceasefire. [ ]SIGN NOW to protect our progressive caucus from cynical dark money and rightwing attacks. The working class can't afford to lose the power of these seats. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] In September of 2001, Barbara Lee cast the lone “No” vote in Congress against a blank check for war in Afghanistan. She endured death threats, hate mail, and media slander for years. But history vindicated her. Today, Barbara Lee is the only candidate for U.S. Senate in California calling for a ceasefire in Gaza. Check out this [ ]LA Times article on why Barbara is the Peace Candidate in this race compared to her opponents, Katie Porter and Adam Schiff. [ ][IMG] Last week, Our Revolution leaders joined Barbara Lee at the CA Democratic Convention, where we helped organize delegates to endorse her for Senate! She got the most votes at 42% — beating out opponents Adam Schiff and Katie Porter! This is HUGE. And, with the powerful endorsements of national progressive leaders like Reps. Pramila Jayapal, Cori Bush, Ayanna Pressley, and many others, Barbara is the clear progressive choice for the U.S. Senate seat in California. “Our momentum is picking up speed. The people want a tried and tested progressive with the record to prove it. I’m ready to deliver,” Barbara said. [ ]JOIN PROGRESSIVES FOR BARBARA LEE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ]FRESH NEW MERCH! [ ][IMG] We know what we’re fighting for, but we need to share the message far and wide. Get your new Our Revolution T-shirt and advocate for our progressive values everywhere you go! We are proud to stand up for Education for All, Racial Justice, Reproductive Rights, Medicare for All, Economic Justice, Labor Rights, Housing for All, Environmental Justice, LGBT+ Rights, and so much more. In short: JUSTICE FOR ALL. [ ]GET YOUR NEW SHIRTS TODAY! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] You can help elect Barbara Lee from anywhere in the country by making calls as part of Our Revolution’s Phone Bank Team. It’s a lot of fun, but this is serious business because we know what it would mean to get a powerhouse like Barbara in the U.S. Senate! [ ]PHONE BANK FOR BARBARA ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] From boots on the ground to the halls of Congress — we are building an organized progressive movement at every level of government. If you’re already a member of Our Revolution, THANK YOU! If you’re not yet an [ ]official member, please consider signing up for a recurring monthly donation today! [ ]PLEASE SUPPORT OUR REVOLUTION ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! name: Rocky Harrigan
subject: re: My husband
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American,
---
When I’ve looked at the names on the voting booth the past couple of years, I couldn’t help but be disappointed. Time after time, I’ve seen the names of career politicians who are only running for office to make a name for themselves. I know Americans like us deserve better. **That’s why I’m proud to stand with my husband Pat Harrigan during his run for Congress.** I’ve watched Pat defy the odds time and time again, Fellow American. He’s a battle-tested Green Beret who has served in combat zones all over the world. Don’t get me wrong, being a military family is hard. But it was all worth it, because I knew Pat was preserving our freedom for our daughters. _But now that he’s home for good, he’s not about to sit on the sidelines._ My husband didn’t put his life on the line for our freedom just for Joe Biden to take it away. Pat’s running for Congress because he wants to protect our children, fix our economy, take care of our veterans, and make our enemies retreat back to where they came from. **[Now, he needs an A-Team by his side to make it all happen. will you stand up today and support my husband in his run for Congress?](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=f2df59158ac34f30b17e474c87c6c1a1&_e=HQGunevNIGWxxclSWOpavgbsxgXDMBVW9cHUi7x6PYCL4li4TZinhl3o_Zca7xOOf2xfef0vFFboRTbpe4bFmddc0VwVZUKYqDkqXMpbF5ZN5fVFA2cTs5FjULCGAx8z-HTqw8J4YBjs7g3j28WjV-eXqslw5FzJXmOdpuRbGNlC6M1UHhR6iqobL7Tl-Xk8kq_xMXrM0tlHiOL18BaiTxaul43vt6g_jergLY3YvCVybBX4AeMjnbQE1SvCSuOomShRRxfhcGBbSNhH10xM-Okyw2hl7qedtRZEJwt_fcizXsqnv3L56YjStMyWeZP0fcH3qmSTItmGxi7JGRjP3DleIBoM7jcAwyb8wK3g3i7h7tfkP9WyDWGhSlOl2RWe)**

Now, we need his help to defeat our enemies at home: socialism, anti-Americanism, and the woke agenda. clean_body: | | | Fellow American, When I’ve looked at the names on the voting booth the past couple of years, I couldn’t help but be disappointed. Time after time, I’ve seen the names of career politicians who are only running for office to make a name for themselves. I know Americans like us deserve better. That’s why I’m proud to stand with my husband Pat Harrigan during his run for Congress. I’ve watched Pat defy the odds time and time again, Fellow American. He’s a battle-tested Green Beret who has served in combat zones all over the world. Don’t get me wrong, being a military family is hard. But it was all worth it, because I knew Pat was preserving our freedom for our daughters. But now that he’s home for good, he’s not about to sit on the sidelines. My husband didn’t put his life on the line for our freedom just for Joe Biden to take it away. Pat’s running for Congress because he wants to protect our children, fix our economy, take care of our veterans, and make our enemies retreat back to where they came from. When America needed to defeat its enemies abroad, they called in my husband Pat and his fellow Green Berets. Now, we need his help to defeat our enemies at home: socialism, anti-Americanism, and the woke agenda. Pat is the kind of leader America needs RIGHT NOW, but he needs your help defeating the radical Left if he’s going to continue his fight for America. Thank you, Rocky Harrigan | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. clean_body: It’s your choice. | Look, I believe I’m the right person to represent Tennesseans in the Senate. But it’s not up to me. You — the people of Tennessee — are the ones who will need to decide the outcome of this Senate race. That’s why it’s so important that folks see the difference between me and my MAGA opponent, Marsha Blackburn. = | = Thank you! Gloria \----Original Message---- From: Elect Gloria Johnson Date: Dec 3, 2023 Subject: Marsha Blackburn, or Gloria Johnson? This is Marsha Blackburn 👇 = She’s the senior U.S. Senator for Tennessee. She’s also a MAGA devotee who takes money from the NRA, wants to ban abortion, & votes to cut taxes for the rich while working folks make up the difference. This is Gloria Johnson 👇 = She’s running to DEFEAT Marsha Blackburn. She’s an advocate for women, kids, and working families. She’ll stand tall for our most fundamental rights. And she’s not afraid to piss ANYONE off to deliver real results for Tennessee. Gloria’s the leader we need working for us in the Senate, but Marsha won’t go down without a fight. Marsha has a massive campaign war chest and corporate PACs standing by to pour money into this race. It WON’T be easy to keep up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s do this! | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible.
