body:
Time sensitive!? ? ? ? ? Peter,

We hope you had a wonderful kickoff to the Holiday season!

With the end of year rapidly approaching, we're asking you directly if you'll make a contribution to support three crucial climate champions running for reelection to the U.S. Senate.

All three races are MUST-DEFEND seats that will be absolutely critical to defending the pro-environment majority in the Senate ? losing even one can put the majority at risk.

Senators Jacky Rosen (NV), Tammy Baldwin (WI), and Jon Tester (MT) are incredible climate leaders who are counting on climate donors like YOU to help them build momentum into 2024 ? losing any one of these three races would be devastating for our planet and communities. Please do not let that happen, Peter.

Jacky Rosen, Tammy Baldwin, and Jon Tester have worked tirelessly in the Senate to deliver some of the most consequential environmental legislation we have ever seen. Now, they need your help to win their incredibly competitive races in 2024. Will you make a donation through GiveGreen today to support them? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/VXb6s8mpPVsk/YXlKMktNK0ZVZXlpdGgycXdWakhoV1kyMURVZUVIT0FFcXdSck15NWhET2dQZVN0Z1Y3aWZGcFN6SE1PSWxOaUVla3BTM3NiQ25PdlV2aHBVakd3bWFvTHZnNmtkaVFYSmI5T3BBVzZnWFk9S0/ DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/9zEZM8jDapsq/YXlKMktNK0ZVZXlpdGgycXdWakhoV1kyMURVZUVIT0FFcXdSck15NWhET2dQZVN0Z1Y3aWZGcFN6SE1PSWxOaUVla3BTM3NiQ25PdlV2aHBVakd3bWFvTHZnNmtkaVFYSmI5T3BBVzZnWFk9S0/
Jacky Rosen is focused on creating sustainable communities that protect our health and environment and boost the economy in Nevada. In the Senate, she will continue to fight to make Nevada one of the premier places for research and development of renewable energy, particularly solar energy. The last Senate race in Nevada was decided by less than 8,000 votes, and we know this race will be just as close.

Tammy Baldwin has represented Wisconsin in Congress and been a critical climate champion for nearly 25 years. She helped pass the American Clean Energy and Security Act of 2009 and is a fierce advocate for Wisconsin's national treasures, including the Great Lakes and the Ice Age Trail. Her race is certain to be one of the most competitive in 2024!

Jon Tester has shown consistent leadership on climate change, conservation issues, and renewable energy in rural communities. He has worked to hold Big Oil accountable, supporting efforts to end taxpayer handouts and ensure companies pay the full amount for environmentally disastrous spills. His race is a must-win in 2024, and we need your support to defend his Senate seat.

With end of year rapidly approaching, we hope you'll make a contribution to help protect the pro-environment majority in the Senate. Click here to make a donation through GiveGreen today! https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_4bqMr_~yRfg/YXlKMktNK0ZVZXlpdGgycXdWakhoV1kyMURVZUVIT0FFcXdSck15NWhET2dQZVN0Z1Y3aWZGcFN6SE1PSWxOaUVla3BTM3NiQ25PdlV2aHBVakd3bWFvTHZnNmtkaVFYSmI5T3BBVzZnWFk9S0/

Thanks for all that you do, Peter,

Gene Karpinski
LCV Victory Fund DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/NvbyBY4V2bJ4/YXlKMktNK0ZVZXlpdGgycXdWakhoV1kyMURVZUVIT0FFcXdSck15NWhET2dQZVN0Z1Y3aWZGcFN6SE1PSWxOaUVla3BTM3NiQ25PdlV2aHBVakd3bWFvTHZnNmtkaVFYSmI5T3BBVzZnWFk9S0/

| | **BREAKING NEWS:

Election experts at the _Cook Political Report_ just downgraded Montana’s Senate race from “Lean Democratic” to “TOSS-UP”!** This is not good, Peter.

Outside groups have been spending unprecedented amounts on TV and launching vicious attacks earlier than ever before to defeat Jon Tester and attack his record. **Now it might be working.**

Hi there...

I'm not quite sure how to phrase this, but I'm going to be honest with you, Patriot.

**These election results weren 't good news for Republicans.

I need to tell you about it, though, so you can choose for yourself whether to join the fight. You could change it all...**

My name is Brian Mast. If you aren't familiar with my background, I'm a combat veteran turned Congressman.

I lost both my legs and a finger in Afghanistan when a Taliban IED exploded beneath me. But, I survived. I returned home to my wife, Brianna, and our young son.

The terrifying truth is that there is a growing radical faction in Congress that apologizes for and even defends the same brand of monstrous terrorists that blew off my legs. I have been loud and clear in my opposition to their hate!

[That's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7bbc22f06d344166b3ea71162befe5f5&_e=owat6AwzzdEKCTF1pUhVfU2_7o7ohg8pFEroWflCrrp-W0huBJTGyKwaM3tk86HVXDl0NtC0wtpyn5Rz_n1FLNkJtxfGjvpd9L_4MrLzWwKb5TEmBTPFD8Z31zGQNUdajgNj2lBzerjedSqqJi_P6XBkH96n_64XQGVr0lqEXAs0IGwWkm5XyLEvlLahDqM8uNevw8f_kSX1ziG4q1RJQNBry8azdG1nGt6OlXhE139XgLrtMnO9PSRT8EXHMzTQKQ6Jyqbgg9u2CjcNKi7mC60-Pjm7iTtOVQODdEf7TNlS5erOK1nBFloU-FpYfNErejoPlF4g7Fqer70JdOz1nFQyHDaEJSZ5-jNImLtYlHD69s3mPfYwjRoS0NvixVbol0Mb-Oy_FuDZ13yvpvmqKA%3D%3D)
The terrorist apologist Democrats have hatched a plan to stop my fight. They don't realize that I will never back down.

But, I also know this fight is not something I will win on my own.

I learned in the Army to rely on my fellow soldiers in my time of need, and now I am looking to you, Patriot.

**_So please, help me out this one time, Patriot:_**

As a private citizen, a soldier, a volunteer, and now a Congressman, I've always worked to put America First.

These election results weren't what Republicans were hoping for, so we need to act now to prevent the same result when the stakes are even higher next year. That's why I'm leading the fight for America First, protecting our conservative values, and standing against the Radicals working to destroy our country and our allies!

I didn't back down when terrorists blew off my legs, so I certainly am not going to back down now. If you are willing to give your support, I give you my word I will not give up this fight.

clean_body: | Brian Mast volunteering with the Israeli Defense Force Hi there... I'm not quite sure how to phrase this, but I'm going to be honest with you, Patriot. These election results weren 't good news for Republicans. I need to tell you about it, though, so you can choose for yourself whether to join the fight. You could change it all... My name is Brian Mast. If you aren't familiar with my background, I'm a combat veteran turned Congressman. I lost both my legs and a finger in Afghanistan when a Taliban IED exploded beneath me. But, I survived. I returned home to my wife, Brianna, and our young son. The terrifying truth is that there is a growing radical faction in Congress that apologizes for and even defends the same brand of monstrous terrorists that blew off my legs. I have been loud and clear in my opposition to their hate! The terrorist apologist Democrats have hatched a plan to stop my fight. They don't realize that I will never back down. But, I also know this fight is not something I will win on my own. I learned in the Army to rely on my fellow soldiers in my time of need, and now I am looking to you, Patriot. So please, help me out this one time, Patriot: | As a private citizen, a soldier, a volunteer, and now a Congressman, I've always worked to put America First. These election results weren't what Republicans were hoping for, so we need to act now to prevent the same result when the stakes are even higher next year. That's why I'm leading the fight for America First, protecting our conservative values, and standing against the Radicals working to destroy our country and our allies! I didn't back down when terrorists blew off my legs, so I certainly am not going to back down now. If you are willing to give your support, I give you my word I will not give up this fight. | | | God Bless, Brian Mast | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS Hon. Brian Mast is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | Mast for Congress PO Box 3016 Stuart, FL 34995 * USA

name: Adam Schiff
subject: House Republicans are blurring footage from the January 6 Capitol insurrection
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4707%2E5257348%2EMUZoxd ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, before
he was Speaker, Mike Johnson was a lead architect behind House
Republicans’ efforts to overturn the 2020 election.

Now that he’s wielding the power of the Speaker’s gavel, he just announced
that House Republicans are blurring footage from the January 6 Capitol
insurrection. Whether this is an effort to obstruct the Justice
Department’s investigation of the rioters who ransacked Congress and
attempted to overturn the election, or to shield the rioters' identity
from their friends and neighbors, one thing is clear: he is doing the
bidding of Trump and his MAGA enablers.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20231209_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=4707%2E5257348%2EMUZoxd ]Speaker Mike Johnson says he's blurring Jan. 6 footage so rioters don't
get charged

Doctoring footage while hypocritically telling reporters, "We want the
American people to draw their own conclusions." The dangerous duplicity
from MAGA Republicans just smacks you right in the face.

Some Republicans called the rioters "normal tourists." Others spread
conspiracy theories that the Trump supporters charged with crimes were
actually undercover law enforcement agents. But they know that Trump’s
MAGA supporters were responsible for this attack — and they’re doing
everything possible to shield them from accountability.

Republicans, led by their new Speaker Mike Johnson, will tell any and
every lie they can to defend the indefensible — all while preparing to
subvert yet another presidential election next year.

I did my duty by serving as the lead impeachment manager in Trump’s first
Senate trial — while Mike Johnson worked on his defense team.

I upheld my oath of office on the January 6 Select Committee and
investigated the worst attack on our nation’s Capitol since the War of
1812.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20231209_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1005&akid=4707%2E5257348%2EMUZoxd ]I’m going to keep fighting to win this Senate race and bring truth and
accountability to Congress while MAGA Republicans like Mike Johnson do
everything possible to tear our democracy down — and I need you with me.
If you can afford it, please chip in
$3 to
support our fight.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

These are dark times for our democracy, but there is light on the horizon
if we’re willing to work together.

That’s why your support is so important. I hope I can count on it.

Together, we will overcome this challenge and rebuild our democracy
stronger than ever, so that a demagogue like Trump can never take power

Thanks for your support.

— Adam

Our campaign's attorney just appeared before a State Supreme Court as a network of Soros-funded Democrats are attempting to _**REMOVE**_ my name from the 2024 ballot.

The justices' decision could come any day now, but ultimately, we know where this legal battle is headed...

**_This is poised to be a SHOWDOWN in the U.S. Supreme Court!_**

_In fact, news reports just revealed that one of the Colorado justices already acknowledged this case could be taken up by the Supreme Court and settled for the _entire_ nation._
---
This is exactly what I mean when I say 2024 is no ordinary election.
---
It is the **FINAL BATTLE** for the heart and soul of our country - _and grassroots patriots like_ __YOU__ _are our FINAL HOPE._
---
At a time when Crooked Joe and the Radical Democrats are trying to NULLIFY YOUR VOTE __before__ 2024 voting even begins, your support has never been more critical.

With YOU at my side for this final battle, we will PROVE that no matter how many despicable witch hunts they throw at us or schemes they concoct to try and erase your vote, we will _**NEVER**_ _**SURRENDER**_ our country to the Left's tyranny!

clean_body: This is truly the FINAL BATTLE for America... This is truly the FINAL BATTLE for America... | | | | | Patriot, Our campaign's attorney just appeared before a State Supreme Court as a network of Soros-funded Democrats are attempting to REMOVE my name from the 2024 ballot. The justices' decision could come any day now, but ultimately, we know where this legal battle is headed... This is poised to be a SHOWDOWN in the U.S. Supreme Court! In fact, news reports just revealed that one of the Colorado justices already acknowledged this case could be taken up by the Supreme Court and settled for the entire nation. This is exactly what I mean when I say 2024 is no ordinary election. It is the FINAL BATTLE for the heart and soul of our country - and grassroots patriots like YOU are our FINAL HOPE. At a time when Crooked Joe and the Radical Democrats are trying to NULLIFY YOUR VOTE before 2024 voting even begins, your support has never been more critical. With YOU at my side for this final battle, we will PROVE that no matter how many despicable witch hunts they throw at us or schemes they concoct to try and erase your vote, we will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the Left's tyranny! | Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

| | Patriot,

---
On Thursday, I attended my sham trial in New York City.
---
And reports indicate I will return to New York on Monday as _“the final witness”_ before an anti-Trump judge decides whether or not to invoke the _“corporate death penalty”_ upon me – _without even granting me a trial by jury._
---
I made a promise to you that no matter how bad things got, I would NEVER feel sorry for myself or fall victim to self-pity. _I will always stand tall and resolute in our mission to save America._
---
And unlike politicians, I actually _keep_ my promises.
---
_**So tonight, I am returning to New York – the city I was born in, the city I helped build, the city I raised my family in – to deliver a POWERFUL SPEECH to my supporters and to DEFIANTLY show our many enemies that NOTHING can stop us!**_

Senator Sherrod Brown is known for being a champion for working families and a fighter for a better economy for all.

That means fair wages, worker protections, affordable health care, and more.

Now that he’s up for re-election, Trump is going on the offensive, bad-mouthing him and making baseless attacks – **_just to rile up his MAGA mob and take this seat for the GOP._**

[We need you, Peter, to take a stand against this. Team, **the holiday season is here, and we have so much to be grateful for!**

Since the Bidens walked into the White House, they have restored dignity to the office and fought for the American people by strengthening our economy, combating climate change, lowering prescription drug costs -- and so much more!

To thank the President and First Lady for all they've done, we're collecting signatures from 15,000 Democrats on our holiday card for them. But we can't send it until we hit our goal, and **as of 12/09/2023 we don’t have your signature on file! So please, before midnight:**

[**Sign the card to wish the Bidens Happy Holidays!**](https://go.dscc.org/go/16578?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231209-SignTheCard-BidenHolidayCard-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231209-SignTheCard-BidenHolidayCard-Pros-sl1&akid=12834%2E9716520%2EUgOrwO)

name: Mike Rogers
subject: Bye bye! See you later!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
Wray, Garland, Mayorkas: It’s time to look for a new job.| | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=3bcc8bb58d124199b1e437964c4ce621&_e=Tl1gruSfd6h81bvcewialGzmBRorVyBJIQ7zURG16oQ9XLveMpGpBDfooC43HaMBdJDoJ4WQpAOzNno034Fkapv0WitHRzo0KlxUSRp6g19lhA8bOmzrqrlnfaUFbmqG0f8bRE5bmCfbspHlkIpGRNDA4uKif2nfWbOpCtGw7qD5A9y-WK1Kav1Z5YdBKsvcvrqL0SGpzNRnCRfRB2nT9l2WVNa1HuUkHqMCOZkvXtSuAp8YF1jJZN35X-cyzBwpKKYmriHM4NtNUPvA-J3Jj3ZY80sIjm4GJiJblpPSNISRHky9Ojz0vzoBULsjp0hvOfHSR5zg6gCTO7BA47-ngUNv5N6ENx0NRBR-tWwryLbc_VWeP_PdTuz7WJV2V8yaYFgJrFSuvPNZ0CytmPCb9w%3D%3D)
---
Friend, **Bye bye! See ya!** That’s what I’ll say to the bureaucrats who are making a mockery of the American justice system. Christopher Wray: **Bye bye!** Merrick Garland: **See you later!** Alejandro Mayorkas: **It's time to go!** This is former FBI Special Agent Mike Rogers and there was a time not long ago when our law enforcement agencies earned the respect of the American people. Even a South Side Chicago gang leader told me “I don’t like the FBI, but I respect the FBI.” But now, trust in America’s top law enforcement agencies is at an all time low. Friend, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because**it’s time for a good old fashioned house cleaning.** We can bring back trust in our government and fairness in our law enforcement, but it’s going to take all of us to make it happen. **[Can you contribute any amount](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=3bcc8bb58d124199b1e437964c4ce621&_e=Tl1gruSfd6h81bvcewialGzmBRorVyBJIQ7zURG16oQ9XLveMpGpBDfooC43HaMBdJDoJ4WQpAOzNno034Fkapv0WitHRzo0KlxUSRp6g19lhA8bOmzrqrlnfaUFbmqG0f8bRE5bmCfbspHlkIpGRNDA4uKif2nfWbOpCtGw7qD5A9y-WK1Kav1Z5YdBKsvcvrqL0SGpzNRnCRfRB2nT9l2WVNa1HuUkHqMCOZkvXtSuAp8YF1jJZN35X-cyzBwp717ZsVF0XSCLPdkSX7dcZD6lEbYG_CyYGaFp14SE_wypdWUCgGY9xhdh3r1J-LvOb1FKDq0saISBMayvGY80NC5ykoSO0Cs_qOsfbuct7zdwGI9DS3BFTQPbCDaCOkCT6df3XMIWpP2EcSvqlIXWQA%3D%3D)** and help me CLEAN HOUSE in the DOJ and FBI? Sincerely,
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=3bcc8bb58d124199b1e437964c4ce621&_e=Tl1gruSfd6h81bvcewialGzmBRorVyBJIQ7zURG16oQ9XLveMpGpBDfooC43HaMBdJDoJ4WQpAOzNno034Fkapv0WitHRzo0KlxUSRp6g19lhA8bOmzrqrlnfaUFbmqG0f8bRE5bmCfbspHlkIpGRNDA4uKif2nfWbOpCtGw7qD5A9y-WK1Kav1Z5YdBKsvcvrqL0SGpzNRnCRfRB2nT9l2WVNa1HuUkHqMCOZkvXtSuAp8YF1jJZN35X-cyzBwpouEiV_6S1QP5oZbu2Aip8-zsIDoE6I9gb98nfWGDjiiAfbBtCR8DGitFx_SWtcsgOE9juefbydKTNtsg4Bs2t-DhpgXjLs0NEdIiHNWiHrQ3jqCXwbEoiHSS6YsWCIfCXb_XPrvIkOTsh80qFKFPgQ%3D%3D)

Mike Rogers
